(secty. to govt., rev. dept., Bengal) (b. 1st Feb., 1890).—Educ. at Oban High School and Edinburgh Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 10th Dec., 1913; and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; I.A.R.O., Aug., 1916, to March, 1919; employed in Assam from Aug., 1920; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., Oct., 1923; offg. labour intell. offr., Bengal, Nov., 1925; addl. dept. secty. to govt. of Bengal, pol. and appt. depts., Nov., 1925; magte. and collr., Aug., 1927; dep. commr., Apl., 1930; offg. secty. to govt., rev. dept., Bengal, Dec., 1933; confd., May, 1934; C.I.E., Feb., 1937.

MARTIN, OSMOND KENNETH, late Income Tax dept., Bengal (b. 15th Apl., 1878).—Joined the service, 12th July, 1909, and held

non-gazetted appt. prior to 1st Apr., 1922; inc. tax officer, Apr., 1922; asst. commr., Mar., 1929; retd., Apr., 1933.

MARTIN, REGINALD VICTOR, C.I.E., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (inspr.-genl. prisons, Bombay) (b. 20th Mar., 1889).—First commn. dated 26th July, 1913; in milty. employ to July, 1924; supt. of prison, Mar., 1927; offg. inspr.-genl. of prisons, Apr., 1931; confid., Sept., 1937; C.I.E., Jan., 1938.

MARTINDALE, SIR ARTHUR HENRY TEMPLE, K.C.S.I., late Indian C.S. (Madras).—Educ. at Cheltenham Coll.; apptd. after exam. of 1873; arrived, 10th Nov., 1875; served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag., and in the foreign dept. of the govt. of India as attaché, and asst. and junr. under sec. to govt.; offg. asst. to rest. in Mysore and sec. to the chief commr. of Coorg, Feb., 1885; offg. rest., May–June, 1885; first asst. and sec. for Berar to the rest., Hyderabad, Nov., 1886; pol. agent, Quetta and Pishin, Apr., 1887; 1st asst. to govr.-gen.'s agent, Central India, Oct., 1888; pol. agent, Bhopal, July, 1890, and Jhalawar, Jan., 1892; on spl. duty in connection with the revision of Aitchison's "Treaties," Jan.–Apr., 1892; commr., Ajmer-Merwara, May, 1894; acting rest., W. states of Rajputana, June, 1895; agent to govr.-genl., Rajputana, and chief commr., Ajmer-Merwara, Mar., 1898; C.S.I., May, 1900; K.C.S.I., June, 1904; retd., Oct., 1905.

MARTINDALE, VEN. HENRY, M.A. (Oxon), late Indian Eccles. Estab. (b. 22nd Mar., 1879).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 13th April, 1915; junr. chaplain, May, 1916; senr. chaplain, May, 1926; offg. archdeacon, June, 1927; confid., Sept., 1928; retd., Oct., 1934.

MARTYN, PHILIP DOCTON, B.A. (Man.), Indian C.S. (dep. secty., home dept., Bengal) (b. 7th April, 1904).—Educ. at Stockport Grammar School, Victoria Univ., Manchester, and Exeter College, Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. ch. manager, Dacca Nawab estate, Jan., 1933; offg. mag. and collr., July, 1934; dep. secty., home dept., Bengal, Jan., 1938.

MARVIN, EDITH ANNA, M.B.E., B.A. (London), India Office (staff officer for estab. duties) (b. 20th Apr., 1893).—Educ. at Notting Hill High Sch. and Bedford Coll.; apptd. clerical officer, 11th July, 1921; higher clerical officer (acting), April, 1922; confid., Dec., 1924; staff officer for estab. duties (temp.), June, 1933; ditto (permt.), June, 1936; M.B.E., Jan., 1935.

MARWOOD, SIDNEY LIONEL, B.A. (Oxon), Indian C.S. (magte. and collr., Bihar) (b. 8th April, 1891).—Educ. at St. Pauls' Sch., and Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 15th Nov., 1915, and posted to Bihar and Orissa; on milty. duty with the I.A.R.O., Nov., 1915, to Oct., 1919; offg. mag. and collr., Nov., 1924; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1925; offg. pol. agent, Orissa feudatory states, Oct., 1926; offg. magte. and collr., April, 1920; confid. (provl. sub.), Nov., 1929; confid., Feb., 1931; commr. of inc. tax, Nov., 1931; K.H. medal, 1st cl., June, 1934.

MASCARENHAS, WILLIAM ZAVIAR, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bombay)

—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 22nd Dec., 1926; offg. exec. engr., Apr., 1932; confid., Oct., 1935; dep. secty. to govt., Bombay (roads and bldgs., P.W.D.), Dec., 1935, to Dec., 1937; prof. of engrg., coll. of engrg., Poona, June, 1938.

MASIH, SAIYID MUHAMMAD (see Saiyid Muhammad Masih).

MASON, Rev. CHARLES DOUGLAS THOMAS, M.A. (Edin.), A.K.C., late Indian Eccles. Estab. (b. 26th Feb., 1883).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 16th Dec., 1910; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1913; senr. chaplain, Dec., 1923; retd., Sept., 1934.

MASON, JOHN EMLYN VICTOR, late Indian Police (b. 31st Dec., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 25th Nov., 1922; offg. dep. commr. of police, Bombay, April, 1928; retd., Apr., 1933.

MASON, KENNETH, M.C., Major R.E., retd. late Survey of India (b. 10th Sept., 1887).—First commn. dated 29th Dec., 1906; apptd. asst. supt., trigl. survey, 29th Aug., 1909; temply. reverted to milty. duty from Oct., 1914, to March, 1919; dep. supt., June, 1923; supt. Jan., 1926; awarded Founder's Medal. R.G.S., March, 1927; asst. surveyor-genl., Oct., 1927; retd., Mar., 1934.

MASON, LAWRENCE, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.C., B.A., Indian Forest Service (inspr.-genl. forests, United Provs.) (b. 27th Aug., 1886).—Joined the service 18th Dec., 1910, as asst. consrv.; dep. consrv., Dec., 1915; on mil. service, Oct., 1914, to Oct., 1919; ch. forest officer, Andamans, Apr., 1928, to Dec., 1929; C.I.E., June, 1930; offg. consrv., Central Provs., Apr., 1933; ditto, United Provs., Apr., 1934; confid., Aug., 1934; inspr.-genl. forests and presdnt. for research inst., Dehra Dun, Apr., 1938.

MASON, NOEL, M.A., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 24th Apr., 1889).—Joined the service as mil. acct., 2nd cl., Feb., 1913; attd. for duty, mil. dept., India Office, Dec., 1918 to Aug., 1919; on depn. to India Office, Aug., 1920 to Sept. 1920; confid. as cl. I officer, Oct., 1935; dep. finl. advr., mil. fin., Oct., 1937.

MASON, PHILIP, M.A., Indian C.S. (commr., United Provs.) (b. 30th Nov., 1882).—Educ. at Norwich Sch., and Queen's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived, 9th Dec., 1907, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt., Oct., 1914; jt. mag. Oct., 1916; mag. and collr., May, 1923; secty. to govt., local self govt. and pub. health depts., Nov., 1931; commr. (prov. subs.), Nov., 1936; confid., Dec., 1937.

MASON, PHILIP, Indian C.S. (dep. secty., Govt. of India) (b. 19th March, 1906).—Educ. at Sedburgh and Balliol College, Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1928; arrived, Dec., 1928, and served in the United Provs. as asst. collr. and mag.; under-sec. to govt. of India defence dept., Nov., 1933; offg. dep. secty., defence dept., Mar., 1936; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1936; confid., Dec., 1937; dep. secty., Govt. of India, Sept., 1939.

MASTER, ALFRED, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 12th Feb., 1883).—Educ. at Epsom Coll., and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived, 19th Dec., 1906 and

served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag., and asst. settlt. offr.; munpl. commr., Ahmedabad, Aug., 1917; on mil. duty, Sept., 1918, to Aug., 1919; settlement officer, Nov., 1922; jt. sec. to govt., gen. educ. and marine depts., July, 1925; offg. sec. to ditto, Sept., 1925; member of legisl. council, Oct., 1925, and again, Oct., 1932; offg. collr. and dist. mag. and pol. agent, April, 1926; confd., Oct., 1926; C.I.E., Jan., 1931; ret'd., Nov., 1934.

MASTER, JAL ARDESHIR, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 23rd Aug., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 23rd Nov., 1915; dep. consvr., Nov., 1920; offg. consvr., Mar., 1936.

MASTER, NADIRSHAH NASARVANJI MERVENJI, B.A., LL.B., late Bombay Civil Service, Judl. Branch (b. 3rd Dec., 1879).—Joined the service, 5th Aug., 1904; offg. judge and sess. judge, June, 1928; confd., Dec., 1930; ret'd., Dec., 1934.

MASTERMAN, CHRISTOPHER HUGHES, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (collr. and mag., Madras) (b. 7th Oct., 1889).—Educ. at Winchester and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 12th Dec., 1914, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; on mil. duty from July, 1917, to Dec., 1919; sub-collr., March, 1922; collr. of salt revenue, April, 1924; offg. collr. and dist. mag., July, 1932; ditto (provl. subs.), July, 1933; confd., Feb., 1935; secty. to govt., educn. and public health depts., Madras, Aug., 1936; to March, 1939; C.I.E., June, 1939.

MASWOOD, MUHAMMAD ADBUL HAI, B.Sc., Indian Police (b. 1st Oct., 1912).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal., on probn., 1st Mar., 1935; confd., 1937.

MATHER, WILLIAM McMENZIE, O.B.E., Office of High Commr. for India (estabt. officer) (b. 12th Mar., 1885).—Apptd. temp. pte. secty. to High Commr., Oct., 1920; confd., Apl., 1927; O.B.E., Feb., 1937; suptg. exec. officer, accts. dept., Nov., 1937; estabt. officer, Apl., 1938.

MATHESON, Rev. ROBERTUS WILLIAM, M.A., Indian Eccles. Estabt., Church of Scotland (junr. chaplain) (b. 21st Apl., 1904).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 20th Jan., 1934; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1936.

MATHEW, PUTHENVEETIL CHANDAPILLA, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 30th June, 1913).—Educ. at Church Missionary Society High Sch., Mavelikara, Madras Univ., and Univ. College, London; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub collr. and jt. mag., March 1939.

MATHIAS, ALFRED ERNEST, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 24th Jan., 1880).—Educ. at Clifton Coll., and Oriel Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived, 28th Nov., 1904, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr. and settlt. offr.; under-sec. to chief commr., Oct., 1908 to Nov., 1909; on spl. duty under regr., co-operative credit soc., from Dec., 1915; offg. regr., co-operative credit soc., April, 1917; dep. commr., Nov., 1917; fin. sec. to govt. of Central Provs., Nov., 1921; offg. chief sec. to govt. of Central Provs., March, 1923; fin. sec. to govt. of Central Provs., Nov.,

1925; member of tariff board, June, 1926; offg. president, tariff board, April, 1927; confd., Mar., 1930; commr. C.P., Feb., 1930; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; ret'd., Aug., 1933.

MATHIESON, LLEWELLYN CHARLES FLETCHER, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 6th Sept., 1883).—Joined the service, May, 1910; asst. traffic supt., Feb., 1918; divl. transpn. officer, May, 1935; ret'd., Sept., 1938.

MATHRA DAS, DIWAN BAHADUR, Indian State Rlys. (dep. gen. manager) (b. 13th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 9th July, 1910; dist. traffic supt., Oct., 1923; offg. dep. agent, Sept., 1931; dir. rly. bd., Feb., 1933; dep. gen. manager, July, 1939.

MATHRANI, HARBHAGWANDAS PRIBHDAS, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 12th July, 1901).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1923; offg. exec. engr., April, 1927; confd., Oct., 1932.

MATHRANI, KEWALRAM PRIBHDAS, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 21st Aug., 1911).—Educ. at Government High Sch., Shikarpur, Edinburgh University and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Nov., 1936, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

MATHRANI, MITHARAM PRIBHDAS, O.B.E., B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Sind) (b. 10th Nov., 1895).—Joined the provl. service as apprentice engr., 3rd Aug., 1918; asst. engr. (provl. subst.), Aug., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; offg. exec. engr. 13th Dec., 1923; confd., Aug., 1928; O.B.E. Jan., 1933.

MATHUR, DHATRI SARAN, Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 13th Nov., 1912).—Educ. at Government Intermediate Coll., Etawah, Agra University, Thomason Civil Engineering College and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Oct., 1936, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.

MATHUR, GOBIND SARUP, BABU (see Gobind, S. M.).

MATHUR, KALKA PRASAD, M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., D.P.H., Public Health Dept., United Provs. (dir. of public health) (b. 15th Nov., 1884).—Joined the service as health officer, 1st Mar., 1914; asst. dir. of public health, Nov., 1921; dir., ditto, Nov., 1936.

MATHUR, KRISHNA BEHARI LALL, Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. engr.) (b. 24th May, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 30th Sept., 1913; asst. exec. engr., July, 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. dep. ch. engr., June, 1935; provl. perm., July, 1938; confd., May, 1939.

MATHUR, MAHESANDRA SHANKAR, B.Sc., LL.B., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 17th Oct., 1906).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 5th Jan., 1931; confd., Mar., 1933.

MATHUR, MANMOHAN SARUP, Rai Bahadur, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central p.w.d.) (b. 15th July, 1898).—Joined the service, 29th Oct., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. exec. engr., Mar., 1932; transf. to central p.w.d., Aug., 1933; exec. engr., Jan., 1935.

MATHUR, PRAHLAD NARAYAN, P.M.S. Civil Surgeon, United Provs. (b. 1st Jan., 1886).—Civil surgeon, May, 1927.

MATSON, HORACE SYDNEY, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.), late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 18th Oct., 1879).—First commn. dated 1st Sept., 1904; spl. plague officer, Jan., 1910; offg. civil surg., April, 1910; on mil. service from 23rd Oct., 1914, to 28th April, 1922; civil surg., June, 1922; ret'd., Dec., 1931.

MATTHAL, GEORGE, M.A. (Cantab.) Indian Educl. Service (b. 13th Nov., 1887).—Apptd. prof. of zoology, govt. coll., Lahore, 16th Sept., 1918.

MATTHAI, JACOB, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 3rd Mar., 1884).—Joined the service, 17th Feb., 1916; asst. engr., March, 1918; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; offg. exec. engr., July, 1925; confd., March, 1927; ret'd., March, 1939.

MATTHAI, JOHN, C.I.E., B.A., B.L., D.Sc., B.Litt., Indian Educl. Service (dir.-gen. of comml. intel. and statistics) (b. 10th Jan., 1886).—Apptd. to the I.E.S. as prof., presdy. coll., Madras, 3rd April, 1922; member, Indian Tariff Board, 22nd June, 1925; offg. president, ditto, Apl., 1931; confd., Dec., 1931; C.I.E., June, 1934; dir.-genl. of comml. intel. and statistics, Jan., 1935.

MATTHEW, KANIANTHRA THOMAS, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 12th Dec., 1899).—Joined the service, 15th Sept., 1924; dep. consvr., Sept., 1929.

MATTHEWMAN, THOMAS HENRY, M.I.E.E. (b. 10th Oct., 1883).—Apptd. prof. of electricity, Maclagan engrg. coll., Lahore, 17th Aug., 1924.

MATTHEWS, HARRY, M.B.E., late Indian Police (b. 22nd Feb., 1882).—Joined the service, 23rd Jan., 1901; M.B.E., June, 1919; asst. supt., Feb., 1923; supt., April, 1926; ret'd., Sept., 1934.

MATTHEWS, VICTOR GEORGE, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (under secty., fin. dept., govt. of India) (b. 3rd Mar., 1907).—Educ. at Latymer Secondary Sch., Edmonton, University College, London, and Clare College, Cambridge; apptd. after examination of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the Central Provinces as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt., Central Provs., Aug., 1935; and again, Aug., 1936; pte. secty. to govt., Central Provs., Mar., 1936. under-secty., dept. of e.-h., and l., govt. of India, Oct., 1937; confd., Apl., 1938; asst. fin. adviser, mily. finance, Oct., 1938; under secty., fin. dept., govt. of India, April, 1939.

MATTHEWS, WILLIAM, M.B.E., late India Office (b. 23rd Sept., 1878).—Apptd. clerk, 2nd class, 2nd Jan., 1899; minor staff clerk, July, 1919; staff clerk (actg.), Jan., 1920; confd., Apl., 1921; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; also assessor of income tax; M.B.E., May, 1937; ret'd., Sept., 1938.

MAUDE, SIR WALTER, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Highgate Sch., and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1881; arrived, 17th Nov., 1883, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; under sec. to govt. of Bengal, gen., rev., and statistical depts., Aug., 1890; settlt. officer, Orissa, Nov., 1892; joint mag. and dep. collr., March, 1893; mag. and collr., July, 1895; dep. commr., Oct., 1901; commr., Aug., 1905; transfd. to Bihar and Orissa

as commr., April, 1912; member bd. of rev., Nov., 1912; temp. member, exec. council, Nov., 1913, to May, 1914; C.S.I., June, 1914; addl. member, govr.-gen.'s council, Dec., 1914; again temp. memb. of exec. council, Bihar and Orissa, Feb., 1916; member, ditto, April, 1917; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1920; presdnt., Bihar and Orissa exec. council, 1921; ret'd., May., 1921.

MAUGER, WALTER KYLE, Indian Police (supt.) (b. 1st Dec., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 25th Nov., 1922; offg. supt., Mar., 1929, and again, Apl., 1933; confd., Nov., 1934.

MAUNG BA AYE, Burma Police (Cl. 1) (asst. supt.).—Apptd. on probn., 10th Jan., 1939.

MAUNG, MAUNG HLA, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 11th Feb., 1911).—Educated at Government High School, Akyab, Rangoon University and Jesus College, Oxford; joined the service, 5th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; asst. warden, oil fields, Feb., 1939.

MAUNG, MAUNG OHN, B.A., Burma C.S. (Cl. 1) (asst. commr.) (b. 2nd Feb., 1913).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ.; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 9th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Oct., 1938, and served as asst. commr.

MAUNG, MAUNG SAN, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 26th April, 1904).—Educ. at University of Rangoon and Queen's Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. regr., high ct., Rang on, Sept., 1933; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1936.

MAUNG SAN LIN, Burma Civil Service (Cl. 1) (asst. commr.) (b. 16th May, 1916).—Educ. at Govt. English High School, Maymyo and Rangoon University; apptd. on probn., 30th Sept., 1938.

MAUNG SEIN TUN, Burma Police (Cl. 1) (asst. supt.).—Apptd. on probn., 10th Jan., 1939.

MAUNG SET, C.I.E., B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 24th Nov., 1884).—Apptd. to dept., 25th April, 1910; asst. acctnt.-gen., Burma, May, 1910; dep. ditto, Mar., 1927; on foreign service under municipal corporation of Rangoon, Jan., 1929; C.I.E., May, 1937.

MAUNG, U. AYE, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Burma) (b. 26th Dec., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1914; asst. exec. engr., June, 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; offg. suptg. engr., Jan., 1935; confd., Feb., 1937.

MAUNG, U. AYE (2), B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 31st May, 1896).—Joined the service, Oct., 1919; asst. engr., Dec., 1919; asst. exec. engr., March, 1921; exec. engr., Oct., 1928.

MAUNG, U. BA (C.5), B.A., Indian Police (b. 9th Nov., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, 27th May, 1929.

MAUNG, U. CHIT (A2), B.A., Burma Commr. (dep. commr.) (b. 25th Mar., 1895).—Joined the service, 22nd Jan., 1917; extra asst. commr., June, 1921; dep. commr., Mar., 1934; secty. to govt., judl. dept., Burma, Mar., 1936; chairman, Rangoon Development Trust, Mar., 1939.

MAUNG, U KIN, B.A., Indian Police (b. 23rd Feb., 1911).—Apptd. asst. supt., Burma, on probn., 7th Feb., 1935; confd., Feb., 1937.

MAUNG, U. MAUNG, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 19th Aug., 1899).—Educ. at Govt. High Sch., Rangoon, Calcutta Univ., and Queen's Coll., Oxford; joined the service on 25th Oct., 1924, and served in Burma as an asst. commr.; under-sec. to govt., local govt., dept., May, 1927; judge, sub-divl. courts, June, 1930; addl. dist. and sess. judge, May, 1932; dist. and sess. judge, June, 1934.

MAUNG, U MAUNG (B.7), Barr. Burma Judl. Dept. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 5th Oct., 1884).—Previous service from 7th April, 1906; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1922.

MAUNG, ZAW WIN, Burma Police (Class I).—Apptd. asst. supt., Burma, on probn., Dec., 1937.

MAUNSELL, ANTHONY CHARLES KER, Capt., I.A., Indian Pol. Service (b. 23rd Oct., 1907).—First commn., 1st Sept., 1927; pers. asst. to the A.G.G., E. States, Apl., 1934; pol. prob. under trng. in for. and pol. dept., Oct., 1934; ditto, asst. collr., Bareilly, Mar., 1935; asst. commr., Kohat, June, 1936; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, Oct., 1937; confd., Mar., 1938; asst. commr., Kohat, Dec., 1938.

MAXTED, DENIS SYDNEY, Indian Police (b. 2nd Aug., 1912).—Joined the service as prob. asst. supt., Bengal, Nov., 1932; confd., Mar., 1935.

MAXWELL, Sir REGINALD MAITLAND, K.C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (member, govr.-gen'l's exec. council) (b. 24th Aug., 1882).—Educ. at Marlborough and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived, 26th Nov., 1906, and served in Bombay as asst. coll. and mag. and asst. settl. offr.; compiler of genl. admn. report, 1908-9; on deputn. to Madras to study working of salt and excise depts., August, to October, 1910; offg. collr. of salt rev., Bombay, Nov., 1916; dep. commr. of salt and excise, Bombay, Sept., 1917; pte. sec. to H.E. the Govr., Sept., 1920; spl. duty, Bombay sect., Feb., 1921; sec., retrenchment cttee., Sept., 1921; C.I.E., June, 1923; offg. collr. and mag. and pol. agent, Jan., 1924; confd., Oct., 1926; offg. secty. to govt., genl., &c., depts., June, 1928; pte. secty. to govt. of Bombay, Mar., 1929; offg. secty. to govt. of Bombay, genl. and educ. depts., Oct., 1931; secty. to govt. of Bombay, home and ecclesi. depts., Apl., 1932; C.S.I., June, 1933; secty., home dept., Govt. of India, Oct., 1936; member, Council of State, Oct., 1936; commr., Dec., 1936; temp. member, govr.-gen'l's. exec. council, June, 1937; secty. home dept., Govt. of India, Oct., 1937; member, govr.-gen'l's. exec. council, Apl., 1938; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1939.

MAXWELL, Sir WILLIAM, K.C.I.E., M.V.O., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Belfast Methodist Coll., Royal Univ. of Ireland, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1880; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1891, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., April, 1897; postmr.-gen., Bombay, May, 1902; ditto, and dep. dir.-gen. of Post Office of India, March, 1903; postmr.-gen.,

Punjab and N.W.F., Oct., 1905; on dep. to tel. cttee., Sept., 1906; postmr.-gen., Punjab and N.W.F., April, 1907; ditto, and dep. dir.-gen. of Post Office of India, Feb. 1908; offg. dir.-gen. of Post Office of India, March, 1908; also presdt. of cttee. to examine working of new arrangement of hours of duty in tel. dep., April and May, 1908; sub. pro tem. sec. to govt. of India, fin. dep., Oct., 1908; offg. dir.-gen. of Post Office of India, Nov., 1908; C.I.E., Jan., 1909; postmr.-gen., Bombay, July, 1909; offg. sec. to govt. of India, dept. of comm. and ind., Dec., 1909; on special duty in the dept. of comm. and ind., March, 1910; sub. pro tem. sec. to govt. of India, dept. of comm. and ind., March to Nov., 1910; addl. memb. of govr.-gen's legisl. council, Jan. to Nov., 1910; postmr.-gen., Punjab and N.W.F., Dec., 1910; M.V.O., Dec., 1911; on special duty to assist dir.-gen. of posts and telegraphs in the administration of post office and telegraph dept., March, 1912; addl. member of govr.-gen.'s legisl. council from June, 1912; offg. dir.-gen. of posts and telegraphs, Feb., 1913; dir.-gen. of costs and telegraphs, Aug., 1913; K.C.I.E., June, 1915; ret'd., Sept., 1918.

MAY, PAUL ROBERT BUCHAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Punjab) (b. 19th May, 1905).—Educ. at Westminster and Christ Church Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 16th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1932; addl. ditto, Oct., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1936.

MAYA DAS, C. P. (see Das, C. P. M.).

MAYBURY, MAURICE ALFRED, Burma Civil Service (Cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 10th Nov., 1914).—Educ. at The Common Weal Secondary School, Swindon, and Pembroke College, Oxford; apptd. on probn., 30th Sept., 1938.

MAYERS, STANLEY RAY, late Indian Police (b. 27th Oct., 1882).—Joined the service, 22nd Nov., 1902, and posted to United Provs.; asst. supt. of police, Jan., 1907; ditto, Port Blair, Feb., 1914; supt., Port Blair, Oct., 1914; ditto, Ajmer-Merwara, April, 1916, to Oct., 1918; ret'd., June, 1935.

MAYNARD, REV. BERTRAM MARTIN, late Indian Eccles. Estabt. (b. 10th Feb., 1881).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 19th Oct., 1914; junr. chaplain, Oct., 1917; senr. chaplain, Oct., 1927; ret'd., June, 1935.

MAYNARD, Sir HERBERT JOHN, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., M.A., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Merchant Taylors' Sch. and St. John's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1883; arrived, 4th Dec., 1886, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under sec., rev. dept., Nov., 1891, to May, 1894; junr. sec. to govt., Dec., 1896; dep. commr., Jan., 1899; judl. and gen. sec. to govt., Jan. to Oct., 1899; commr. of excise, inspr.-gen. of registrn., supt. of stamps, &c., Nov., 1903, to Nov., 1906; commr., Nov., 1910; addl. member, govr.-gen.'s council, Jan. to April, 1915; C.S.I., June, 1915; offg. finl. commr., Punjab, June, 1916; confd. as finl. commr., July, 1916; K.C.I.E., June, 1920; member of govr.'s exec. council, Punjab, Jan., 1921; ret'd., Jan., 1927.

MAZUMDAR, BIDHAN PRASHAD, L.M.S., D.P.H., D.T.M., Public Health Dept., Bihar (asst. dir.) (b. 22nd Oct., 1887).—Joined the service, 15th Mar., 1915; asst. dir. of public health, May, 1925.

MAZUMDAR, KHAGENDRA NATH, M.A., Barr. (first asst. sec. to Govt. of Bengal, legisl. dept.).—Joined the service as asst. sec., Bengal legisl. council, 1st May, 1919; 2nd asst. sec., legisl. dept., May, 1924; offg. 1st ditto, April to Nov., 1930; confd., Sept., 1932; offg. secty., ditto, Nov., 1935.

MAZUMDAR, NALINI NATH, O.B.E., Rai Bahadur, Indian Police, ret'd. (b. 1st July, 1884).—Joined the service, 1st May, 1905; asst. commr. Feb., 1925; apptd. to Indian Police as supt., Apl., 1933; O.B.E., Jan., 1938; ret'd., July, 1939.

MAZUMDAR, SUDHENDRA NATH, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (dir. of devel'mt., Orissa) (b. 9th Nov., 1896).—Educ. at Canning Coll., Lucknow, and Peterhouse, Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 13th Jan., 1922, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secty., fin. dept., offg. dep. commr., Mar., 1932; dept. secty. to govt., Orissa, Apl., 1936; dir. of development, Orissa, Nov., 1936; mag. and collr., Feb., 1937.

MEAKINS, HAROLD WHAYMAN, Indian State Rlys. (dist. traffic mgr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 9th Oct., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., on 18th July, 1908; dist. ditto, April, 1918; offg. dep. traffic manager, E.B. rly., variously from Oct., 1932; confd., Jan., 1937.

MEARES, JOHN WILLOUGHBY, C.I.E., M.I.C.E., M.I.E.E., F.R.A.S., late India Public Works Dept.—Educ. at Winchester, and Univ. Coll., London; electrical engr. and inspr. of electricity to the govt. of Bengal from 1st April, 1898; electrical adviser to the govt. of India, April, 1905; C.I.E., Jan., 1922; ret'd., Dec., 1924; author of "The Law Relating to Electrical Energy in India," 3rd ed., 1930; and "Electrical Engineering Practice, 1923-1930."

MEARNS, WILLIAM ANDERSON, M.B., Ch.B., D.P.H., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 15th Nov., 1879).—First commn. dated 1st Feb., 1906; in mil. employ to 21st Sept., 1913, and again from 26th Oct., 1914, to 31st Oct., 1920; dep. sany. commr., Nov., 1920; asst. dir. of public health, Nov., 1921; dir., Nov., 1932; ret'd., Nov., 1934.

MEARS, Sir EDWARD GRIMWOOD, K.C.I.E., Barr (b. 21st Jan., 1869).—Apptd. chief justice, Allahabad high court, 27th Oct., 1919; Kt., 1917; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1928; ret'd., March, 1932.

MEASURES, PHILIP HERBERT JOSEPH, C.B.E., Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 2nd Jan., 1893).—Joined the service, Nov., 1913, as asst. supt.; supt., March, 1925; C.B.E., Jan., 1931.

MEDD, H. A. N.—Consulting Architect, Central P.W.D. (b. 21st Sept., 1892).—Consulting Architect to Govt., C.P., 14th Dec., 1935; transferred to Central P.W.D., Oct., 1939.

MEEHAN, ROBERT LYS WILLIAM, V.D., Indian State Rlys. (ch. mech. engr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 30th Apl., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 3rd Jan., 1914; dist. loco. supt., Dec., 1922; supt., mech. records, Apl., 1925; pers. asst. to dep. ch. mech. engr., Dec., 1926;

offg. dep. ch. mech. engr., June, 1929; confd., May, 1931; offg. ch. mech. engr., E.I. rly., Jan., 1936; ch. mech. engr., E.B. Rly., Jan., 1938.

MEEK, ARTHUR STANLEY, C.M.G., Lt.-Col., I.A. (ret'd.), late Indian Pol. Service (b. 7th Oct., 1883).—Served in mil. dept. until 16th Oct., 1907, when apptd. asst. pol. agent and asst. resdt., Aden; transf. to Kathiawar, Sept., 1911; pol. agent, Gohilvad Prant, Jan., 1912; on mil. duty from Dec., 1914, to April, 1917; on spl. duty under orders of pol. resdt., Persian Gulf, from Dec., 1914, to May, 1919; C.M.G., Dec., 1919; pol. agent, Kathiawar, Apl., 1921; pol. agent, Mahikantha, Nov., 1924; pol. agent, W. K. States, May, 1928; on foreign service in Jaipur state, Mar., 1929; pol. agent, Southern States of C.I., Oct., 1929; pol. agent in Bundelkhand and Baghelkhand, Mar., 1932; resdt., and A.G.G., Eastern States, Apl., 1934; confd., Oct., 1935; ret'd., Oct., 1938.

MEEK, Sir DAVID BURNETT, C.I.E., O.B.E., M.A., D.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (Indian trade commr.) (b. 10th Mar., 1885).—Joined the service, 11th Feb., 1911, as profr., Dacca Coll.; asst. contr. of munitions, govt. of India, Oct., 1918. to April, 1919; dir. of industries, Bengal, Jan., 1920; O.B.E., June, 1924; dir. gen. of comml., intell., April, 1926; C.I.E., June, 1933; Indian trade commr., Jan., 1935; representative of the Govt. of India to Commonwealth Statistical Conf., Ottawa, Sept., 1935; Knighted, May, 1937.

MEGAW, Sir JOHN WALLACE DICK, K.C.I.E., M.B., B.Ch., B.A., K.H.P., Major-Genl., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 8th Feb., 1874).—First commn. dated 27th Jan., 1900; in mil. employ to June, 1903, when he was apptd. to officiate as civil surgeon in Bengal; first resdt. surgn., Presyd. Genl. Hosp., Nov., 1909; civil surg., Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; profr. of pathology, King George's Med. Coll., Lucknow, Oct., 1914; temp. princpl. (in addn.), Sept., 1916; dir. and profr., Sch. of Tropical Medicine, Calcutta, Nov., 1921; C.I.E., Jan., 1926; inspr.-genl. of civil hosps., Punjab, Feb., 1928; surg.-genl. with govt. of Madras, Sept., 1928; dir.-genl., I.M.S., Mar., 1930; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1933; ret'd., Nov., 1933; presdt., medl. bd., India Office, Nov., 1933, to Nov., 1939.

MEGGITT, FREDERICK JOSEPH, M.Sc., Ph.D., Indian Educl. Service (b. 10th Aug., 1890).—Joined the service as lecturer in biological science, Univ. Coll., Rangoon, 5th Feb., 1923.

MEHER, MANEKSHA RUSTAMJI, M.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bombay) (b. 10th Dec., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 15th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1935; confd., Aug., 1936.

MEHKRI, MUHAMMAD ASADULLAH, B.A., Indian State Rlys. (dist. contr. of stores, G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 14th Jan., 1902).—Joined service, June, 1926; asst. contr. of stores, June, 1929; dist. contr. of stores, senior scale, Oct., 1938.

MEHTA, Sir CHUNILAL VIJBUKHANDAS, K.C.S.I., M.A., LL.B.—Apptd. member of govr.'s exec. council, 22nd June, 1923; Kt., June, 1925; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1928; ret'd., Sept., 1928.

MEHTA, DADIBA CURSETJEE, M.A., LL.B., late Bombay Civil Service, Judl. Branch (b. 27th Nov., 1878).—Held various judicial appts. from 22nd Oct., 1918, to 3rd June, 1924; judge and sess. judge, 4th June, 1924; offg. judl. commr. of Sind, June, 1931; addl. ditto, Apl., 1934 to Nov., 1938; retd. Nov., 1938.

MEHTA, DESRAJ, M.B.E., B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bihar) (b. 21st Nov., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bihar and Orissa, 6th Nov., 1925; offg. exec. engr., Feb., 1933; confd., Oct., 1935; M.B.E., Jan., 1939.

MEHTA, GUR SARAN DAS, Rai Bahadur, late Indian Audit Dept. (b. Oct., 1883).—Joined the service, 19th Dec., 1904; asst. dir. of Army Audit, N.C., June, 1935; asst. dir. of Audit Defence Service, W.C., May, 1936; retd., Nov., 1938.

MEHTA, INDRAVADAN NARAYANBAI, B.A., LL.B., Barr., Bombay Judicial Dept. (presdy. mag.) (b. 20th Jan., 1886).—Joined the dept., 18th Feb., 1925; 6th presdy. mag., Feb., 1925; 5th ditto, March, 1925.

MEHTA, KANHAIYA LAL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr. U.P.) (b. 15th Mar., 1913).—Educ. at Maharana's Inter. Coll., Udaipur; Agra Univ., and London School of Economics; joined the service 23rd Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

MEHTA, MAGANLAL GHELABHAI, B.A., LL.B., late Bombay Judicial Dept. (b. 1st Mar., 1875).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st Oct., 1904, to 21st Jan., 1908; sub-judge, Jan., 1908; retd., Sept., 1930.

MEHTA, NANALAL CHAMANLAL, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (secty., industries dept., U.P. Govt.) (b. 17th Sept., 1891).—Educ. at Bombay, Cambridge and London; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1915 and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., May, 1918; dir. of co-operative societies, Gwalior State, Jan., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., July, 1924; confd., Dec., 1931; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1924; dir. of land records and inspr.-genl. of registrn., July, 1930; secty., Impl. council of agricl. research, Aug., 1935; offg. vice-chairman, ditto, Aug.-Dec., 1936; secty. industries dept., U.P. govt. Mar., 1939.

MEHTA, NATWAR LAL, M.Sc., Indian Audit Department (b. 2nd Dec., 1901).—Joined the service, 25th Feb., 1926; depy. chief auditor, E.I. Rly., Oct., 1933; asst. accontnt. genl., United Provs., 2nd Jan., 1935; depy. accontnt. genl., United Provs., Nov., 1937.

MEHTA, PERSHOTAM LAL, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 1st Mar., 1907).—Apptd. proby. asst. supt., Bengal, 18th Jan., 1930; confd., Mar., 1932.

MEHTA, SHIV CHARAN DAS, RAI BAHADUR, late Indian Police (b. 1st Aug., 1881).—Held non-gazetted appt. from 14th Nov., 1907, to 24th June, 1910; dep. supt., June, 1910; supt., May, 1921; retd., Aug., 1936.

MEHTA, SHREENATH, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 28th Oct., 1904).—Educ. at University of Allahabad; University of Nagpur; and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 28th Sept., 1928; arrived, 25th Oct., 1928, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.

MEHTA, SHRIMUKHRAO LAXMILAL, B.A., Indian C.S. (dir. of industries, Assam) (b. 1st Nov., 1892).—Educ. at Bombay and Clare Coll., Cambridge; apptd. to the I.C.S. by nomination, 15th Oct., 1917; arrived in India, 21st Dec., 1917, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1929; again, Jan., 1930; confd. as def. commr., Nov., 1934; dir. of industries, Assam, Feb., 1935.

MEHTA, VINAYAK NANDSHANKAR, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (commr., United Provs.) (b. 3rd June, 1883).—Educ. at Govt. High Sch., Surat, Bombay Univ., and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1906, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; joint mag., March, 1915; dir. of industries, Dec., 1920; dep. commr., Nov., 1923; offg. sec. to govt., educ. and industries depts., April, 1925; confd., Nov., 1928; offg. commr., June, 1931; minister, rev. and dev., Kashmir darbar, Aug., 1932; commr., United Provs., Apl., 1935; prime minister, Bikaner State, Dec., 1936; member board of revenue, United Provs., Jan., 1939.

MEIKLE, HENRY GEORGE WATSON, F.F.A. (b. 4th May, 1870).—Apptd. actuary to govt. of India, 23rd Dec., 1912; retd. May, 1930.

MEIKLEJOHN, WILLIAM, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (consvr.) (b. 5th Dec., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 23rd Dec., 1910; in mil. employ from 1st Jan., 1918, to 14th April, 1919; dep. consvr., Oct., 1920; offg. consvr., Apl., 1930; transf. N.W.F.P. as offg. consvr., Dec., 1930; ditto, United Provs., Nov., 1934; ditto, Bengal, Apl., 1935; consvr., Aug., 1935.

MELDRUM, ANDREW NORMAN, D.Sc., late Indian Educl. Service (Bombay) (b. 19th Mar., 1876).—Apptd. prof. of physics and chemistry, M.R. Science Inst., Ahmedabad, 3rd April, 1912; prof. of chem., Royal Inst. of Science, Bombay, Nov., 1922; offg. prin., Royal Institute of Science, Bombay, Oct., 1925; confd., Feb., 1927; retd., Sept., 1931; author of 'Avogadro and Dalton, the standing in Chemistry of their Hypothesis,' 'Papers in Translations of Chemical Society,' 'Chemical News,' etc.

MELDRUM, JAMES WHITE, M.A., Indian C.S. (under-secty. to govt., Central Provs.) (b. 12th April, 1908).—Educ. at Ayr Academy, Edinburgh University and Balliol College, Oxford; apptd. after examination of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the Central Provinces as asst. commr.; under secty. to govt., Central Provs., Jan., 1935.

MELLOR, RAYMOND GEORGE, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 6th Apl., 1912).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 19th Nov., 1931; confd., Nov., 1933.

MENCE, CHARLES ROWLATT WATKINS.—See Watkins-Mence, Charles Rowlatt.

MENESSE, NORMAN HAROLD, O.B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 20th Sept., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bombay, 1st Oct., 1925; awarded Kaisar-i-Hind medal, 2nd class, June, 1928; offg. exec. engr., Oct., 1929; confd., Sept., 1934; in for. service as Admin. Shikarpur Municipality, Nov., 1934, to Mar., 1937; O.B.E., May, 1937.

MENON, ATCHUTH MADHAVA, B.A., LL.B., A.S.A.A., Office of High Commr. for India (higher exec. officer, accts. dept.) (b. 10th July, 1892).—Apptd. to office of high commr. for India, 15th Nov., 1920; higher clerical officer, April, 1922; higher exec. officer (temp.), May, 1925; confd., June, 1927.

MENON, A. V. GOVINDA (see Govinda Menon, A. V.).

MENON, KIZHAKKEPAT RAMUNNI, Indian C.S. (secty., p.w.d., Madras) (b. 2nd June, 1896).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 26th Oct., 1920; arrived, 27th Dec., 1920; and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag; sub-collr. and jt. mag., July, 1922; offg. under-sec. to govt., law dept., Nov., 1924; under-sec., govt. of India, home dept., April, 1927; addl. dep. secty., govt. of India, educn., etc., dept., Oct., 1930, and again, June, 1934; secty., public dept., office of H.C. for India, Apl., 1931, to Mar., 1934; adviser and secty. to govt. of India delegation to internatl. labour conf., Geneva, 1933; secty., rev. dept., Madras, May, 1937; ditto, p.w.d., Oct., 1937.

MENON, KIZHAKKEPAT SANKARA (see Sankara Menon, K.).

MENON, KOMATTIL GOVINDA, M.Sc., B.A., Indian C.S. (under-secty. to govt., Madras, p.w.d.) (b. 19th Sept., 1909).—Educ. at B.M. High Sch., Palghat, Madras Univ., University Coll., London, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 2nd Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Jan., 1936; under-secty. to govt., Madras, p.w.d., July, 1938.

MENON, KONNANATH RAMAKRISHNA, M.B.E., M.A., B.L., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. June, 1901).—Joined the service as officer, cl. II, May, 1917; A.M.A.G., i/c M.A., sec., June, 1933; D.M.A.G., (junr.), Apl., 1936; addtl. ditto (junr.), Oct., 1936; M.B.E., 1938; asst. commr. of income tax, Bombay, Jan., 1939.

MENON, KUMAR PADMA SIVASANKARA (see Sivasankara Menon, K. P.).

MENON, MANAKAT KRISHNA, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 14th Dec., 1906).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Madras, Jan., 1931; confd., Jan., 1933.

MENON, MULLASSERI MADHAVA, Local fund audit dept., Burma (b. 8th July, 1888).—Apptd. asst. examr., 19th Mar., 1927.

MENON, PARAKAT ACHUTHA, Indian C.S. (under-secty., home dept., govt. of India) (b. 2nd Jan., 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., May, 1931; under-secty. (p.w.d.), Madras, Jan., 1934; ditto, home dept., govt. of India, Apl., 1937.

MENON, P. K. RAMUNNI (see Ramunni).

MENON, PARAKAT MADHAVA, Indian C.S. (under-secty. to govt. of India, dept. of lab.) (b. 7th Jan., 1906).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Feb., 1932; under secty. to govt. (p.w.d.), Madras, Jan., 1937; attd. govt. of India, lab. dept., Aug., 1938; under secty. to govt. of India, dept. of lab., Dec., 1938.

MENON, THARAVANAT ACHUTHA, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 4th Jan., 1911).—Educ. at the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 23rd Nov., 1936; arrived in India, Dec., 1936, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1938.

MENON, TOTTAKAT NARAYARA, B.A., Office of the High Commr. for India (exec. officer, accts. dept.) (b. 6th Oct., 1896).—Apptd. to office of High Commr., for India, Aug., 1924; actg. exec. officer, April, 1926; confd., Oct., 1930.

MENON, VADAKKE KURAPATH ROMUNI, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 29th Aug., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of Madras and Christ's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 19th Oct., 1926; arrived 22nd Nov., 1926, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secty. to govt., fin. dept., B. and O., Oct., 1931; offg. secty. to govt., ditto, July, 1933; offg. mag. and collr., Apl., 1934; offg. secty. to govt., local self govt., dept., Apl., 1936.

MENON, VAPAL PANGUNNI, Rao Bahadur (Dep. Secty. to the Govt. of India, Reforms Office) (b. 30th Sept., 1894).—Joined the service, 8th Sept., 1914; asst. secty., Govt. of India, Reforms Office, Jan., 1933; under secty., ditto, Sept., 1934; dep. secty., ditto, Sept., 1936; jt. secty., ditto, June, 1938, to Oct., 1938; dep. secty., ditto, Oct., 1938.

MERCER, CHARLES VICTOR, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 10th Feb., 1887).—Joined the service as supt. of catering and advertising, Burma Rlys., 13th Mar., 1922; retd., Mar., 1935.

MERCHANT, FRAMROZ RUSTOMJI, F.S.A.A., Income Tax Dept., Bihar and Orissa (asst. commr. of Income Tax) (b. 12th Nov., 1888).—Joined the service, 1st July, 1922, as income tax officer, Bombay; offg. asst. commr. of income tax, July, 1928; confd., Oct., 1929; offg. commr. of income tax, Dec., 1932, and again, May, 1934; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, March, 1939.

MEREDITH, HERBERT RIBTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bihar) (b. 8th April, 1890).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 17th Dec., 1914, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Sept., 1922; offg. dist. and sessions judge, Jan., 1923; addl. ditto, April, 1925; offg. judl. commr., Mar., 1929; dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1931; offg. regr., high ct., Patna, Apl., 1932; offg. secty. to govt., judl. dept., Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1934; regr., high ct., Patna, Nov., 1934.

MERRELLS, GEORGE LUEN, B.A., Burma C.S. (Cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 14th Dec., 1915).—Educ. at Colfe's Grammar Sch., Lewisham and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn. 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 6th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Nov., 1938, and served as asst. commr.

MERRIMAN, JOHN LONGSHAW, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 26th Dec., 1886).—Educ. at Marlborough, Worcester Coll., Oxford, and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 18th Nov., 1911, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1919; mag. and

collr., Feb., 1926; manager, Betti h Wards estate, Nov., 1929; dep. commr Ranchi, Oct., 1935; commr., Oct., 1937; retd., June, 1939.

MERRINGTON, HERBERT FAGENT, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 5th May, 1904).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, 17th Oct., 1927; exec. engr., Oct., 1936.

MERSH, CHARLES MELMOTH BAILEY, M.B.E., (b. 25th Oct., 1884).—Apptd. electrical adviser to govt., Central Provs., 27th Sept., 1920; M.B.E., June, 1939; retd., Oct. 1939.

MESTON, OF AGRA AND DUNOTTAR, Baron, JAMES SCORGIE MESTON, K.C.S.I., LL.D., V.D., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Gr. Sch. and Univ. of Aberdeen, and at Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1883; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1885, and served in the N.W. Prov. and Oudh as asst. mag. and collr., and asst. commr.; joint mag., May, 1890; settlt. offr., April, 1892; dep. commr., Nov., 1896; dir. of land records and agriculture, April, 1897; sec. to govt., March, 1899, to June, 1903; mag. and coll., March, 1899; member, legisl. council, March, 1899, and March, 1901; lent to govt. of Cape of Good Hope from Jan., 1905; offg. sec. to govt. of India, fin. dept., July, 1906; joint sec. to govt. of India, fin. dept. (mil. fin. branch), April, 1907; C.S.I., June, 1908; temp. member of council of govt., fin. dept., July to Nov., 1908; sec. to govt. of India, fin. dept. (ord. branch), Nov., 1909; K.C.S.I., Dec., 1911; Lt.-govr., United Provs., 15th Sept., 1912; on deput. to assist the Secretary of State at the meetings of the Imperial War Cabinet, and member of the Imperial War Conference, Feb. to June, 1917; resigned office of Lt.-govr., United Provs., 15th Feb., 1918; member of the Viceroy's council, in charge of finance dept., from 2nd Nov., 1918; retd., Nov., 1919; created Baron, Nov., 1919.

METCALFE, SIR HERBERT AUBREY FRANCIS, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., M.V.O., B.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 27th Sept., 1883).—Educ. at Charterhouse, and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrived, 24th Nov., 1908, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; personal asst. to pol. agent, Phulkian States and Bahawalpur, April, 1911; transf. to Delhi as sec., munpl. cttee., Nov., 1912; asst. pte. sec. to Viceroy, March, 1914; and asst. sec. to the chief commr., N.W. Frontier Prov. (temp.), Mar., 1917; city magte., Peshawar, May, 1917; asst. commr., Charsadda, Feb., 1919; pte. sec. to chief commr., N.W. Frontier Prov., May, 1919; sec. to ditto, Dec., 1920; asst. commr., Thal, April, 1922; M.V.O., June, 1922; counsellor, Kabul legation Nov., 1924; pol. agent. Dir. Swat and Chitral, Nov., 1925; sec. to ch. commr. and agent to govt. genl. in N.W.F.P., Mar., 1927; C.I.E., June, 1928; dep. commr., Peshawar, Nov., 1928; offg. dep. secty., for. and pol. dept., govt. of India, Nov., 1930; confd., May, 1931; offg. for secty., ditto, May, 1932; confd., Jan., 1933; C.S.I., June, 1933; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1936; secty. external affairs dept., Govt. of India, Apl., 1937; A.G.G., resdt. and ch. commr. in Baluchistan, Aug., 1939.

METCALFE, ROY DOUGLAS, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 9th Feb., 1909).—First Commn., 31st Jan., 1929; Pers. Asst. to Pol. Res. in Persian Gulf, Dec., 1934; Asst. Pol. Agent, Bahrain, Apr., 1935; under

trng. in Punjab, Nov., 1935; Under Sec. to Res. for Central India, Sept., 1938; confd. in Indian Political Service, May, 1939.

MEYER, ERNEST ALEXANDER, late Survey of India (b. 11th Oct., 1880).—Joined the service, 1st Feb., 1902; extra asst. supt., Aug., 1909; supt., May, 1921; retd., Oct., 1935.

MEYER, P. M. ROSE (see Rose Meyer, P.M.).

MEYLER, REV. EDWARD MOWBRAY, B.A., late Indian Eccles. Estabt. (United Provs.) (b. 26th Nov., 1876).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 26th Nov., 1908; junr. chaplain, Nov., 1911; senr. chaplain, Nov., 1921; retd., Jan., 1930.

MIAN, MUHAMMAD TASDIQUE HUSSAIN, M.Sc. (Punj.), Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr. (Central Provs.) (b. 1st June, 1905).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Central Provs., 5th Nov., 1929; dep. consvr., Nov., 1934.

MIDDLETON, ARTHUR PURLING, B.A., Indian C.S. (commr., Bihar) (b. 14th Oct., 1884).—Educ. at Eton, and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 25th Nov., 1909, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; under-sec. to govt., rev. and judl. depts., Feb., 1916; jt. mag. and dep. collr., June, 1918; mag. and collr., Oct., 1922; commr. of income tax, Bihar and Orissa, April, 1923; offg. commr., Apl., 1929; and again, Jan., 1932; confd., Jan., 1933.

MIDDLETON, LEONARD, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th March, 1884).—Educ. at Dulwich Coll., and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrived, 30th Nov., 1908, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; personal asst. to pol. agent, Phulkian States, Feb., 1914; guardian to H.H. the Raja of Faridkot, Dec., 1914; settlt. offr., Aug., 1915, to Feb., 1919; supt. of census operations, Punjab, March, 1920; dist. and sess. judge (provl.), Feb., 1924; confd., April, 1924; settlt. officer, Kashmir State, May, 1924; dist. and sess. judge, Delhi, Dec., 1928, to Jan., 1931; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, pol. dept., Nov., 1931; judl. commr., N.W.F.P., Mar., 1933, to Apl., 1937; retd., Aug., 1939.

MIDDLETON, WILLIAM EDWARD, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 2nd Oct., 1907).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Madras, 5th Mar., 1929; confd., Aug., 1931; offg. dist. supt., June, 1934.

MIDGLEY, ERIC ATKINSON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 25th March, 1913); educ. at Christ's Hospital, Horsham, and Merton Coll., Oxford; joined the service 15th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

MILLAR, GEORGE MCGREGOR, O.B.E., M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 12th Sept., 1880).—First commn. 1st Sept., 1906; O.B.E., Jan., 1919; in milty. employ to 12th Feb., 1922; offg. legation surg., Kabul, Feb., 1922; agency surg., ditto, Oct., 1924; resdy. surg., Mewar, March, 1926; civil surg., Peshawar, Jan., 1927; C.M.O., N.W.F.P., March, 1927; civil surg., Ajmer and C.M.O., Rajputana, Apl., 1929; retd., Feb., 1933; K.-I.-H. medal, 1st class, Feb., 1937.

MILLARD, CLIVE NEWCOME, B.A., Bombay Civil Service (dep. collr.) (b. 9th Aug., 1891).—Joined the service as dep. collr., 22nd Aug., 1916; offg. collr. and dist. magte., Apl., 1929.

MILLER, ALFRED, M.B., Lieut.-Col. I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 29th Apr., 1869).—First commn. dated 20th July, 1866; in mil. employ to Dec., 1901; held various offg. appts in Madras to Oct., 1903, when he was apptd. dist. medl. and san. offr.; chemical examr., July, 1911, and prof. of chem., Madras Med. Coll.; examr. of medical stores, India store depot, Dec., 1920-May, 1932.

MILLER, ARTHUR CONGREVE, O.B.E., M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 24th Jan., 1877).—Joined the service, 28th July, 1911; educ. inspr., March, 1922; O.B.E., June, 1924; offg. dep. dir. of public instrn., March, 1925; offg. inspr. of European school., Bombay presdy., March, 1926; confd., Jan., 1927; educ. inspr. in Sind, Sept., 1929; prinpl., Raj Kumar coll., Rajkot, Nov., 1930; ret'd., Jan., 1932.

MILLER, GEORGE WESLEY, M.D., D.P.H., Capt., I.M.S. (Port Health Officer, Bombay) (b. 23rd Apr., 1904).—First commn. dated 4th Aug., 1931; in mil. employ to 7th Feb., 1938; civil surg., Chhindwara, Feb., 1938; port health officer, Bombay, July, 1939.

MILLER, HAROLD BELLETT, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 4th May, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, 28th Feb., 1921; offg. supt., rly. police, May, 1927; supt., Nov., 1931.

MILLER, Sir JOHN ONTARIO, K.C.S.I., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at King's Coll., Aberdeen; apptd. after exam. of 1877; arrived, 8th Dec., 1879, and served in the N.W. Prov. and Oudh as asst. commr., and asst. mag. and collr.; asst. sec. to govt., Jan., 1883; under sec., May, 1884; private sec. to lieut.-govr., 1886-87; settl. officer, Oct., 1888; dir. of land records and agric., March, 1892; dep. commr., Nov., 1895; mag. and collr., Dec., 1895; offd. as jud. sec. and as fin. sec. to govt. N.W.P. and O., from Aug., 1895; chief sec. to govt., Nov., 1898; C.S.I., Jan., 1901; sec. to govt. of India, rev. and agri. dept., Oct., 1902; private sec. to viceroy, Dec., 1903, to Nov., 1904; presdt., Indian Survey Committee, Nov., 1904; chief commr., Central Provs., May, 1905; member of the govr.-gen.'s council, P.W.D., March, 1907; ret'd., Sept., 1911; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1911; author of the Muzaffarnagar settl. report.

MILLER, Sir THOMAS FREDERIC DAWSON, Kt., K.C., Barr., late Judl. Dept., Bihar and Orissa.—Educ. at Durham Sch. and Trinity Coll., Oxford; called to the Bar (Inner Temple), 1891; K.C., 1912; apptd. chief justice, Patna high ct., Oct., 1917; Kt., Jan., 1918; ret'd., April, 1928.

MILLER-BROWNLIE, THOMAS ARCHIBALD, C.E., M.I.W.E., M.I.M. and C.E., late Agric. Dept., Punjab (b. 24th June, 1879).—Joined the service as agric. engr., Feb., 1915; prin., Punjab agric. coll., May, 1925; agricl. engr. to govt. Punjab, July, 1929; ret'd., June, 1934.

MILLETT, HUMPHREY JOHN CURNOW, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 29th June, 1897).—Joined the service, 21st Jan., 1921, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Jan., 1925.

MILLS, JAMES PHILIP, B.A., Indian C.S. (secty. to the govr., Assam) (b. 18th Feb., 1890).—Educ. at Winchester Coll., and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; apptd. after the exam. of 1912; arrived, 10th Dec., 1913, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1924; and again, Mar., 1930; confd., Aug., 1932;

officer on spl. duty, reforms officer, Nov., 1935; secty. to the govr., Apr., 1937.

MILLS, PERCY STRICKLAND, C.I.E., M.B., Col., I.M.S., Civil Med. Dept., Bihar (surg.-genl. with govt. of Bengal) (b. 28th May, 1883).—First commn. dated 1st Feb., 1906; in mil. employ to 6th June, 1911; plague medl. off., June, 1911; on mil. duty from Aug., 1914, to May, 1921; civil surg., March, 1922; offg. inspr. genl. of civil hosp., Bihar and Orissa, May, 1935; confd., Aug., 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1938; surg.-genl. with govt. of Bengal, Nov., 1937.

MILLS, SEYMOUR HERBERT HATTEN, late Indian Police (b. 3rd Feb., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Dec., 1914; awarded King's police medal, 1920; asst. to dir. of intell. bureau, home dept., govt. of India, Oct., 1925; dep. commr., Calcutta, Jan., 1927; on deputation to Nizam's govt., June, 1928, to Feb., 1930; ret'd., Feb., 1933.

MILNE, DAVID, C.I.E., B.Sc. (Aberd.), late Indian Agric. Service (b. 9th May, 1876).—Joined the service as economic botanist, Punjab, 7th Nov., 1907; princl., Punjab agric. coll., Feb., 1921; offg. dir. of agricl., Punjab, Oct., 1922; confd., May, 1925; C.I.E., Jan., 1927; offg. agric. expert to impl. council of agric. research, Apr., 1933; ret'd., May, 1933.

MILNE, ERIC IVAN, Indian State Railways (dist. traffic supt., Burma Rlys.) (b. 20th Mar., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 2nd Jan., 1920; dist. traffic supt., Burma rlys., Dec., 1930; offg. dep. traffic manager, Aug., 1932.

MILNE, ROBERT BLAIR, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 7th March, 1882).—Educ. at Robert Gordon's Coll., and the Univ., Aberdeen; apptd. after exam. of 1904; arrived, 24th Nov., 1905, and served in Bombay and Sind as asst. collr. and asst. judge; offg. under sec. to govt., pol. judl. and spl. depts., April to May, 1915; asst. remembr. of legal affairs, and ex-officio sec. to govr.'s legal dept. (temp.), May, 1919; offg. judge and sess. judge, Jan., 1923; offg. jt. sec., govt. of India, legisl. dept., Nov., 1924; dist. and sess. judge, June, 1925; offg. addl. judl. commr. of Sind, July, 1928; confd., Nov., 1930; ret'd., Apr., 1934.

MILNER, CHARLES EDWARD, Indian Forest Service (consvr., Burma) (b. 17th Sept., 1887).—Arrived, 18th Dec., 1909, and served as asst. commr.; dep. commr., Dec., 1914; on mil. service, May, 1915, to Feb., 1919; offg. consvr., April, 1926; confd., Sept., 1933.

MILNER-WHITE, RUDOLPH, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th Nov., 1885).—Educ. at Harrow Sch., and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 28th Nov., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; spl. manager, Awah estate, Aug., 1915, to Nov., 1917; chairman, improvement trust, Cawnpore, May, 1920; jt. mag., acting dep. commr., Jan., 1923; actg. dep. sec. to govt., U.P., Oct., 1923; mag. and collr. (provl. sub.), Aug., 1926; confd., Jan., 1927; ret'd., Oct., 1935.

MILSOM, ERNEST, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 5th April, 1885).—Educ. at Wakefield Gr. Sch., and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 27th Nov., 1909, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt. of

Bengal, genl. dept., Nov., 1913; ditto, finl. dept., April, 1914; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Nov., 1915; dist. and sessions judge, March, 1923; ret'd., Feb., 1931.

MILTON, HENRY JOSEPH, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 21st Dec., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 28th Nov., 1922; offg. supt., Mar., 1930; confd., June, 1934.

MILTON, RALPH STANLEY, Indian Police (supt., Madras) (b. 13th Apl., 1889).—Joined the service, 23rd Nov., 1909; asst. supt., May, 1911; supt., July, 1922; comr. of police, Bangalore, Mar., 1935.

MIN, MAUNG KYAW, M.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (secty. to the Premier, Burma) (b. 15th Nov., 1899).—Educ. at St. Xavier's Coll., Calcutta, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1923, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt., fin. dept., Oct., 1927; offg. dep. commr., May, 1931; dep. secty., educn. dept., Burma, June, 1936; secty., ditto, Oct., 1936; dep. secty. to govt., Burma, Dec., 1936; secty., fin. dept., Burma, Jan., 1937; secty. to the Premier, Sept., 1937.

MINCHIN, ALFRED ALYSON FENNELL, Indian Forest Service (b. 25th Aug., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Dec. 1908; dep. consvr., Jan. 1914; offg. consvr., Madras, May, 1925; confd., June, 1928.

MINHAJ-UD-DIN, KHAN BAHADUR, SHAIKH, B.A., A.M.I.E. (Ind.), Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 7th June, 1889).—Joined the service, 21st Sept., 1912; asst. engr., Sept., 1913; exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. suptg. engr., Oct., 1933.

MINISTER, CYRIL JOHN, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 31st Oct., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; offg. supt., June, 1924; confd., Sept., 1930.

MINNITT, G. C., A.M.I.C.E., M.I. Struct. E., Indian State Ry's. (sanitary engr., G.I.P. Ry.) (b. 10th May, 1887).—Joined the service as resdt. engr., G.I.P. Ry., 14th Mar., 1905; sanitary engr., May, 1932.

MINSHULL, WILLIAM TRAVERS, B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 31st Dec., 1884).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1908; exec. engr., Oct., 1916; in mil. emp. from 5th Sept., 1918, to 23rd Jan., 1919; exec. engr., Feb., 1919; p.a. to chief engr. and under secty., I.B., Mar., 1934; ret'd., March, 1939.

MINSON, HERBERT, M.B.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 14th Nov., 1886).—Educ. at City of London Sch., and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 25th Nov., 1911, and served in the United Prov. as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt., Jan., 1919; M.B.E., June, 1919; jt. mag., July, 1920; services placed at disposal of Govt. of India, fin. dept., from Oct., 1920; acctnt.-genl., Punjab, Aug., 1921; ditto, Central Provs., Nov., 1921; services replaced at disposal of govt. of United Provs., Oct., 1923; actg. dep. commr., Oct., 1923; offg. mag. and collr., March, 1925; confd., May, 1928; ret'd., May, 1937.

MIR AMIR-UD-DIN, B.A., LL.B., Judicial dept., Madras (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 7th Dec., 1889).—Joined the service as offg. and asst. registrar, high ct., origl. side, 20th Feb.,

1917; confd., Apl., 1917; 1st asst. ditto, Apl., 1921; dep. registrar, appellate side, Aug., 1922; offg. dist. judge, Sept., 1926; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1928.

MIRAJKAR, VAMAN RAGHUNATH, O.B.E., F.R.C.S., M.R.C.P., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (prof'r., King Edward medl. coll., Lahore) (b. 13th Oct., 1887).—First commn. dated 15th March, 1920; in milty. employ. to 28th June, 1926; prof'r., King Edward Medl. Coll., Lahore, June, 1926; O.B.E., Nov., 1935.

MIRAMS, ARTHUR EDWARD, F.S.I., F.S.A.—(b. 1st June, 1875).—Apptd. consulting surveyor to govt., Bombay, 30th Jan., 1914; ret'd., June, 1930.

MIRCHANDANI, BHAGWANDAS DAYARAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. coll., Bombay) (b. 25th Feb., 1906).—Educ. at University of Bombay and School of Oriental Studies, London joined the service 11th Oct., 1929; arrived Nov., 1929, and served in Bombay as asst. coll.

MIRCHANDANI, TNAUMAL SHEWAKRAM, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. exec. engr., Sind) (b. 3rd Mar., 1888).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1911; exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. suptg. engr., variously from Mar., 1925; confd., Dec., 1937.

MIRCHANDANI, TOLARAM JETHANAND, M.Sc. (Lond.), A.M.I.E.E. (exec. engr.), Electricity Dept., Madras. (b. 1st Oct., 1896).—Engaged on contract as pers. asst. to the chief engr. for electricity from 1st Sept., 1931; confd., as exec. engr., Sept., 1933.

MIRCHANDANI, UDHARAM MANIRAM, Indian C.S. (collr., Sind) (b. 26th Sept., 1896).—Educ. at St. Patrick's High School, Karachi, and Trinity Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 14th Dec., 1921; arrived, 23rd Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Oct., 1927; offg. dep. secty. to govt., finance dept., Bombay, Feb., 1932; collr., Sind, Mar., 1936.

MIR SAEED ALAM KHAN, NAWABZADA, Barr., Indian Political Service. (b. 28th Dec., 1892).—Joined the service, 15th Oct., 1923; asst. to A.G.G., Madras States, July, 1928; asst. commr., Peshawar, Nov., 1930; ditto, Bannu, Apl., 1931; offg. under-secty. to A.G.G., Punjab States, Apl., 1933; under secty. to A.G.G., States of W.I., Aug., 1934; addl. pol. agent, Sabar Kantha agency, Jan., 1936; under-secty. to A.G.G., states of W.I., May, 1936; guardian and comp. to heir apparent of H.H. the Maharaja Morvi, Nov., 1936; secty. to resdt. for Kolhapur and the Deccan States, May, 1938; senior sub-judge, Peshawar, April, 1939.

MIRZA, SAHIBZADA HARUN QADIR SAHYID MUSA ALI, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 4th Nov., 1882).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1905; exec. engr., May, 1914; offg. suptg. engr., May, 1931; confd., Nov., 1934; ret'd., Nov., 1937.

MIRZA, SAHIBZADA SYED ISKANDAR ALI (see Syed Iskandar Ali Mirza, S.).

MIRZA, SYDNEY J., B.A., LL.B., Income Tax Dept., Bombay (asst. commr. of income tax, Sind) (b. 21st Apl., 1886).—Joined the service, 27th Nov., 1912; inc. tax officer, Feb., 1924; spl. inspecting officer, May, 1926; offg. asst. commr. of income tax, Sind, March, 1928; confd., Oct., 1929.

MISBAHULOSMAN, SYED, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., late Central Provs. C.S. (b. Nov., 1877).—Joined the service, 29th Jan., 1901; extra asst. commr., Jan., 1908; dep. registrar, co-op. societies, Sept., 1919; dep. commr. and senr. dep. registrar, ditto, May, 1927; ret'd., Nov., 1932.

MISRA, KRUPA SINDHU, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provinces) (b. 22nd July, 1908).—Educated at the Patna University and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 7th October, 1932; arrived in India, November, 1932, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte., Apl., 1935.

MISRA, LAKSHMIPATI, B.Sc., Indian State Ryls. (dep. chief engr.) (b. 4th July, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 9th Oct., 1912; offg. exec. engr., O. and R. Ry., Dec., 1918; services lent to Baroda State as engr.-in-chief, Baroda State Ryls., from April, 1924; exec. engr., E.I. Ry., April, 1928; offg. contr. of stores, Nov., 1930; offg. dep. agent., June, 1932; confd., Nov., 1932; offg. divl. supt., May, 1935; confd., Jan., 1936; dep. chief engr. (provl. perm.), Apl., 1936.

MISRA, SHARAD CHANDRA, M.A., Indian Police (b. 7th Apl., 1910).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 25th Jan., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935.

MISRA, SHAM BIHARI (see Sham Bihari M.).

MISRA, TIKA RAM (see Tika, R. M.).

MITCHELL, ALAN ALEXANDER McCASKILL, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (commr., Punjab) (b. 24th Nov., 1882).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch. and St. Peter's Coll., Cambridge; arrived, 26th, Nov., 1906, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; manager, Bashahr State, March, 1914; supt., Simla Hill States, Aug., 1917; under-sec. to govt., Punjab, April to May, 1919; dep. commr., June, 1922; offg. commr. of income tax, Punjab, Nov., 1924; secty. to govt., Punjab, transferred depts., Dec., 1928; offg. commr., May, 1932; and again, Mar., 1933. C.I.E., Jan., 1936; confd., May, 1936.

MITCHELL, ALEXANDER, V.D., M.D., late Indian State Ryls. (b. 19th Jan., 1888).—Joined the service as dist. surg., 13th Jan., 1920; dist. medl. officer, E.I. Ry., Apl., 1929; ret'd., Apl., 1938.

MITCHELL, ALFRED NORVAL, Indian C.S. Indian Pol. Service (b. 18th Dec., 1906).—Educ. at Shrewsbury School, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Central Provs., as asst. commr.; offg. under-secty. to govt., C.P., Oct., 1933; under-secty. to govt., N.W.F.P., Feb., 1936; offg. ch. secty., ditto, June, 1936; home secty. to govt., N.W.F.P., Apl., 1937; confd., Feb., 1938; asst. pol. agent, S. Waziristan, Oct., 1938.

MITCHELL, Sir DAVID GEORGE, K.C.I.E., C.S.I., V.D., B.Sc., late Indian C.S. (b. 31st Mar., 1879).—Educ. at George Heriot's Sch., Edin. and Edinburgh Univ.; apptd. after exam. of 1902; arrived, 30th Nov., 1903, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; dist. supt. of

pol., July, 1909; asst. commr., and addl. dist. and sess. judge, April, 1913; dist. judge, Nov., 1916; dist. and sess. judge, May, 1917; legal rembr., sec. to legisl. council and sec. to govt., legal dept., March, 1919; C.I.E., June, 1923; addl. judl. commr., June, 1926; offg. jt. sec. and draftsman, legisl. dept., govt. of India, April, 1927; confd., Apl., 1930; C.S.I., June, 1932; offg. secty., govt. of India, legis. dept., Dec., 1932; secty., govt. of India, dept. of industries and labour, Oct., 1933; offg. member, govt. genl.'s exec. council, June, 1935; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1936; ret'd., July, 1937.

MITCHELL, DAVID THOMAS, O.B.E., Veterinary dept., Burma (dir. of vety. services) (b. 16th Mar., 1885).—Apptd. research officer, 10th Dec., 1927; dir. of vety. services, Jan., 1930; O.B.E., June, 1939.

MITCHELL, HAROLD CHARLES, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 7th Mar., 1896).—Joined the service, 21st March, 1920; offg. supt., May, 1923; supt. (provl. sub.), July, 1930; confd., July, 1931; asst. to dep. inspr. genl., C.I.D., U.P., Oct., 1932; cent. intell. offr. U.P., and Ajmere, Jan., 1937.

MITCHELL, HAROLD CHARLES BARNES late Bombay Judl. Dept. (b. 18th Oct., 1883).—Joined the dept., 11th Feb., 1919; admtr. gen. and offl. trustee and regr. of companies, March, 1922; member, legis. council, Mar., 1932; ret'd., Sept., 1936.

MITCHELL, Rev. JAMES DONALD, M.A., B.D., late Indian Eccles. Estabt. (b. 17th Aug., 1875).—Joined, 1st Aug., 1907; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1909; presdy. senr. chaplain, ch. of Scotland, March, 1925; ret'd., Feb., 1931.

MITCHELL, JOHN EBENEZER MILLER, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 27th Mar., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 11th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., Dec., 1924; chief for. offr., Coorg, Aug., 1933.

MITCHELL, JOHN FOWLER, C.I.E., B.Sc., late Indian C.S. (b. 30th Dec., 1886).—Educ. at Allan Glen's Schl., Glasgow, Royal Coll. of Science, London, Glasgow, and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 28th Nov., 1910, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; transf. to Delhi, Oct., 1912; reverted to the Punjab, Jan., 1914; under-sec. to govt. of Punjab, fin. dept. (s.p.t.), Oct., 1920; offg. dep. sec. to govt. of India, fin. dept., May, 1922; offg. acctnt. gen., Madras, Jan., 1924; acct.-genl., Central Provs., Oct., 1926; dir. of audit, United Provs., Nov., 1928; offg. dir. of rly. audit, Dec., 1930; offg. dep. auditor-genl. in India, Apl., 1934; C.I.E., June, 1935; ret'd., Mar., 1937.

MITCHELL, KENNETH GRANT, C.I.E., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (consulting engr. to govt. of India [roads]) (b. 28th Aug., 1885).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1909; exec. engr., Oct., 1917; road engr. (tempy.) to govt. of India, May, 1930; C.I.E., Jan., 1934; consulting engr. to govt. of India (roads), Mar., 1934, and again, Sept., 1938; suptg. engr., May, 1935; member, council of State, Mar., 1937; on spec. duty, commn. dept., June, 1938.

MITRA, AKHIL CHANDRA (see Akhil, C. M.).

MITRA, ANADI NATH, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 18th Nov. 1883).—Trained at Thomson C.E. Coll.; joined the service, 23rd Sept., 1906; asst. engr., Sept., 1907; under sec. to govt., Public Works (irrig. and trys.) dept., Jan., 1914, to Jan., 1917; exec. engr., Sept., 1915; retd., Nov., 1933.

MITRA, BIRENDRA MOHAN, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 28th Aug., 1899).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Magdalen Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 4th Dec., 1923, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. magte. and collr., Mar., 1929; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1932; ditto, Assam, Oct., 1933; addl. ditto, Oct., 1932; confd. as dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1936.

MITRA, BIRENDRA NATH, B.A., late Indian Fin. Dept. (b. 29th Aug., 1883).—Joined the service as asst. examr. of accts., public wks. dept., 13th Aug., 1903; dep. examr., Jan., 1907; asst. auditor, E. Ben. Rly., June, 1918; govt. examiner, E.I. & B.N. Rys., Mar., 1920; dep. acctnt.-gen., posts and tels., Calcutta, Mar., 1922; offg. audit offr., Lloyd Barrage project, Karachi, Apl., 1926; offg. dep. auditor, N.W. Rly., Dec., 1926; on spl. duty with acct.-genl. (rlys.), Feb., 1928-July, 1929; offg. acct.-genl., Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1929; offg. ch. auditor, E.B. Rly., Feb., 1930; ditto, E.I. Rly., Mar., 1931; confd., Nov., 1932; dir., rly. audit, Nov., 1933; and again, Oct., 1934; offg. contr., rly. accts., Apl., 1934; dir. of rly. audit, Oct., 1934; retd., Feb., 1939.

MITRA, DHIRENDRA NATH, C.B.E., B.A., B.L., Legis. Dept., apptd. solicitor to the Govt. of India, April, 1937; C.B.E., June, 1939.

MITRA, HIMANSHU MOHAN, B.Sc., Dept. of Mines in India (b. 31st Mar., 1884).—Joined the service as electric inspr., 1st May, 1924.

MITRA, MANMATHA NATH (see Manmatha, N. M.)

MITRA, MONORANJAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Assam) (b. 1st Aug., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. Coll. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 8th Dec., 1923, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; offg. addl. dist. magte., Oct., 1931; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1933; confd., Nov., 1938.

MITRA, MUNINDRA KUMAR, M.A., late Indian Fin. Dept. (b. 12th May, 1877).—Joined the service, 8th Aug., 1898, as asst. examr.; dep. examr., Jan., 1902; examr., Aug., 1908; ditto, and asst. acctnt.-gen., Bengal, March, 1914; dep. acctnt.-gen., Bengal, March, 1915; asst. compt.-gen., May, 1918; dep. acctnt.-gen., Dec., 1922; on special duty in finl. dept. as temp. acctnt.-gen. from Nov., 1923; offg. chief auditor, E.I. Rly., Dec., 1925; offg. acctnt.-gen., rlys., June, 1926; offg. chief auditor, E.I. Rly., Nov., 1926; confd. Oct., 1927; offg. acct.-genl. (rlys.), Aug., 1928; ch. auditor, N.W. Rly., Apl., 1929; offg. contr. of rly. accts., Jan., 1930; retd., Nov., 1932.

MITRA, NARENDRA KUMAR, B.Sc., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.I. rly.) (b. 4th Sept., 1887).—Joined the service, 1st Apl., 1913; resdt. engr., Nov., 1921; exec. engr., Aug., 1927; provl. perm. dep. ch. engr., May, 1939.

MITRA, PHANINDRA NATH, C.I.E., B.A., late Indian Posts and Telegraphs (b. 12th July, 1881).—Joined the service as apprentice asst. supt., 2nd Nov., 1903; asst. supt., Jan., 1905; asst. postmaster-genl. tel. traffic, U.P. circle, Oct., 1914; on deputation to Kashmir State as supt., State Tel. Dept., from July, 1914, to Apl., 1917; dep. postmaster-genl., April 1917; supt., Bombay C.T.O., Dec., 1920; asst. dir.-genl., traffic, April, 1921; on depn. to internl. tele. conference, Paris, Aug., 1925; ditto, to internl. radio conference, Washington, Aug., 1927; ditto to tele. conference, Brussels, Aug., 1928; contr. tele. traffic, May, 1929; offg. contr. of tele. stores, Feb., 1930; dir. tel. engrg., June, 1931; offg. p.m.g., central circle, Sept., 1932; and again, Apl., 1934; C.I.E., Jan., 1935; confd. as p.m.g., Sept., 1934; offg. ch. engr., posts and tels., Apl., 1935; and again, Feb., 1936; offg. dep. dir.-genl., tels., Dec., 1935; retd., Aug., 1936.

MITRA, PRAN KUMAR, Indian Police (supr., Bihar) (b. 15th Oct., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 8th Dec., 1924; offg. supt., Apl., 1932; and again, Mar., 1933; confd., May, 1937.

MITRA, RABINDRA KUMAR, B.A. (Cal.), Barr. Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. coll., Bengal) (b. 15th Dec., 1904).—Educ. at University of Calcutta, University Coll., London, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and coll.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1931; offg. addl. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1936.

MITRA, ROOPENDRA KUMAR, Judl. Dept., Bengal (judge, high ct.).—Apptd. offg. judge, high ct., Calcutta, 31st July, 1934; addl. judge, ditto, Nov., 1934 and Aug., 1936; high ct. judge, Bengal, Nov., 1937.

MITRA, SAMARENDRA LAL, M.B., B.Sc., D.T.M. & H., D.P.H., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Public Health dept., Bihar (dir., public health) (b. 23rd Dec., 1887).—First commn. dated 1st Nov., 1920; in mil. employ prior to 5th Sept., 1925; offg. dir. of public health, Sept., 1925, offg. dir. of public health, Assam, Mar. to Nov., 1929; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1930; and again, Feb., 1933; dir. of public health, Bihar, Feb., 1937.

MITRA, SARAT CHANDRA, late Indian Posts and Tels. (b. 23rd Oct., 1882).—Joined the service, 13th Oct., 1905; asst. supt., Apl., 1907; contr. tel. traffic, Dec., 1925; asst. dir.-genl., Mar., 1927; dep. postmaster-genl., traffic, central circle, Oct., 1927; offg. contr., tele. traffic, Feb., 1930; offg. dir. of tel. engrg., U.P. circle, Mar., 1931, and again, May, 1933; ditto, Madras, Jan., 1934; confd., Sept., 1934; offg. p.m.g., Madras, Mar., 1935; and again, Sept., 1936; dir., tels., Madras, Apl., 1935; p.m.g., June, 1937; retd., Oct., 1937.

MITRA, SATIS CHANDRA, Judicial Dept., Bengal (b. 9th Sept., 1870).—Joined the service as asst. master and offl. referee, 16th Jan., 1903; offg. registrar in insolvency, May, 1921; confd., Nov., 1921; offg. regr., high ct., July, 1923, Nov., 1923, March, 1924, and again April, 1927.

MITRA, SATISH CHANDRA, Barr., late Judicial Dept., Bengal (B. 10th Jan., 1880).—Joined the service as asst. regr., high ct., origl. side, 20th Dec., 1909; registrar, Feb., 1920; judge, small cause ct., Oct., 1920; retd., Jan., 1935.

MITRA, S. K., M.S. (Cal.), Ph.D. (Ohio), Indian Agricl. Service (dir. of agric.) (b. 15th Feb., 1887).—Joined the service as economic botanist, Assam, 28th Feb., 1921; dir. of agric., Assam, Sep., 1937.

MITRA, SATYENDRA NATH, M.B., Ch.B., D.F.N. (asst. dir. of public health, Bengal) (b. 11th Nov., 1889).—Apptd. asst. dir. of public health, 3th Sept., 1920; confd., Sept., 1925.

MITRA, SHAILENDRA NATH, B.Sc., Indian Civil Service (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 17th Jan., 1909).—Educ. at Government High School, Partabgarh, Government Intermediate College, Fyzabad, Allahabad University, Imperial College of Science, London, and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service 7th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bengal as asst. collr. and mag.

MITRA, TINCORI, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. Jan., 1900).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 19th Dec., 1923; asst. exec., engr., Dec., 1925; offg. exec. engr., June, 1929; confd., Dec., 1934.

MITTER, Sir BROJENDRA LAL, K.C.S.I., Barr. (fed. adv.-genl.).—Apptd. advocate-general, Bengal, Dec., 1925; Kt., Jan., 1928; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, Dec., 1928; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1932; delegate of India at Assembly of League of Nations, 1933; member, govr.'s exec. council, Bengal, May, 1934; fed. advocate-general, Apl., 1937.

MITTER, DWARKA NATH, late Judicial dept., Bengal.—Apptd. addl. judge, high ct., Nov., 1926; judge, ditto, Sept., 1929; retd., Mar., 1937.

MITTER, GANESH CHANDRA, O.B.E., M.Sc., M.I.M. (mint and Assay Dept. (ch. assayer, Bombay) (b. 1st Aug., 1897).—Joined the service as dep. assay master on probn., 28th Mar., 1922; confd., Feb., 1923; offg. assay master, Bombay, Aug., 1927; ch. assayer, Apl., 1932; O.B.E., Jan., 1939.

MITTER, MOHAN LALL, M.I.L.E., Indian State Railways (Transpn. (Power) Supt., senr. scale, E.I. Rly.) (b. 3rd May, 1899).—Asst. loco. supt., 15th Aug., 1924; Supt. (power) senr. scale, July, 1936.

MITTER, S. C., B.Sc., (Eng.) Lond. (dir. of indus., Bengal) (b. 10th Dec., 1900).—Joined the service as indus. engr. 9th Oct., 1925; dep. dir. of indus. Bengal, Aug., 1934; dir. ditto, May, 1937.

MOBBS, ERIC CHARLES, B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 10th Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 11th Dec., 1922; services lent to Tehri Garhwal State for two years from May, 1925; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927; princpl., for coll., Dehra Dun, Apl., 1938.

MOBERLY, RONALD STUART, Indian State Rlys. (divl. traffic manager. G.I.P. Rly.).—Joined the service as traffic probnr., 17th Sept., 1909; asst. traffic supt., Nov., 1910; on milty. service from 2nd Sept., 1916, to 10th Apl., 1919; dist. traffic supt., Apl., 1919; asst. traffic manager Jan., 1924; divl. ditto, Jan., 1929.

MOCKETT, VERE, Barr., Judl. Dept., Madras (judge, high ct., Madras).—Apptd. judge, high ct., Madras, 21st July, 1934.

MODAK, BHASKAR LAKSHMAN, A.M.I.C.E., M.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bombay) (b. 29th Sept., 1884).—Held non-gazetted appts., from 1st March, 1908, to 18th Sept., 1916; 3rd gr. engr. (provl. service), Sept., 1916; asst. engr. (ditto), Feb., 1920; I.S.E., as asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1928; exec. engr., Oct., 1933.

MODAK, SATYENDRA NATH, M.A. (Cal.), B.A. (Cantab), Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 24th Dec., 1891).—Educ. at Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; apptd. by nomination; arrived, Dec., 1916, and served in Bengal as asst. mag., and collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1925; confd., May, 1927.

MODDER, EUGENE ASHLEY CLIVE, late Indian Forest Service (b. 3rd Apl., 1883).—Joined the service as dep. consvr., 12th Mar., 1920; offg. consvr., Bengal, variously from July, 1928; retd., 1938.

MODI, LONJI SHAHPURJI, F.R.C.S.I., Lt.-Col. I.M.S., retd. (b. 9th Mar., 1884).—First commn. dated 1st Nov., 1920; in milty. employ to 5th March, 1925; supt., March, 1924; supt., Central Jail, Nagpur, Feb., 1934; retd., May, 1939.

MOHAMMED, ALI SAHIB, Indian Police (b. 26th June, 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt., Madras, on probn., 1st Mar., 1938.

MOHAN LAL, BATRA, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 1st July, 1903).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., Oct., 1926; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1927; exec. engr., May, 1937.

MOHAN LAL, KUNJ BEHARI, M.Sc., Indian Forest Service (b. 25th Jan., 1907).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Assam, 14th Nov., 1930.

MOHAN, MAN (see Man Mohan).

MOHAN, NETER PARKASH (see Neter Parkash M.).

MOHAN RAO, PEJAVAR, M.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 25th May, 1887).—Joined the service, 28th Oct., 1910; asst. acctnt.-gen., May, 1911; dep. acctnt.-gen., posts and tels., Aug., 1918; ditto, Madras, Sept., 1921; ditto, Nagpur, Jan., 1922; asst. acct.-genl., U.P., Oct., 1922; ditto, Madras, Mar., 1923; ditto, Bengal, Jan., 1924; dep. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Madras, Apl., 1925; dep. acct.-genl., C.P., Apl., 1928; audit officer, Indian stores dept., Oct., 1928; offg. dep. ch. accts. officer, E.I. rlys., Nov., 1932; offg. ch. ditto, Apl., 1933; offg. acct.-genl., Bombay, May, 1934; govt. exr. of accts., M. & S.M. and S.I. rlys., Oct., 1934; offg. ch. accts. officer, E.I. rly., Feb., 1935; acct. genl., Bengal, Sept., 1936; ditto, Bihar, Mar., 1938; acct. genl., Cent. Provs. and Berar, Aug., 1939.

MOHAN SINGH, SARDAR BHADUR (adviser to secty. of State for India).—Apptd. member of Council of India, Mar., 1935; adviser to sec. of state for India, Apl., 1937.

MOHAN, YADAVA (see Yadava Mohan).

MOHGAONKAR, NARHARI KASHINATH, B.A., B.L., late Central Provs., C.S. (Judl.) (b. 3rd Oct., 1876).—Joined the service as munisif, 20th Mar., 1903; extra asst. commr., Apl., 1907; sub-judge, Feb., 1912; dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1930; ret'd., Nov., 1931.

MOLE, ROBERT FREDERIC, B.A., Burma C.S. (Cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 10th Aug., 1914).—Educ. at Clifton Coll., and Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 16th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Nov., 1938, and served as asst. commr.
