MOLES, SAMUEL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab).—Educ. at Royal Academical Institution, Belfast, and Belfast Univ.; joined the service, 22nd Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

MOLESWORTH, WALTER GUY, late Indian Service of Engrs. (Madras) (b. 18th Feb., 1874).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service, 1st Oct., 1896, as asst. engr.; exec. engr., Oct., 1906; under sec. to govt., Madras, Oct., 1911, to 1918; suptg. engr. (temp.), April, 1919; consg. archit. to govt., Jan., 1920; confd. as suptg. engr., May, 1921; offg. chief engr., Sept., 1923; confd., Sept., 1926; ret'd., Feb., 1929.

MOLLOY, OSCAR HUGH, Burma Civil Service (Cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 16th May, 1915).—Educ. at St. Joseph's College, North Point, Darjeeling, and Rangoon University; apptd. on probn., 30th Sept., 1938.

MOLLOY, PATRICK REGINALD HEMBROUGH, B.A., Burma C.S. (Cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 16th Oct., 1912).—Educ. at St. Joseph's College, Naini Tal, India, and Rangoon Univ.; joined the service 30th Sept., 1937; arrived in Burma, Nov., 1937, and served as asst. commr.

MOLONEY, JOHN EDMUND (b. 24th Aug., 1886).—Apptd. to the late R.I.M. as asst. engr., from 1st Sept., 1911; held various engr. and ship surveyor appts., 1929-1938; apptd. ch. survr. with the govt. of India, 31st July, 1938; prom. engr. capt., R.I.N. (supernumerary), 30th Apl., 1938.

MONAHAN, GEORGE JOHN, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 28th Dec., 1874).—Educ. at Stonyhurst Coll., and Trin. Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1897; arrived, 25th Dec., 1898, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., and asst. settl. offr.; joint mag. and dep. collr., Aug., 1907; transfid. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1912; ret'd., Dec., 1932.

MONANI, MAHOMEDALI GULAMHUSAIN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 29th Oct., 1910).—Educ. at St. Xavier's High School, Bombay, St. Vincent's High School, Poona, Bombay University and the School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

MONDAL, GOPI BALLAV, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. 2nd Feb., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bengal, 7th Oct., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1931.

MONE, NARAYAN TRIMBAK, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provinces) (b. 16th Apl., 1906).—Educ. at University of Allahabad,

University of Nagpur, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, 16th Dec., 1929, and served in the Central Provinces as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., July, 1933.

MONE, TRIMBAK WASUDEO, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 13th Feb., 1880).—Apptd. prof., Robertson Coll., Jubbulpore, 11th July, 1908; ret'd., Feb., 1935.

MONRO, ALEXANDER, C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 17th Feb., 1890).—Educ. at Charterhouse, and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 26th Nov., 1913, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr. and asst. commr.; asst. supt., Dehra Dun, May to June, 1914; jt. mag., Jan., 1918; offg. dy. commr., Jan., 1923; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1926; confd., Dec., 1929; dep. commr., Jan., 1930; C.I.E., June, 1931; ret'd., March, 1939.

MONRO, WALTER COLIN, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 27th Sept., 1888).—Joined the service 10th July, 1915; extra asst. consvr., United Provs., July, 1917; promoted to I.F.S. as asst. consvr., May, 1932; dep. consvr., Nov., 1933.

MONROE, JAMES HARVEY, Judicial Dept., Punjab (judge, high ct., Lahore).—Apptd. addl. judge, high ct., Lahore, Mar., 1932; judge, ditto, Oct., 1933.

MONTAGU, AINSLEY MARSHALL RENDALL, A.M.I.C.E., A.M.I.M.E. Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 6th Nov., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1914; on mil. duty from 24th March, 1915, to 11th May, 1920; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; secty. (temp.), cent. board of irrgn., May, 1931.

MONTEATH, DAVID TAYLOR, C.B., C.V.O., O.B.E., B.A., Burma Office (asst. under sec. of state) (b. 7th Apl., 1887).—Educ. at Clifton Coll. and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. to Admiralty, Dec., 1910; junr. clerk, mil. dept., India Office, 5th Dec., 1911; transfid. to pol. dept., Nov., 1912; resdt. clerk, April, 1914, to Feb., 1915; on duty in mil. dept. from Oct., 1914; services temporarily lent to the Admiralty, Feb., 1915; on mil. service, 1918; O.B.E., Jan., 1918; pte. sec. to Lord Sinha, April, 1919; sent. clerk, pol. dept., Dec., 1919; principal, April, 1921; actg. dep. clerk of the council, June, 1926; pte. sec. to sec. of state, Dec., 1927; actg. asst. secty., public and judl. dept., Apl., 1931; asst. secty., finl. dept., July, 1931; C.V.O., June, 1931; secty. to Burma round table conf., London, Dec., 1931; joint secty., milty. dept., Sept., 1934; asst. under sec. of state for Burma, Apl., 1937; C.B., June, 1938.

MONTEATH, JOHN, B.A., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 9th October, 1878).—Educ. at Clifton and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 29th Nov., 1902, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag., and asst. to the collr. of Bombay and chief inspr. of factories; asst. pol. agent, Kathiawar, March, 1908; 1st asst., Nov., 1909; municipal commr., Ahmedabad, April, 1915; offg. postmaster-gen., Punjab,

Nov., 1915; ditto, Madras, June, 1916; confirmed, Sept., 1918; collr. and dist. mag., Dec., 1922; collr., dist. mag. and pol. agent, Nov., 1923, and again, July, 1928; sec. to govt., home and eccl. depts., Oct., 1926; member, legisl. council, 1927 and 1932; offg. commr., Apl., 1932; C.I.E., Feb., 1937.

MONTFORT, HORACE MOUTRIE, India Audit Office (suptg. executive officer) (b. 4th June, 1900).—Apptd. asst. clerk, 14th Aug., 1919, after previous service from 24th April, 1918; second class Clerk, 29th April, 1920; transfed. to India Audit Office, March, 1922; exec. officer, April, 1922; higher exec. officer, Aug., 1933; suptg. ditto, Mar., 1936.

MONTGOMERY, HENRY, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 1st May, 1884).—Educ. at Clifton, and Balliol Coll., Ox.; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrived, 26th Nov., 1908, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; manager, Sind encumbered estates, Mar., 1917; on mil. duty as asst. recruiting offr., 1918; actg. collr. and dist. mag., Feb., 1920; confd., July, 1927; retd., Mar., 1935.

MONTGOMERY, ROBERT ERNEST, C.I.E., late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 9th July, 1878).—Educ. at King's Coll. Sch., London; apptd. second class clerk, acctnt.-gen.'s dept., Mar., 1898; transfed. to military dept., Sept., 1902; apptd. locum tenens to reading clerk to council, Aug., 1911; dep. reading clerk, May, 1913, to Feb., 1920; staff clerk (temp.), April, 1915; junr. clerk, July, 1919; representative of India Office on Army and Navy National Health Insurance Advisory Cmtee., Jan., 1920; principal (actg.), April, 1921; transfed. to Office of High Commr. for India as asst. sec., April, 1922; actg. sec. to high commr., 20th Oct. to 5th Nov., 1924, and 11th Dec., 1924, to Jan., 1925; designated secty., genl. dept., Nov., 1930; C.I.E., June, 1938; rtd., Sept., 1938.

MOODIE, ADAM WILSON, O.B.E., M.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (consvr., Burma) (b. 17th May, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 16th Dec., 1911; dep. consvr., Dec., 1916; O.B.E., June, 1919; offg. consvr., Apl., 1933; confd., Nov., 1935.

MOODY, BASIL, M.A., V.D., Indian State Rlys. (ch. optg. supt., N.W. Rly.) (b. 13th Oct., 1880).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 11th Jan., 1912; asst. dist. traffic supt., N.W. Rly., Jan., 1922; offg. dist. ditto, Nov., 1923; offg. dep. dir. of traffic and statistics, rly. bd., Feb., 1926; divl. comml. officer, N.W. Rly., Nov., 1929; offg. divl. supt., N.W. rly., Jan., 1934; confd., Nov., 1936; offg. secty., rly. bd., Mar., 1935, and again, Oct., 1936; ch. optg. supt., Jan., 1938.

MOODY, ROBERT HECTOR, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (United Provs.) (b. 15th Apl., 1883).—Joined the service as prof., Muir Central Coll., Allahabad, 17th March, 1913; prinpl.; govt. inter. coll., Allahabad, July, 1924; offg. dep. dir. of public instr., May, 1926; offg. inspr. of schools, Oct., 1926; confd., Nov., 1927; retd., Mar., 1932.

MOOKERJEE, BIJAN KUMAR (judge, high ct., Calcutta).—Apptd., July, 1939.

MOON, EDWARD PENDEREL, B.A., Indian C.S. (secty. to govr., Punjab) (b. 13th Nov., 1905).—Educ. at Winchester and New Coll., Oxford; fellow of All Souls, 1927; joined the service, 16th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under secty. to govt., pol. and home depts., Punjab, Dec., 1932; offr. on spec. duty, Nov., 1937; dep. commr., Dec., 1937; secty. to govt., June, 1938.

MOONEY, HERBERT FRANCIS, O.B.E., Indian Forest Service (asst. consvr., Orissa) (b. 6th Nov., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., March, 1921; agency forest officer, Nov., 1923, O.B.E., June, 1939.

MOORE, DENIS BENJAMIN, Indian Police (b. 21st Mar., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bihar, on probn., Dec., 1937.

MOORE, ERNEST ARTHUR, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 21st Dec., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bengal, 4th Oct., 1924; exec. engr., Oct., 1933.

MOORE, FREDERICK THOMAS, Office of High Commr. for India (exec. officer, general dept.) (b. 17th Feb., 1897).—Apptd. temp. clerk, India Office, Jan., 1920; transfed. to H.C.'s Office, Apl., 1922; clerical officer, Jan., 1924; exec. ditto, June, 1927.

MOORE, JOHN, late Indian Police Service (Madras) (b. 19th Dec., 1880).—Joined the service, 10th Dec., 1901, as probr.; asst. supt., July, 1903; supt., July, 1910; awarded King's police medal; personal asst. to dep. inspr.-gen. rlys. and C.I.D., March, 1919; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., Oct., 1925; retd., July, 1930.

MOORE, JOHN RICHARD, Office of High Commr. for India (hr. exec. officer, store dept.) (b. 16th Jan., 1888).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 4th April, 1908; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, April, 1922; hr. ditto, Feb., 1938.

MOORE, LEONARD ALFRED JOHN, Office of High Commr. for India (exec. officer, general dept.) (b. 11th Oct., 1902).—Apptd. clerical officer, India Office, 27th Apl., 1920, after previous service, from 25th Feb., 1918; transfed. to office of High Commr. for India, April, 1922; exec. officer, April, 1924.

MOORE, PIERCE LANGRISH, C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (Madras) (b. 26th Nov., 1873).—Educ. at Cheltenham, and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1896; arrived, 21st Nov., 1897, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; dist. mag., Bangalore, Feb., 1904; first asst. to resdt. in Mysore, and sec. to chief commr. of Coorg, July to Oct., 1906; head asst. collr. and mag., March, 1909; sub-collr. and joint mag., May, 1910; president, Madras corporation, Nov., 1910; C.I.E., June, 1912; inspr.-gen. of police, Aug., 1914; collr. and dist. mag., Nov., 1919; offg. sec. to govt., fin. dept., April, 1921; sec. to govt. of Madras, local self-govt. dept., March, 1923; second sec. to govt., April, 1926; offg.

third member, board of rev., May, 1926; confd., Aug., 1926; offg. 2nd member, ditto, Aug., 1926; retd., Aug., 1930.

MOORE, THOMAS ARTHUR, A.I.C., Office of High Commr. for India (chemist, store dept.) (b. 1st June, 1876).—Apptd. asst. chemist, India Store Depot, 1910; actg. chief chemist, 1914 to 1919; chemist, Oct., 1923.

MOORE, WENTWORTH WILLIAM THOMPSON, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 8th Dec., 1889).—Joined the service as prof., Patna Coll., 23rd Feb., 1914; offg. prinpl., New Coll., Patna, Oct., 1925; retd., March, 1932.

MOORE-GILBERT, Samuel Malcolm, Indian Police (b. 22nd July, 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., Nov., 1938.

MOORTHY RAO, SRINIVASARAO SRINIVASA, B.E. (Mech. Mysore), Indian Posts and Telegraphs (chief electrician, wireless) (b. 21st Oct., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. div. engr., wireless (temp.), 10th Nov., 1926; confd. div. engr. wireless, Apr., 1928; chief elec. wireless, Mar., 1937.

MOOS, PESTONJI NANABHAI, M.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (judge and sess. judge, Bombay) (b. 29th Aug., 1894).—Educ. at Elphinstone Coll., Bombay, and University Coll. London; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 6th Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; doing duty as asst. judge, Aug., 1925; offg. judge and sess. judge, April, 1928; confd., Nov., 1929.

MOOS, SORAB NANABHOY, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (dep. dir. of public instrn., Poona) (b. 25th Sept., 1890).—Joined the service, 14th May, 1919; vice-prin., D. J. Sind Coll., May, 1919; inspr. of science teaching, Bombay Presdy., Dec., 1925; offg. asst. director of public instrn., April, 1926; and again, Sept., 1933; educl. inspr., Jan., 1927; offg. dy. dir. of public instrn., Mar., 1932; offg. dir., Nov., 1936; dep. dir. public instrn., Poona, Dec., 1937.

MORAES, ANTHONY XAVIER, L.C.E., M.I.E. (Ind.), late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bombay) (b. 20th Mar., 1876).—Joined, 8th March, 1900; exec. engr., 1909; suptg. engr., March, 1925; retd. Mar., 1931.

MORAN, ARTHUR VIVIAN, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 30th Mar., 1879).—Apppt. 2nd class clerk, India Store Depot, 30th Sept., 1903; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; supervisor, April, 1921; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; retd., Mar., 1939.

MORAY, VISHWASRAO DINKARRAO, Indian Police (b. 11th May, 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 14th Mar., 1938.

MORE, IAN ANDREW HANSON, India Office (asst. princpl., mil. dept.) (b. 14th Jan., 1915).—Educ. at Fettes Coll., Edinburgh and Trinity Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. princpl., 11th Oct., 1938.

MOREHEAD, FREDERICK THOMAS, O.B.E., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 30th June, 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 18th Dec., 1922; dep. consvr., July, 1925; O.B.E., June, 1932.

MORGAN, Rev. BASIL IVOR, Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain) (b. 9th Dec., 1887).—Apptd. junr. chaplain, 16th Jan., 1922; senr. chaplain, Jan., 1932.

MORGAN, CHARLES CAREY, Judl. Dept., Bengal (dep. admnr.-gen. and offi. trustee, Bengal), (b. 21st Sept., 1880).—Was acting administrator gen., Calcutta, from 25th Feb., 1910, to Nov., 1910, from March, 1911, to Jan., 1913, and from Jan., 1913; administrator-gen. s.p.t., April, 1914; offg. administrator-gen. and official trustee, Bengal, Oct., 1920, and again, May, 1930; custodian of enemy property in Bengal Presdy., March, 1922.

MORGAN, DAVID EVAN, India Office (exec. officer, Acct.-Genl.'s Dept.) (b. 4th Mar., 1917).—Apptd. exec. officer, 31st Aug., 1936.

MORGAN, DONALD LINDSEY, late Indian Police (b. 5th Nov., 1888).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 14th Dec., 1908; supt., Dec., 1922; retd., May, 1937.

MORGAN, FRANCIS DAVID PATERSON, Indian Police (asst. supt., Madras) (b. 14th Aug., 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Madras 22nd Nov., 1934; confd., Jan., 1937.

MORGAN, FREDERICK ROBERT, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 8th Aug., 1882).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 13th Oct., 1905; exec. engr., Oct., 1913; offg. dep. ch. engr., Nov., 1925; confd., June, 1932; offg. ch. engr., N.W. rly., June, 1934; and again, Oct., 1935; ditto, E.B. rly., Mar., 1935; ch. engr., N.W. rly., Oct., 1935; retd., Aug., 1937.

MORGAN, HUGH CAREY. —Apptd. solicitor to the Govt. of Bengal, April, 1935; retd., 1938.

MORGAN, JOHN ANTHONY PATERSON Burma Police (Class I) (b. 26th July, 1919).—Apptd. asst. supt. on probn., Nov., 1938.

MORGAN, JEFFERY JOHN EVAN, Indian Police (b. 5th Jan., 1918).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., Dec., 1937.

MORGAN, MAURICE DAVID, Indian Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 2nd Dec., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt. Dec., 1909; dist. supt., Feb., 1921.

MORGAN, PAUL ROBERT JAMES, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 1st Feb., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 6th Dec., 1920; offg. supt., April, 1925; confd., Aug., 1926.

MORISON, JOHN, C.I.E., M.B., Ch.B. (Glas.) D.P.H. (Cantab.), Lt.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 6th Nov., 1879).—Joined 1st Sept., 1906, and served in mil. dept. to 4th April, 1922; asst. dir., B. B. Laboratory, April, 1922; offg. dir., Haffkine Inst., Bombay, and consulting bacteriologist, G.M. Coll., Aug., 1925; offg. dir., Pasteur institute, Rangoon, Nov., 1926; dir., ditto, Shillong, Oct., 1927; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; offg. inspr.-genl. of civil hosp. and prisons, Assam, May, 1933; retd., Nov., 1934.

MORLEY, ALEXANDER FRANCIS, B.A., Burma Office (principal) (b. 6th Jan., 1908).—Educ. at Rugby and Queen's Coll., Oxford; apptd. asst. prinpl., 20th Oct., 1930; pte. secty. to parly. under sec. of state, Dec., 1933; actg. princpl., Mar., 1936, and posted to econ. and overseas

dept., Aug., 1936; adviser and secty., Indian govt. del. to 21st and 22nd Internatl. lab. conf., 1936; advr. ditto 23rd and 24th Internatl. lab. conf., June, 1937 and June, 1938; confd. principal, Oct., 1937; secty. to Indian del. to Brussels nine-power confr. Nov., 1937.

MORLEY, GEORGE RIPLEY, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 10th July, 1902).—Educ. at Kingswood School, Bath, and Jesus College, Oxford; joined the service, 22nd Oct., 1926; arrived, Dec., 1926, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; ret'd., Apl., 1932.

MORLEY, WILLIAM PATRICK, India Posts and Telegraphs (dep. postmaster-genl.) (b. 9th Aug., 1888).—Joined the service, Dec., 1905; probny. supt., Dec., 1912; conf., March, 1915; dep. postmaster-genl., Jan., 1939.

MORONY, THOMAS HENRY, C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian Police (b. 8th Apl., 1879).—Joined the service, 9th Dec., 1899, and posted to Central Provs.; dist. supt., Sept., 1907; inspr.-gen. of pol., Indore State, April, 1912, to March, 1917; awarded King's police medal, Jany., 1918; dep. inspr.-gen. (provl.), Cent. Provs., Feb., 1921; offg. inspr.-gen. Jan., 1922; confd., Jan., 1923; C.I.E., June, 1925; C.S.I., Jan., 1931; ret'd., June, 1933.

MORRIS, AUSTIN ROBERT, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 7th Dec., 1885).—Educ. at Nottingham High School, and Queen's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 4th Dec., 1909, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. commr. (prov. sub.), July, 1924; offg. sec. to finl. commr. (in addn.), Nov., 1924; dep. commr., Feb., 1926; sec. to govt., forest dept., May, 1927; excise commr., Feb., 1933; addl. secty. to govt., forest dept., Burma, Apl., 1936; ret'd., March, 1939.

MORRIS, FREDERICK WILLIAM AUBREY, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and sub. collr., Madras) (b. 26th Aug., 1907).—Educ. at Cardiff High School and Corpus Christi College, Cambridge; joined the service, 17th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930; and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., Aug., 1932; commercial tax officer, Madras, July, 1939.

MORRIS, JAMES ARCHIBALD, A.M.I.M.E., Indian State rlys. (works manager) (b. 26th Sept., 1888).—Joined the service, 1st Jan., 1924; asst. works manager, E.I. rly., Nov., 1932; works manager, Aug., 1934.

MORRIS, MICHAEL, M.B.E., late Indian Police (b. 10th Feb., 1880).—Held non-gazetted appt. prior to 27th Feb., 1915; dep. supt. (provl. service), Feb., 1915; joined I.P.S. as asst. supt., June, 1927; supt., Dec., 1927; ret'd., Feb., 1935; M.B.E., June, 1935.

MORRIS, RALPH CLARENCE, Indian Police (dep. inspr.-genl., Burma) (b. 10th Mar., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 6th Dec., 1908; dist. supt., Dec., 1917; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., April, 1928; asst. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1928; dep. ditto, Dec., 1931; offg. inspr.-genl., June, 1933, and again, Feb., 1937; awarded King's Police Medal, Jan., 1935.

MORRISON, ROBERT VICTOR, M.D., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Burma Medl. Dept. (prof. of medicine, Rangoon Univ.) (b. 1st Sept., 1887).—First commn. dated 27th Jan., 1912; in milty. employ prior to 15th July, 1925; pathologist,

July, 1925; offg. medl. supt., Mar., 1929; prinpl. medl. coll., Rangoon, Mar., 1933; prof. of medicine, Rangoon Univ., Nov., 1935.

MORSE, HENRY MERRET RAVENSBURY, Indian State Rlys. (divl. mechl. engr., N.W. Rly) (b. 31st May, 1893).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 5th Oct., 1915; divl. rolling stock officer, Dec., 1927; offg. supt., workshops, N.W. rly., Mar., 1936; and again, Mar., 1937.

MORTLOCK, Rev. ARTHUR GEORGE, Indian Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain).—Apptd. junior chaplain, Madras, 1st Nov., 1931.

MORTON, JOHN PERCIVAL, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 15th May, 1911).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 24th, Nov., 1930; confd., Nov., 1932.

MORTON, KENNETH VALENTINE FREELAND, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 13th May, 1907).—Educ. at Edinburgh Academy and University College, Oxford; joined the service, 14th October, 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; undersecty. to govt., Punjab, pol. and home depts., Nov., 1934, to Oct., 1936.

MORTON, VIVIAN WALTER, late Survey of India (b. 10th Dec., 1880).—Joined the service, 15th Nov., 1900; extra asst. supt., Jan., 1909; supt., Mar., 1930; ret'd., Dec., 1935.

MOSELY, ARCHIE GERARD, Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Rangoon) (b. 6th March, 1883).—Educ. at Clifton, and Wadham Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived, 19th Dec., 1907, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. commr. (provl.), June, 1918; dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1923; offg. judge, high ct., Rangoon; July, 1929; confd., Feb., 1932.

MOSS, BENJAMIN HUGH, M.I.Struct.E., A.M.I.S.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 4th Feb., 1881).—Joined the service, 8th Aug., 1901; I.A.R.O., from 13th Aug., 1918, to 3rd April, 1919; asst. engr., April, 1919; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Nov., 1924; ret'd., Feb., 1936.

MOSS, CHARLES HENRY DE VERE, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 30th Oct., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 16th June, 1923; offg. supt., Apl., 1929; confd., July, 1933; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931.

MOSS, ERIC DE VERE, Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 13th April, 1896).—Educ. at Dulwich Coll. and Victoria Coll., Jersey; joined the service, 15th Oct., 1923, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., Oct., 1925; asst. commr., April, 1926; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1926; offg. secty., bd. of rev., U.P., Mar., 1932; mag. and collr., Dec., 1934.

MOSS, RICHARD CECIL, A.M.I.C.E., B.E., B.A., B.A.I., late Indian State Railways (b. 24th May, 1879).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1902, as asst. engr.; exec. engr., 1st Oct., 1912; ditto, and asst. agent, E. Bengal Rly., Oct., 1914; on miy. duty from July, 1917, to Sept., 1919; suptg. engr. (supy.), May, 1923; dep. chief engr. (provl.), E.B. Rly., May, 1925; confd., Feb., 1928; offg. secty., rly. bd., Apl., 1929; contr. of stores, N.W. Rly., Oct., 1929; ret'd., May, 1934.

MOSSE, ARTHUR HENRY EYRE, Lt.-Col., C.I.E., I.A., retd., late Pol. Dept., Govt. of India (b. 28th Sept., 1877).—First commn. dated 4th Aug., 1897; in mil. emp. to Dec., 1901; asst. pol. agent, Oct., 1903; asst. pol. agent, Aden, June, 1904; asst. to resdt. at Baroda, Oct., 1909, to Nov., 1911; asst. resdt., Aden, Feb., 1914; on special duty under pol. resdt., Persian Gulf, Dec., 1915, to Jan., 1918; asst. pol. agent, Mahi Kantha, March, 1918; pol. agent, Kathia-war, Aug., 1918; pol. agent, Mahi Kantha, Feb., 1923; in foreign service as vice-president of admn., Bhavnagar, March, 1927; offg. A.G.G. in States of W.I., July, 1931; retd., Sept., 1932; C.I.E., Jan., 1933; author of "My Somali Book."

MOTI LAL, AGGARWAL, LALA, Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 7th Jan., 1906) (asst. exec. engr., Punjab).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 19th Nov., 1927; proby. asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1929.

MOTI RAM, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 16th Feb., 1897).—Joined the service, 19th Nov., 1920, as apprentice engr.; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1928; confd., Jan., 1931; p.a. to ch. engr. and under secty. to govt. (I.B.), July, 1937.

MOULD, ARTHUR E., V.D., A.M.I.C.E. (late Indian State Rlys. (b. 15th Sept., 1879).—Joined the service as bridge draughtsman, 23rd Nov., 1906; asst. engr., Jan., 1908; in milty. employ from 1st Jan., 1916, to 1st Feb., 1920; bridge engr., June, 1920; dep. ch. engr. (bridges), July, 1930; retd., Nov., 1934.

MOULD, SAM CARTER, C.I.E., B.A. (Cantab.), late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 27th Sept., 1880).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1904; exec. engr., Oct., 1912; offg. chief engr., Lloyd Barrage, March, 1925; offg. suptg. engr., Rohri Canals Circle, Oct., 1925; offg. ch. engr., Lloyd Barrage and C.C., April, 1928; suptg. engr. (provl. perm.), July, 1931; confd., Nov., 1931; offg. jt. ch. engr., Nov., 1931; C.I.E., June, 1932; retd., Sept., 1935.

MOULD, WILLIAM CRAFTNANT, V.D., late Indian State Rlys. (E.I. Rly.) (b. 8th Aug., 1875).—Joined the service as asst. carr. and wagon supt., 8th April, 1905; dist. ditto, Jan., 1919; offg. dist. supt., June, 1919; confd., Dec., 1920; pers. asst. to dep. ch. mech. engr., April, 1925; ditto to ch. mech. engr., Dec., 1926; dep. ch. mech. engr., March, 1927; retd., Sept., 1931.

MOWBRAY, ROBERT, M.A., India Office (rlv. adviser and govt. dir. of Indian rly. companies) (b. 31st Mar., 1877).—Educ. at Manchester Gr. Sch., and Brasenose Coll., Oxford (scholar, 1896-1900; Green Prize, 1905); apptd. junr. clerk, acctnt.-gen.'s dept., India Office, 29th Oct., 1900; joint editor of India Office List, Nov., 1907, to July, 1913; assessor of income tax, March, 1910, to June, 1917; senr. clerk, July, 1913; clerk to the commrs. of income tax, Oct., 1920; principal, April, 1921; actg. dep. clerk of Council, 1st Dec., 1928; confd., Feb., 1931; rly. adviser and govt. dir. of Indian rly. companies, June, 1931; member, Indian staty. rly. bd. ctee, June, 1933.

MOWDUDUR RAHMAN, B.A., Barr., Bengal Judl. Dept.—Joined the service as judge, Calcutta small cause ct., 14th Jan., 1923.

MOYNIHAN, MARTIN JOHN, B.A. (Oxon), India Office (asst. principal) (b. 7th Nov., 1916).—Educ. at Birkenhead School, and Magdalen College, Oxford; apptd. asst. principal, 27th Feb., 1939.

MRA, MAUNG SHWE, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 18th Feb., 1910).—Educ. at National High School, Akyab, Rangoon Univ., and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., educ. dept., Apl., 1938.

MUAZZAM HUSSAIN KHAN, M.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal (b. 1st Sept., 1903).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 1st July, 1928; confd., Feb., 1931; sup. (temp.), May, 1936.

MUDALIAR, SIR RAMASWAMI, Diwan Bahadur (member, govr.-gen'l's exec. council) (b. 14th Oct., 1887).—Member, Legislative Council, Madras, 1920-26; member, Council of State, 1930; member, Indian Legislative Assembly, 1931-34; member, Round Table Conference, all sessions, and Federal Structure Committee; member, Indian Franchise Committee; member, Special Textile Tariff Board; member, Council of India, July, 1936; Kt., Feb., 1937; adviser to Secty. of State for India, Apl., 1937; member, govr.-gen'l's exec. council, May, 1939.

MUDALIYAR, C. TADULINGA (see Tadulinga, M.C.).

MUDIE, ROBERT FRANCIS, C.I.E., O.B.E., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 24th Aug., 1890).—Educ. at Fettes Coll., and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived, 1st Nov., 1915; on milty. duty with territorials to Apl., 1919; asst. mag. and collr., United Provs., Apl., 1919; O.B.E., June, 1919; joint mag., Dec., 1920; dep. commr. of income tax, Dec., 1921; offg. dep. commr., March, 1922; special rent officer in addn., July, 1924; offg. mag. and collr., Oct., 1925; confd., May, 1932; offg. dep. sec. to govt., rev. dept., April, 1926; offg. settlement officer, Oct., 1926; jt. secty., Indian round table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; C.I.E., June, 1935; on spl. duty with rly. bd., Apl., 1936; magte. and collr., Dec., 1937; rev. sec. to govt., United Provs., April, 1938.

MUEENUDDIN, GHULAM, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 6th May, 1906).—Educ. at Aitchison College, Lahore, Punjab University and Oxford University; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., variously from May, 1935, to Apl., 1937; addtl. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1936, to Apl., 1937; colonization officer, Apl., 1938.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL AZIZ (see Abdul Aziz, M.).

MUHAMMAD ABDUL GHANI ANSARI, B.A., LL.B., Income Tax Dept., United Provs, (asst. commr.) (b. 19th Oct., 1890).—Joined the service as proby. dep. coll., 23rd May, 1913; confd., May, 1915; inc. tax officer, May, 1926; asst. commr., July, 1927.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL HAMID, SHAIKH, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (under secty. to govt. (South) Punjab) (b. 16th Sept., 1897).—Joined the service, 6th Nov., 1921; asst. engr., Nov., 1922; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1923; on deputation to Bahawalpur State, Apl., 1930; exec. engr., Nov., 1931; under secty. to Govt., Apl., 1930.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL KHALIK, B.A., Indian Police (sup't., Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1886).—Joined the service as proby. dep. supt., 23rd March, 1912; confd., Mar., 1914; supt., Dec., 1930.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL MAJID, KHAN SAHIB, Khwaja, M.B.E., B.A., Punjab C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. 24th Aug., 1884).—Joined the service, 18th Jan., 1909; extra asst. commr., Apl., 1913; offg. dir. of land records, Punjab, May, 1929; member Council of State, Feb., 1930; dep. commr., confd., May, 1936.

MUHAMMAD ABDUL MUMIN, C.I.E., B.A., Khan Bahadur, late Bengal C.S. (b. 28th June, 1876).—Joined the service, 25th May, 1897; sub. dep. collr., May, 1902; dep. mag., March, 1907; under-sec. to govt. of Bengal, rev. dept., Oct., 1916; mag. and collr., Oct., 1918; offg. dir. of land records, Bengal, March 1925; offg. commr. Apl., 1929; confd., May, 1930; ret'd., June, 1931; C.I.E., Jan., 1935.

MUHAMMAD ABDULLAH, KHAN SAHIB HAFIZ, CHAUDHRI (dep. dir. of agric., Punjab) (b. Oct., 1885).—Joined the service, 15th April, 1907, and held non-gazetted appts. to 9th May, 1916; asst. dir. of agric., May, 1916; apptd. to I.A.S. from 29th Oct., 1921; dep. dir. of agric., Oct., 1921; asst. prof'r., Punjab agricl. coll., April, 1924.

MUHAMMED ABDUR RAHMAN, Sir (see Abdur Rahman, Sir Muhammed).

MUHAMMAD ABOO ABDULLAH, Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 1st Sept., 1905).—Apptd. proby. asst. supt., Bengal, 6th Feb., 1930; confd., Apl., 1932; asst. dir., intell. bureau, home dept., June, 1938.

MUHAMMAD, AFZAL HUSSAIN, M.Sc. (Punjab), M.A. (Cantab.), Dept. of Agric., Punjab (entomologist to govt., Punjab) (b. 10th Mar., 1889).—Joined the service, 6th Jan., 1919; entomologist to govt., Punjab, Sept., 1919; ditto and princpl., Punjab Agric. Coll., Lyallpur, Apl., 1933.

MUHAMMAD AHMAD SAID KHAN (see Ahmad, S. K. M.).

MUHAMMAD AKRAM, AGHA, B.A., late Indian Police (b. 17th June, 1881).—Joined the service, Sept., 1906, as dep. supt.; dist. supt., Nov., 1919; ret'd., June, 1936.

MUHAMMAD AKRAM KHAN, KHWATA, B.A., Indian Police, ret'd. (b. 15th May, 1884).—Joined the service as dep. supt., Feb., 1908; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1918; on foreign service as inspr.-genl. of police, Bhopal State, 7th Nov., 1921; dist. supt., Sept., 1926; awarded Indian Police medal, Feb., 1937; ret'd., May, 1939.

MUHAMMAD ALI KHAN, Indian Police (sup't., Bihar) (b. 1st Sept., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 15th June, 1924; offg. supt., Apl., 1932, and again, Feb., 1933; supt., Apl., 1937.

MUHAMMAD ANWAR ALI, Indian Police (b. 1st Nov., 1906).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 14th Jan., 1930; confd., Jan., 1932.

MUHAMMAD AZAM, KHAN, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 3rd Feb., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., N.W.F.P., 1st Oct., 1924; exec. engr., Oct., 1933.

MUHAMMAD AZIM HUSAIN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 5th Oct., 1913).—Educ. at Central Model School, Lahore, Punjab Univ. and Christ's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Sept.; arrived in India, Dec., 1937, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

MUHAMMAD AZFAR, B.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 1st April, 1909).—Educ. at the Queen's Intermediate College, Benares, Allahabad University and Jesus College, Oxford; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1933, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.

MUHAMMAD BAZL-UL-LAH SAHIB, Sir Khan Bahadur, B.A., C.I.E., O.B.E., late Madras Civil Service (b. 31st Jan., 1875).—Joined the service, 9th April, 1895, and held non-gazetted appt. to 8th July, 1902; dep. coll., July, 1902; O.B.E., Dec., 1919; offg. ch. presdy. magte., March, 1920; collr. and dist. magte., July, 1920; C.I.E., June, 1923; offg. dir. of industries, Aug., 1926; ret'd., Jan., 1930; apptd. member, Madras public service commn., Jan., 1930; chairman, ditto, Oct., 1932; knighted, Jan., 1935; vacated office of chairman, 30th Jan., 1935.

MUHAMMAD EHSANUR RAHMAN, B.A., Impl. Customs Service (asst. collr.) (b. 15th Sept., 1896).—Joined the service, 17th Jan., 1917; asst. collr., Mar., 1923; offg. collr., Oct., 1934; and again, Apl., 1937.

MUHAMMAD FAKHAR-UD-DIN, MIAN, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 28th July, 1889).—Joined Oct., 1913, as asst. engr.; asst. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1922; under-secty. to govt., irrign. branch, April, 1928.

MUHAMMAD FAZLUL KARIM, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., late Bengal C.S. (b. 23rd Oct., 1881).—Joined the service, 3rd Aug., 1904; dep. mag., Apl., 1906; ditto and dep. collr., July, 1929; offg. mag. and collr. Aug., 1928; and, again, Dec., 1934; offg. addl. ch. presdy. mag., Aug., 1931; ret'd., Oct., 1936.

MUHAMMAD, GHULAM, see Ghulam, M.

MUHAMMAD, GUL (see Gul Muhammad).

MUHAMMAD HABIBULLAH, Sir, Sahib Bahadur, K.C.S.I., K.C.I.E.—Apptd. member of exec. council, Madras, 17th Dec., 1920; knighted, June, 1922; member of royal commn. on the superior public services in India, 1923-24; K.C.I.E., June, 1924; member of govr.-gen.'s exec. council, 31st Dec., 1924, to 31st Mar., 1930; K.C.S.I., Jun 1927.

MUHAMMAD HAMID, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., late Bihar C.S. (b. 16th Sept., 1883).—Joined the service, 29th Oct., 1904; dep. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1906; offg. addl. dist. mag. in charge, Patna city municipality, Jan. 1931; offg. secty. to govt., Bihar and Orissa,

local self-govt. dept., May, 1935; mag. and collr., Aug., 1935; ret'd., May, 1937; member, Bihar jt. public services commn., May, 1937.

MUHAMMAD HAYAT KHAN, NAWAB, Malik, C.S.I., late Punjab Civil Service (b. June, 1875).—Joined the service on 12th April, 1901, as extra asst. commr.; dep. commr., Oct., 1921; offg. commr., C.S.I., Jan., 1931; ret'd., Aug., 1931.

MUHAMMAD HUMAYUN, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., Madras Civil Service (sub. collr.) (b. 4th Aug., 1886).—Offg. dep. collr., Nov., 1918; confd., July, 1921; sub. collr., Mar., 1937.

MUHAMMAD HUSAIN, KHWAJA, B.A., Indian Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 18th Mar., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., 14th June, 1920; offg. dist. supt., Feb., 1924; confd., March, 1928.

MUHAMMAD IBRAHIM, Mian, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 7th June, 1899).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 15th Oct., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. exec. engr., Sept., 1933; confd., Oct., 1933.

MUHAMMAD IDRIS, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal).—Joined, 13th May, 1939.

MUHAMMAD, INAMULLAH KHAN, Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Bihar) (b. 7th Aug., 1908).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bihar and Orissa, on probn., 4th Apl., 1932; confd., Aug., 1933.

MUHAMMAD INAMUR RAHIM (see Rahim, M. I.).

MUHAMMAD ISMAIL, B.Sc., A.M.I.E.S., Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Punjab) (b. Nov., 1901).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 4th July, 1927; apptd. to I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, July, 1931.

MUHAMMAD ISMAIL, Khan Bahadur, (judge, high court, Allahabad).—Apptd., Aug., 1937.

MOHAMMAD JAMIL SYED, M.A., LL.B., Indian Audit Department (b. Feb., 1900).—Joined the service, 26th Feb., 1926; currency officer, Madras, March, 1931; asst. acct. genl., United Provs., Jan., 1937; asst. acct. genl., posts and telegraphs, Delhi, Oct., 1938.

MUHAMMAD KHAN, SAHIBZADA SARDAR, Bombay Civil Service (collr. and dist. magte.) (b. 22nd May, 1886).—Joined the service as proby. dep. collr., 28th Aug., 1910; confd., June, 1913; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1929; offg. collr. and dist. magte., Apl., 1930; confd., Dec., 1931.

MUHAMMAD MOOSA KHAN, Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Jail Dept., Madras (supt.) (b. 3rd Oct., 1887).—First commn. dated 8th Dec., 1915; in milty. employ to 27th July, 1925; supt., central jail, Clannanore, June, 1928; ditto, Vellore, June, 1931; supt. of the penitentiary, Madras, Jan., 1938.

MUHAMMAD MUSANNA, KHAN BAHADUR SHAIKH, late United Provs. C.S. (b. Feb., 1883).—Joined the service, 16th Mar., 1906; dep. collr., May, 1908; mag. and collr., Jan., 1933; ret'd., Feb., 1938.

MUHAMMAD NUR, Sir, KHWAJA, C.B.E., KHAN BAHADUR, late Judl. dept., Bihar.—Apptd. dep. president, legislative council, 8th Aug., 1922; president, ditto, 21st Nov., 1922; C.B.E., Mar., 1929; judge, high ct., Oct., 1930; knighted, Feb., 1937; ret'd., Sept., 1939.

MUHAMMAD RAZA, KHAN BAHADUR SAIYID, late Judicial Dept., United Provs. (b. 28th Jan., 1874).—Joined the service as offg. munsif, 16th June, 1899; confd., Nov., 1902; sub-judge (s.p.t.), Jan., 1914; confd., April, 1914; dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1920; judge, ch. ct. of Oudh, Lucknow, Nov., 1925; ret'd., Jan., 1934.

MUHAMMAD SAID, KHAN BAHADUR, Mian, Barr., late Indian Police (b. 29th Sept., 1880).—Joined the service as proby. dep. supt., 12th Dec., 1906; confd., Dec., 1907; supt., Jan., 1927; ret'd., Sept., 1935.

MUHAMMAD SAID, MIRZA, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 1st Aug., 1886).—Joined the service, 4th Oct., 1909, as asst. prof., govt. coll., Lahore; prof. ditto, Feb., 1921, and again Sept., 1925; asst. sec. to govt. of India, educn. and health dept., Oct., 1921; prinpl., Ludhiana Coll., April, 1924; prin., govt. inter. coll., Rohtak, May, 1927; ret'd., Sept., 1931.

MUHAMMAD SALEH AKBAR HYDARI, C.I.E., Indian C.S. (secty. govt. of India, department of labour) (b. 12th Oct., 1894).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1919; arrived, 9th Feb., 1920, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Jan., 1922; offg. under-sec. to govt., development dept., Madras, Oct., 1923; under-sec., govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, June, 1924; offg. dep. sec. ditto, Nov., 1925; agent to govt. of India in Ceylon, Oct., 1927; secty. to impl. council of agricl. research, June, 1929; secty. to the State delegation to the round table conf., from the Hyderabad State, July, 1931, to Jan., 1932; dep. secty., govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, Apl., 1932; secty. to the State delegation to the round table conf., from the Hyderabad State, Oct., 1932, to Nov., 1933; offg. jt. secty. to govt. of India, dept., of educn., health and lands, June, 1934; confd., Oct., 1935; C.I.E., Jan., 1935; collr. (provl. subs.), Oct., 1935; confd., Oct., 1936; offg. secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, April to Sept., 1937; secty. to govt. of India, dept. of labour, May, 1938.

MUHAMMAD SANA ULLAH, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., M.Sc., F.C.S., Archaeological Survey Dept. (b. 16th Nov., 1886).—Apptd. archaeological chemist in India, 29th June, 1917.

MUHAMMAD SHAFI, Sir MIAN (see Shafi, Sir Mian Muhammad).

MUHAMMAD SHAHAB-UD-DIN, B.A., B.L., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Madras) (b. 13th May, 1895).—Educ. at Madras Christian Coll. and Law Coll.; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 2nd Jan., 1922, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., June, 1925; on judl. training at Salem, July, 1929; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1931; confd., Jan., 1935.

MUHAMMAD SHARIFF, SHAIKH, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 23rd Nov., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1919; asst. exec., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1931.

MUHAMMAD, SHEIKH TAJ. (see Taj Muhammad, Sheikh).

MUHAMMAD SIRAJUDDIN SAHIB, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 7th June, 1904).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Madras, 14th June, 1930; confd., June, 1932.

MUHAMMAD SULAIMAN, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central P.W.D.) (b. 5th June, 1892).—Joined the service, 1st Sept., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. exec. engr., March, 1926; confd., Oct., 1929; offg. suptg. engr., Aug., 1936.

MUHAMMAD TAQI, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., late Indian Police (b. 3rd June, 1882).—Joined the service as dep. supt., 1st July, 1906; supt., March, 1924; ret'd., Dec., 1932.

MUHAMMAD USMAN, Sir, Sahib Bahadur, Khan Bahadur, K.C.I.E.—Apptd. member of govr.'s exec. council, Madras, 30th Mar., 1925; Kt., June, 1928; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1933; actg. govr. of Madras, May to Aug., 1934.

MUHAMMAD, WALI (see Wali Muhammad).

MUHAMMAD ZAHURUDDIN AHMAD

FARUQI (see Zahuruddin, A. F. M.).

MUHAMMAD ZIA-UD-DIN SAHIB, KHAN SAHIB, B.A., Indian Police (b. 1st Dec., 1890).—Joined the service, 31st Mar., 1915; apptd. to the Indian Police as dist. supt., Madras, April, 1937.

MUHSIN ALI, B.A., M.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 10th Aug., 1888).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1912; asst. engr., Nov., 1912; exec. engr., Oct., 1921; profro. of civil engrg., Thomason Coll., Roorkee, Oct., 1928; offg. suptg. engr., Mar., 1935.

MUIR, DAVID IAN RENNIE, Indian Civil Service (sub collr., Madras) (b. 11th Feb., 1903).—Educ. at George Watson's College, Univ. of Edinburgh, and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1927; arrived, Dec., 1927, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr., July, 1932; jt. secty., bd. of rev., Madras, April, 1936.

MUIR, GEORGE BASIL FAIRLIE, late Indian C.S. (b. 29th Aug., 1882).—Educ. at Rugby, and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1904; arrived, 26th Nov., 1905, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., and asst. commr.; joint mag., Nov., 1913; tutor and guardian to H.H. the Raja of Tehri from May, 1915, to Oct., 1919; rev. sec. to govt., March, 1921; mag. and collr. and sec. to govt., March, 1922; offg. commr. of inc. tax, U.P., Mar., 1930; commr., May, 1933; ret'd., Feb., 1938.

MUIRHEAD, ALEXANDER KERSHAW, Indian State Rlys. (contr. of stores, N.W. Rly.) (b. 14th Aug., 1886).—Joined the service as storekeeper, 10th Sept., 1907; on milv. duty from 4th Jan., 1917; dist. contr. of stores, July, 1918; contr., bales, Calcutta, Jan.-June, 1922; offg. dep. agent, April, 1929; offg. ch. personnel officer, April, 1932; offg. ch. contr. of stores, N.W. rly., May, 1933; and again, Feb., 1934; confd., May, 1934.

MUKERJEE, AMULYA CHARAN, Rai Bahadur, B.Sc., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 20th Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 20th Feb., 1906; supt., July, 1920; asst. sec. to govt. of India, fin. dept., April, 1922; examr., outside acct., Calcutta, March, 1923; offg. dep. contr. of currency, Calcutta, Oct., 1926; currency

officer, Calcutta, Feb., 1929; dep. contr. of the currency, Calcutta, April, 1929; ditto, Bombay, Aug., 1934; ch. acct., res. bank of India, Jan., 1935; ch. auditor, E.B. rly. and govt. exr. of accts., A.B. rly., Nov., 1935; ch. auditor, E.I. rly., April, 1938.

MUKERJEE, SUBODH CHANDRA, M.A., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 19th Aug., 1891).—Joined the service, 20th April, 1914; asst. auditor, June, 1918; asst. acctnt.-gen., Bengal, Sept., 1921; examr. of local fund accts., Bengal, June, 1922; govt. examr. of accts., B.N. Rly., Feb., 1927, attached officer, office of dir. rly. audit, Jan., 1930; with finl. commr., rlwys., Feb., 1930; dep. ch. auditor, N.W. rly., May, 1932; ret'd., April, 1934.

MUKERJI, BRAHMADEVA, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 30th Oct., 1912).—Educ. at Govt. Intermediate College, Allahabad, and Allahabad Univ., joined the service, 21st Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in B. & O. as asst. mag. and collr.; posted to Orissa, May, 1938.

MUKERJI, JANAKI NATH, B.A., O.B.E. late India Posts and Telegraphs (b. 7th May, 1879).—Joined the service, 25th Oct., 1900; asst. supt., Oct., 1901; elec. engr.-in-chief, Dec., 1921; O.B.E., June, 1925; offg. dep. chief engr., 'phones, July, 1925; offg. dir., tele. engrg., Aug., 1927; offg. P.M.G., central circle, April, 1931; and again, Dec., 1932; confd., Sept., 1933; ret'd., May, 1934.

MUKERJI, PARESH NATH, Rai Bahadur C.B.E., M.A., late India Posts and Tels. (b. 22nd Dec., 1882).—Joined the service as proby. supt., 9th Sept., 1904; supt., June, 1907; on depts. to international postal congress, Stockholm, May, 1924; ditto, London, Mar., Aug., 1929; asst. dir.-genl., June, 1927; offg. dep. dir.-genl., Jan., 1931, and again, Jan., 1932; dep. p.m.g., Oct., 1932; offg. p.m.g., Mar., 1933; confd., Mar., 1934; senr. dep. dir.-genl., April, 1938; ret'd., April, 1939.

MUKERJI, TARAPADA, M.B., D.P.H. (Port Health Officer, Chittagong) (b. 1st Oct., 1893); joined present post, 26th June, 1928.

MUKHARJI, ABAYAPADA, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 1st Dec., 1899).—Educ. at Patna Univ. and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 16th Dec., 1924, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., and again Nov., 1932.

MUKHARJI, ADITYA NATH, M.A., Ph.D., late Indian Educl. Service (b. Sept., 1875).—Apptd. prinpl., Sanskrit Coll., Calcutta, 16th Feb., 1924; ret'd., April, 1931.

MUKHARJI, AGHOR NATH, Babu, B.A., LL.B., late Judicial Dept., United Provs (b. Oct., 1875).—Joined the service as offg. munsf; confd., Feb., 1908; sub-judge (s.p.f.), Sept., 1918; confd., April, 1919; and addl. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1928; ret'd., Oct., 1930.

MUKHARJI, AMULYA CHANDRA, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 5th Mar., 1898).—Joined the service, 29th Oct., 1921; offg. exec. engr., April, 1927; confd., Jan., 1932.

MUKHARJI, ASHUTOSH, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (principal, science coll., Patna) (b. 16th Apl., 1885).—Joined the service, 2nd July, 1906; prof., Patna Coll., May, 1919; princpl., science coll., Patna, Feb., 1935.

MUKHARJI, BHABANI HARAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (secty., local self govt. dept., Bihar) (b. 1st August, 1901).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ. and Oxford (non-collegiate) joined the service, 28th Oct., 1925; arrived, 6th Dec., 1925, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt. finl. dept., Sept., 1929; addl. under-sec. to govt. of India, dept. of educn., health and lands, July, 1931; offg. dep. commr., May, 1932; offg. magte. and collr., Sept., 1932; and again, Mar., 1933; offg. dep. secty. to govt., pol. and appts. depts., July, 1935; secty., local self govt. dept., Bihar, Mar., 1939.

MUKHARJI, BONBEHARI, B.A., Rai Bahadur, Indian Police (supt.) (b. 29th Jan., 1887).—Joined the service 1910; confd. as supt., Bengal, Oct., 1937; depy. commr. of police, Calcutta; awarded King's police medal, 1919.

MUKHARJI, CHARU CHANDRA, O.B.E., B.A., Rai Bahadur, late Bihar Civil Service (b. 18th Nov., 1882).—Joined the service as dep. mag. and dep. collr. (s.p.t.), 10th Feb., 1903; confd., Nov., 1904; offg. mag., collr. and sec., board of revenue, July, 1926; confd., Nov., 1926; O.B.E., Dec., 1930; offg. commr., July, 1933; ret'd., Mar., 1938.

MUKHARJI, DEBABRATA, B.L., late Judicial Dept., Bengal (b. 18th Feb., 1875).—Joined the service as munsif, 4th Aug., 1900; sub-judge, Oct., 1919; ret'd., Feb., 1930.

MUKHARJI, DEBENDRA KUMAR, Rai Bahadur, B.A., late Assam Civil Service (b. 24th Dec., 1877).—Joined the service as sub dep. collr., 27th May, 1899; extra asst. commr., April, 1912; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1928; confd., June, 1928; ret'd., Jan., 1933.

MUKHARJI, KSHIROD LAL, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., late Bengal C.S. (b. 31st Mar., 1881).—Joined the service 28th July, 1904; dep. magte. and dep. collr., Mar., 1906; magte. and collr., June, 1932; ret'd., Mar., 1936.

MUKHARJI, SIR, LAL GOPAL, Rai Bahadur, Kt., B.A., LL.B., late Judicial Dept., United Provs. (b. 29th July, 1874).—Joined the service, 6th May, 1902, as munsif; sub-judge, March, 1914; judge, small cause ct., Sept., 1919; dist. and sess. judge, June, 1921; offg. addl. judge, high ct., Allahabad, Dec., 1923; judge, high ct., Allahabad, March, 1926; Kt., June, 1932; offg. ch. justice, high ct., Allahabad, Oct., 1932; ret'd., July, 1934.

MUKHARJI, SIR MANMATHA NATH, Kt., M.A., B.L., late Judl. Dept., Bengal (b. 28th Oct., 1874).—Joined the service, 22nd Feb., 1901; judge, Calcutta high ct., Nov., 1926; actg. ch. justice, July, 1934, and Nov., 1935; knighted, Jan., 1935; ret'd., Oct., 1936; temp. law member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, June-Nov., 1938.

MUKHARJI, NANI GOPAL (No. 1), late Bengal Civil Service (b. 10th Jan., 1876).—Joined the service, 20th Apl., 1902; munsif, July, 1904; sub-judge, Dec., 1922; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1928; ret'd., Jan., 1931.

MUKHARJI, NIKHIL RANJAN, B.A., late Income Tax Deptt., Bengal (b. Nov., 1877).—Held non-gazetted appt. prior to 1st April, 1914; dep. magte. and dep. collr., March, 1916; inc. tax officer, April, 1922; offg. asst. commr., Nov., 1926; confd., June, 1928; ret'd., Dec., 1932.

MUKHARJI, PANCHU GOPAL, Rai Bahadur, M.A., B.L., late Assam Civil Service (b. 19th Jan., 1878).—Joined the service, 11th March, 1902, as extra asst. commr.; dep. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1906; dep. commr., May, 1925; ret'd., Jan., 1933.

MUKHARJI, SATISH CHANDRA, B.A., late Bihar Civil Service (b. 3rd Nov., 1881).—Joined the service as proby. dep. magte. and dep. collr., 12th Oct., 1903; confd., Nov., 1904; offg. secty. bd. of rev., Aug., 1928; confd., July, 1929; magte. and collr., July, 1929; ret'd., Mar., 1937.

MUKHARJI, SURENDRA NATH, Rai Bahadur, M.A., B.L., late Bihar and Orissa Civil Service (b. 11th Sept., 1877).—Joined the service, 16th Mar., 1906; munsif, Nov., 1907; sub-judge, May, 1922; dist. and sess. judge, June, 1930; ret'd., Sept., 1933.

MUKHARJI, UPANANDA, M.A., Indian Police (b. 21st Dec., 1909).—Joined the service as asst. supt. of police, Bengal, on probn., 12th Mar., 1934; confd., Feb., 1936.

MUKHERJEA, ARUN KUMAR, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 20th Jan., 1915).—Educ. at Zillah Sch., Mymensingh, Calcutta Univ. and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Sept., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1939.

MUKHERJI, PRAMATHA NATH, M.A., late Indian Audit Dept. (b. 18th Nov., 1880).—Joined the service, 26th May, 1902; asst. audit officer, Delhi Province, July, 1913; inspr. of local fund accts., Bengal, Apl., 1915; asst. contr., of war accts., June, 1919; contr. of surplus stores accts., Jan., 1922; dep. acct. genl., Burma, May, 1929; exr., outside audit. office of A.G., Bengal, Oct., 1932; offg. ch. auditor, E.I. Rly. and govt. exr. of accts., B.N. Rly., May, 1933; offg. ch. auditor, E.B. rly., Mar., 1934; offg. dep. ch. accts. officer, ditto, May, 1934; offg. ch. auditor, E.B. rly., Jan., 1935; ret'd., Nov., 1935.

MUL CHAND BIJAWAT, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., Indian Service of Engineers (suptg. engr., United Provs.) (b. 15th Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 13th Oct., 1909; asst. engr., Oct., 1910; exec. engr., Oct., 1918; under-sec. to govt. p.w.d., United Provs., Feb., 1931; offg. suptg. engr., July, 1934; confd., Nov., 1937.

MULK RAJ, CHOPRA, LALA, Indian Service of Engineers (asst. exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 18th Aug., 1906).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 24th July, 1930; apptd. to I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, July, 1931.

MULKANI, GOPALDAS GURBOMAL, M.A., LL.B., Judl. Dept., Bombay (asst. judge) (b. 20th Nov., 1889).—Joined the service, 1st Apl., 1918; asst. judge, Dec., 1934; offg. dist. and sess. judge, variously from May, 1934.

MULLA, H. F., B.A., LL.B., apptd. Solicitor to the Central Govt. at Bombay, April, 1938.

MULLA, T. N. (see Tej Narayan Mulla).

MULLAN, CHARLES SEYMOUR, M.A., Indian Civil Service (dep. commr.) (b. 17th June, 1893).—Educ. at Trinity Coll., Dublin; on mil. service, from Nov., 1915; joined the service, 7th Oct., 1919; served in Assam as asst. commr., from 4th Dec., 1919; presdt., Manipur durbar, June, 1921, to Sept., 1922; offg. under-sec. to govt. of Assam, May, 1924; confd., Jan., 1925; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1929; and again, Mar., 1933; provincial census supt., Assam, April, 1930; commr. of excise, etc., Assam, Nov., 1933; dep. commr., Apl., 1935; reform officer and addl. secty. to govt., Assam, Mar., 1935. secty. educ. and local self govt. depts., Apl., 1937; empl. with cent. bd. of rev., govt. of India, Feb., 1938.

MULLEN, NORMAN ARTHUR JOHN, Indian Police (asst. supt., Burma) (b. 15th Aug., 1909).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Burma, 1st Dec., 1930; confd., June, 1933.

MULLINGS, Sir CLEMENT TUDWAY, C.S.I., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Madras) (b. 9th Apl., 1874).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service, 1st Oct., 1895, as asst. engr.; exec. engr., Oct., 1906; temp. suptg. engr., Nov., 1917; ditto (perm.), April, 1920; dep. sec. to govt., Aug., 1921; offg. chief engr., May, 1925; confd., April, 1926; consulting ch. engr., Cauvery (Mettur) project, May, 1927, to Feb., 1931; C.S.I., March, 1929; ret'd. from I.S.E., July, 1929; knighted, Aug., 1934.

MUMIN, MUHAMMAD ABDUL, see Muhammad Abdul Mumin.

MUNDLE, INDU BHUSAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, United Provs.) (b. 12th June, 1881).—Educ. at Bishop's Coll. Sch., Calcutta, and Calcutta Univ.; apptd., after exam. of 1904; arrived, 29th Dec., 1905, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Oct., 1914; sees and sub-judge, May, 1918; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1922; ditto, 1st grade, Nov., 1934.

MUNGAVIN, GEORGE ALEXANDER GAVIN, O.B.E., late Indo-European Tel. dept. (b. 14th Feb., 1883).—Held non-gazetted appt. from 24th Jan., 1901, to 31st Dec., 1919; asst. supt., Jan., 1920; supt., Nov., 1925; asst. dir., Oct., 1929; ret'd. July, 1931.

MUNISHWAR CHAND, LALA, Rai Bahadur, B.A., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 28th Sept., 1891).—Joined the service, 2nd Dec., 1916; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1931; under-secty. to govt., irrign. bch., Punjab, Feb., 1935, to Mar., 1937.

MUNJE, HARI SHEORAM, RAO BAHADUR, M.A., LL.B., late Central Provs., C.S. (b. 27th Jan., 1878).—Joined the service as munsiif, 12th Mar., 1903; sub-judge, Nov., 1909; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1928; ret'd., Jan., 1933.

MUNN, NAPIER (see Napier-Munn).

MUNNA LAL, RAI BAHADUR, LALA, B.A., LL.B., Judl. Dept., Punjab (b. 5th Aug., 1871).—Joined the service, 15th June, 1888; held non-gazetted appts. to Sept., 1912; extra asst. commr., Sept., 1912; sub-judge, Nov., 1914; member, Sikh Gurdwara tribunal, Nov., 1926.

MUNRO, ALEXANDER SINCLAIR, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and collr., United Provinces) (b. 4th Sept., 1910).—Educ. at Edinburgh Academy and University College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte., Mar., 1937.

MUNRO, CHARLES ALEXANDER, Public Works Dept., Punjab (b. 14th Aug., 1889).—Joined the service as inspr. of draglines, 29th March, 1928; exec. engr., dragline divn., Oct., 1933.

MUNRO, DONALD GEORGE, B.Sc., Indian Agric. Service (b. 4th Apl., 1895).—Apptd. dep. dir. of agric., Madras, 4th Dec., 1920.

MUNRO, GEORGE FRANCIS, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. Jan. 12th 1875).—Apptd. to the I.E.S. as inspr. of schools, Burma, from 5th Feb., 1921; ret'd., Jan., 1931.

MUNRO, JOHN BENNETT LORIMER, late Indian C.S. (b. 20th May, 1905).—Educ. at Univ. of Edinburgh and Corpus Christi Coll. Oxford; joined the service, 15th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr. and jt. magte., July, 1930; under secty. to govt., public dept., Madras, Feb., 1935, to Sept., 1937; ret'd., June, 1939.

MUNSEY, SYDNEY THOMAS HENSMAN, B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 12th Oct., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 11th Oct., 1911; in mil. employ. from 14th Sept., 1915, to 11th Sept., 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. suptg. engr., Mar., 1935.

MURDOCH, JAMES DUNCAN, M.B., Ch.B. (N.Z.), F.R.C.S. (Edin.), Capt., I.M.S. (Supt., Orissa Medical School) (b. 19th Sept., 1900).—Date of first commn., 1st Feb., 1933; granted an ante-date of one year, civil employ. in Orissa from 12th May, 1939.

MURISON, CECIL CHARLES, F.R.C.S.E., D.P.H., D.T.M., Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.).—First commn., 27th Jan., 1900; in mil. employ. to Oct., 1905, when he was transferred to Bombay Presdy. to officiate as civil surgeon, etc.; confd., Feb., 1909; on mil. service, Dec., 1914, to March, 1919; civil surg., Mar., 1919; reverted to milty. employ., June, 1927; ret'd., Jan., 1931.

MURISON, TAYLOR DAVID, Lt.-Col., I.M.S. ret'd. (b. 7th Nov., 1882).—First commission, 1st Aug., 1908; in mil. employ. from Aug., 1908, to May, 1901; on plague duty in Assam, June, 1911; offg. plague officer, United Provs., Nov., 1914; asst. dir. of public health, United Provs., Nov., 1921; offg. dir. of public health, Assam, Dec., 1923; confd., Nov., 1924; offg. inspr.-genl. of civil hosp., Assam, Mar., 1937; ret'd., Nov., 1937.

MURPHY, AFLRED, O.B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th Jan., 1880).—Trained at the R.I.E. Coll.; apptd. asst. engr., Punjab, 3rd Jan., 1904; exec. engr., June, 1912; on mily. service from Oct., 1915, to Oct., 1919; under-sec. to govt. irrign. branch, Nov., 1919; O.B.E., Jan., 1920; offg. suptg. engr., March, 1922; confd., Nov., 1925; offg. ch. engr. and secty. to govt., Punjab irrigation br., Dec., 1930; confd., July, 1932; ret'd. Jan., 1935.

MURPHY, GERALD PATRICK, Lieut.-Col., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 8th May, 1888).—First commn. 25th Jan., 1908; in mil. employ till April, 1913, when he was apptd. asst. pol. agent (on probn.); on mil. service, Dec. 1914, to Dec., 1920; asst. resdt., Aden, Dec., 1920; asst. pol. agent, April, 1921; asst. resdt., Aden, April, 1923; pol. agent and British consul, Muscat, Sept., 1926; ditto, Banas Kantha, Mar., 1931; pol. agent, Sahar Kantha, Apl., 1933; ditto, Western Kathiawar, May, 1933; septy. to A.G.G., Eastern states and pol. agent, Sambalpur, Oct., 1935; A.G.G., Eastern States (in addn.), Mar., 1937; pol. agent, Sambalpur, Mar., 1937; resdt. for Kolhapur and Deccan States, Oct., 1937; resdt. for Madras States, Jan., 1939.

MURPHY, JOHN JAMES CHRISTOPHER, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Burma) (b. 24th Dec., 1896).—Educ. at Sandhurst and Univ. Coll., Dublin; joined the service, 1st Nov., 1921; arrived, 22nd Dec., 1921, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, April, 1925; confd., Feb., 1931; regr., high ct., Rangoon, July, 1933, to Nov., 1936.

MURPHY, PATRICK WILLIAM, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th July, 1877).—Educ. at St. Peter's Coll., Wexford, and Univ. Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1899; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1900 and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr., asst. settlmt. offr. and settlmt. offr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Mar., 1910; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; mag. and collr. and settl. offr., Sept., 1913; dir. of land records and surveys, from July, 1916; dep. commr., Oct., 1921; offg. commr., Oct., 1923; Aug., 1925, and again, May, 1927; confd., Dec., 1928; member, bd. of rev., Dec., 1931; retd., Dec., 1935.

MURPHY, SIR STEPHEN JAMES, Kt., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th June, 1875).—Educ. at Framlingham Coll., and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1898; arrived, 24th Nov., 1899, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag. and asst. judge; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1917; remembr. of legal affairs, and sec. to govt., legal dept., Nov., 1922; judl. commr., states of Western India, Oct., 1924; dist. and sess. judge, May, 1928; offg., judge, high ct., Bombay, June, 1928; confd., April, 1929; actg. ch. justice, high ct., Bombay, Apl., 1934; retd., June, 1935; knighted, June, 1935.

MURPHY, TERENCE ARTHUR, Income Tax dept., Bombay (asst. commr. of inc. tax) (b. 29th Dec., 1888).—Appointed to income tax dept. of central board of revenue, 12th May, 1907; asst. commr. of income tax, Sind, Apr., 1924; ditto, Bombay city, Dec., 1932.

MURRAY, SIR ALEXANDER ROBERTSON, K.C.I.E., C.B.E. (presdt. spl. tariff bd) (b. 29th Nov., 1872).—Presdt. associated chambers of commerce of India and Ceylon, 1920; member, RI. commn. on Indian currency and finance, 1925-1926; member, RI. commn. on Indian labour, 1929-1931; presdt., spl. tariff bd., Oct., 1935; K.C.I.E., June, 1936.

MURRAY, COLIN ROBERT BAILLIE, Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 12th Feb., 1892).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 17th Nov., 1911; supt., Feb., 1923; cent. intell. offr., B. and O., Feb., 1936.

MURRAY, DUNCAN CAMERON, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 26th April, 1916).—Educ. at Hymer's College, Hull, and Oriel College, Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; conf., 14th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Assam as asst. commr.

MURRAY, HERBERT EDWARD, Lt.-Col. I.M.S. (surg. supt. P.G. hosp., Calcutta) (b. 19th May, 1889).—Joined the service, 8th Dec., 1915; apptd. surg. supt., P.G. Hospital, Calcutta, March, 1933.

MURRAY, SIR HUGH, C.I.E., C.B.E., late India Forest Dept. —Joined the service, 30th Nov., 1882, as asst. consr.; dep. consr., Dec., 1887; consr., July, 1905; retd., Jan., 1911; C.I.E., Dec., 1911; asst. forestry commr. of England and Wales; Kt., Jan. 1924.

MURRAY, PETER, B.A., Burma C.S., C.I. (asst. commr.) (b. 18th July, 1915).—Educ. at Portsmouth Grammar Sch., and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 6th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Dec., 1938, and served as asst. commr.

MURRAY, PETER FRANK WILFRED, Indian Police (b. 18th June, 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Madras, on probn., Dec., 1937.

MURRAY, WALTER, late Indian Police (b. 21st Oct., 1880).—Held non-gazetted appt. from 5th July, 1899; inspr., July, 1906; apptd. to I.P.S. as supt., 1st May, 1930; retd., Oct., 1935.

MURRELL, WILLIAM LEE, B.C.E., A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Bihar) (b. 26th Feb., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1925; suptg. engr., March, 1939.

MURSHED, KHONDKAR GHOLAM (see Khondkar Gholam Morshed).

MURTI, NORI GOPALAKRISHNA, B.E., Ind. Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr.) (b. 16th Feb., 1910).—Asst. exec. engr., Bombay, Aug. 1932.

MURTI, N. V. SHRINIVAS, B.A., B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bombay) (b. 5th Nov., 1895).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 21st July, 1920; asst. exec. engr., July, 1921; offg. exec. engr., Dec., 1925; confd., July, 1930.

MURTRIE, MERVYN DAVID, India Posts and Telegraphs (presidency postmaster) (b. 14th Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, Oct., 1914; gazetted postmaster, Oct., 1925; presidency postmaster, Jan., 1938.

MUSHAN, SHAMNATH, Barr., late Legislative Dept., Govt. of India (b. Nov., 1883).—Joined the service as 2nd asst. solicitor, 15th July, 1921; asst. solicitor, March, 1928; 2nd solicitor, Apl., 1933; retd., Sept., 1938.

MUSHTAQ AHMAD, B.Sc., B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 14th Feb., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Bengal, 4th Dec., 1925; transferred to Punjab from 19th Oct., 1920; dep. consvr., Dec., 1929.

MUSPRATT, SIR SYDNEY FREDERICK, K.C.B., C.S.I., C.I.E., D.S.O., General I.A., (sacty., milty. dept., India Office) (b. 11th Sept., 1878).—First commn., 22nd Jan., 1898; 12th Cav., 1st Apl., 1900, to 29th Aug., 1921; staff capt. (intell.) and G.S.O. 3, June, 1906-June, 1910; brigade-major, Dec., 1914-June, 1915; G.S.O. 2, June-Dec., 1915; A.A. and Q.M.G., Dec., 1915-Jan. 1918; G.S.O.I., Jan. 1918, to Oct., 1920; dep. dir. (intell.), Nov.-Dec., 1920; A.D.C. to

King, June, 1921, to June, 1929; G.S.O.R. War Office, Feb., 1922, to July, 1925; D.D.MO., and I., War Office, Aug.-Oct., 1925; brigade-comdr., Nov., 1925, to Oct., 1927; dir. milty. operations, Nov., 1927, to Oct., 1929; dep. ch. of general staff, Dec., 1929; secty., milty. dept., India Office, Sept., 1931, to Nov., 1933; and again, Oct., 1937; G.O.C., Peshawar Dist., Nov., 1933. War Services.—N.W. Frontier, 1908; Intell. officer, Zakka Khel Mohmand, medal, with clasp. War of 1914-21—France and Belgium, Nov., 1914, to June, 1918; 4 times mentioned in despatches. Brev. of Lt.-Col.; Legion of Honour, 5th class; Order of the Sacred Treasure, 3rd class; Order of the Crown of Siam, 3rd class; D.S.O.

MUSTAFA, GHULAM, KHAN SAHIB CHAUDHRI, B.A., Punjab C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. Apr., 1889).—Joined the service, 10th Feb., 1913; offg. dep. commr., Apr., 1929; confid., May, 1936.

MUSTAFA, SAIYID GHULAM, A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Sind.) (b. 14th July, 1895).—Joined the service as asst. engr., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1926.

MUSTILL, FREDERICK JOHN, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 6th Oct., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 27th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., Nov., 1928.

MUSTO, SIR ARNOLD ALBERT, Kt., C.I.E., M. Inst. C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 4th Oct., 1883).—Joined as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1907; exec. engr., Oct., 1915; C.I.E., Jan., 1923; suptg. engr. (sub-tempy.), July, 1923; Kt., June, 1932; ret'd., Aug., 1934.

MUTKEKAR, SATWAJI GUNDONJI, B.Ag. (Bom.), M.Sc. (Mass.), Indian Agric. Service (dep. dir. of agric., Central Provs.) (b. 22nd Mar., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. dir. of agric., Dec., 1920; dep. dir. of agric., Dec., 1923.

MUTSADDI, LAL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 6th Aug., 1913).—Educ. at Shambhoo Dayal High School, Ghaziabad, Agra Univ., Allahabad Univ., London School of Oriental Studies, and Fitzwilliam House, Cambridge; joined the service 20th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in the U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

MUZAFFAR HUSSAIN, KHAN BAHADUR, Indian State Ry. (dir., rly. bd.) (b. 8th Nov., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 10th Oct., 1910; exec. engr., Oct., 1918; offg. dep. ch. engr., N.W. rly., variously from Apr., 1932; offg. divl. supt. (senr.), Apr., 1936; dep. ch. engr. (prov. perm.), Jan., 1936; dir., rly. bd., Jan., 1938.

MUZAFFAR KHAN, NAWAB, Khan Bahadur, Khan, C.I.E., late Punjab Civil Service (b. 2nd Jan., 1880).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1905; held non-gazetted appts. to July, 1912; extra asst. commr., July, 1912; dir. of information, Jan., 1925; elections commr. and jt. secty. to govt., transferred depts., Nov., 1925; C.I.E., June, 1931; reforms commr., Oct., 1932; member, govt.'s exec. council, Punjab, Feb., 1935, to April, 1937.

MUZAFFAR, SHAIKH-UD-DIN, M.A., M.Sc. (Punjab), Ph.D. (Cantab.). Public Works Dept., Punjab (b. 24th Sept., 1896).—Apptd. prof. of science, MacLagan engrg. coll., 22nd June, 1924.

MUZUMDAR, V. D. (asst. commr. of income-tax) (b. 4th Feb., 1893).—Joined the service, June, 1923; held non-gaz. posts, Apr., 1918, to May, 1923; income-tax offcr., Feb., 1924, to Feb., 1934; asst. commr., Sind, Mar., 1937.

MYAING, U THAN, Indian Police. —Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Burma, 26th Jan., 1933.

MYERS, Miss KATHLEEN MABEL, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (princl., Queen Mary's coll. Madras) (b. 14th Jan., 1891).—Apptd. addl. prof., Queen Mary's coll., Madras, 26th Mar., 1921; prof., ditto, Dec., 1925; principl., ditto, Mar., 1936.

MYSORE SUBBA, RAO, B.A. (Mysore), Indian C.S. (jt. magt. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 25th Oct., 1907).—Educ. at Govt. High School, Bangalore, Mysore Univ. and School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1930; joined the service, Oct., 1931, and served in B. and O. as asst. magt. and collr.

NADGIR, YESHWANT GOVIND, M.S. (b. 12th Sept., 1881).—Joined the service as asst. surgn., 20th May, 1906; prof. of anatomy, Grant Med. Coll., Bombay, June, 1913; ret'd., Sept., 1932.

NADKARNI, LAXMIKANT MADHAVBAO, B.A., M.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 3rd Mar., 1915).—Educated at Elphinstone High School, Bombay, Bombay University, London School of Economics and London School of Oriental Studies; appointed on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; conf., 12th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

NAG, BALWANT SINGH (see Balwant, N. S.).

NAG, KHAGENDRA CHANDRA, M.B.E., B.A. (Cal.), Barr., late Bengal Judicial Service (b. 10th July, 1881).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1921; addl. judge, high ct., Calcutta, Apr., 1933; ret'd., Nov., 1936.

NAGARATNAM AYYAR, GOPALASWAMI, B.A., B.E., Indian Educl. Service (princl., coll. of engrg., Guindy) (b. 16th May, 1881).—Apptd. addl. prof. of civil engrg., Madras, Dec., 1920; prinpl., coll. of engrg., Guindy, June, 1927.

NAGARKAR, CHANDRAKANT BALVANTRAO, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bombay) (b. 28th Aug., 1894).—Educ. at Wilson Coll., Bombay, and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 6th Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and magt.; judge and sess. judge, May, 1930; regr. high ct., Bombay, June, 1931 to June, 1935.

NAGARKATTI, KRISHNA NARAYANA, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provinces) (b. 5th March, 1905).—Educ. at University of Mysore and Peterhouse Coll., Cambridge; joined the service 10th Oct., 1929; arrived 15th Nov., 1929, and served in the Central Provinces as asst. commr.; offg. dept. commr., June, 1933.

NAGARVALA, JAMSHID DORAB, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bombay) (b. 13th Nov., 1914).—Apptd. on probn., 2nd Feb., 1937; confid., Sept., 1938.

NAGENDRA SINGH, MAHARAJ, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., C.P.) (b. 18th Mar., 1914).—Educ. at Ajmer Coll., Agra Univ., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confid., 15th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the C.P. as asst. commr.

NAGINLAL VENILAL DESAI (see Desai, N. V.).

NAGLE, JAMES NICHOLAS EASTMAN (see Eastman Nagle).

NAIDU, G. NARASIMHULU (see Narasimhulu Naidu G.).

NAIDU SIRAM LAKSHMINARASINGHA RAO, Indian State Railways (dist. traffic supt., E.B. rly.) (b. 7th Dec., 1890).—Joined the service, 3rd July, 1911; dist. traffic supt., Mar., 1931; statistical officer, E. B. rly., Mar., 1931.

NAIFF, JOHN CALVERLEY, B.A., Burma C.S. (Cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 31st Oct., 1913).—Educ. at Hanley High School, Stoke-on-Trent, and St. John's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 28th September, 1937; arrived in Burma, Nov., 1937, and served as asst. commr.

NAIK, SHRIDHAR ATMARAM, late Judl. Dept., Bombay (b. 9th Mar., 1875).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 18th May, 1903, to 31st Aug., 1906; sub-judge, Sept., 1906; judge, small cause ct., Poona, Nov., 1927; retd., Mar., 1930.

NAIR (see also Nayar).

NAIR, PALAT GOVINDAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Madras) (b. 20th May, 1916).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 27th Sept., 1938; arrived in India Oct., 1938, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.

NAIR, THEKATH KUMARAN, B.A. (Mad.), B.Sc. (B'ham), Indian State Rlys. (chemist and metallurgist, E.I. Rly.) (b. 16th Mar., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. chemist and metallurgist, 2nd Aug., 1915; offg. chemist and metallurgist, July, 1916; confd., July, 1917.

NAIR, UNNI KANNAN, Local Fund Audit Dept., Burma (asst. examr.) (b. 15th Apr., 1886).—Previous service in non-gazetted appts. from 15th April, 1908; divl. auditor, Feb., 1925; offg. asst. examr., May, 1926; confd., Sept., 1926; offg. examr., June, 1931.

NAJABAT HUSAIN, KHAN BAHADUR, B.L., late Bihar and Orissa Civil Service (b. 24th July, 1879).—Joined the service, 24th May, 1907; offg. munsif, Nov., 1909; confd., June, 1910; sub-judge, Feb., 1922; dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1931; retd., Oct., 1934.

NAMBIYAR, AMANDA KALOTH KUNHIRAMAN (see Kunhiraman Nambiyar, A. K.).

NAMJOSHI, VINAYAK KRISHNA, B.A., late Bombay C.S. (b. 5th Oct., 1878).—Joined the service, 18th May, 1900; administrator, Cambay State, from 18th April, 1918, to 10th June, 1929; collr. and dist. mag., March, 1922; retd., Oct., 1930.

NANAK SINGH, Sardar Sahib Sardar, late Punjab Civil Service (b. 1st Mar., 1889).—Extra asst. commr., Sept., 1913; dep. commr., Sept., 1936; retd., Jan., 1939.

NANA RAO, TANJORE KRISHNARAO, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 15th Mar., 1892).—Joined the service, 16th Dec., 1916; dep. acct. genl., B. and O., Jan., 1934; ditto, Madras, May, 1935; dep. govt. examr. of accts., B.B. and C.I. Rly., July, 1937; chief auditor, Burma Rlys., Oct., 1938.

NANAVATI, ERACH MANEKSHAH, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 12th July, 1877).—Educ. at Surat High Sch., Bombay Univ., and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1900; arrived, 19th Dec., 1901, and served in the United Provs. as asst. commr. and asst. mag.

and collr.; jt. mag., July, 1911; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1919; offg. judge, chief ct. of Oudh, March, 1928; offg. secty. to govt., legal dept.; judge, ch. ct., Oudh, Mar., 1930; retd., July, 1937.

NAND GOPAL, DIWAN, Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., central p.w.d.).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 24th July, 1931; apptd. to I.S.E., as asst. exec. engr., Punjab, July, 1932; transfd. to central p.w.d., Apr., 1935.

NAND GOPAL, LALA, A.M.I.E. (Ind.), Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab.) (b. 1st Mar., 1894).—Joined the service, 8th Oct., 1917; asst. engr., Oct., 1918; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1927.

NAND KISHORE, RAI BAHADUR, LALA, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th Nov., 1883).—Joined the service, 29th Sept., 1906; asst. engr., Sept., 1907; exec. engr., Sept., 1915; offg. supt., April, 1926; retd., Jan., 1933.

NANJAPPA, VENKATASUBRAMANIER, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 26th Jan., 1911).—Educ. at Government Collegiate High School, Bangalore, Mysore University, University College, London, and Jesus College, Oxford; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

NAPIER, ALEXANDER, Capt., I.A. Indian Political Service (b. 7th Sept., 1904).—First commn., 26th Aug., 1924; in military employ to Nov., 1930; under-secty. to A.G.G., in C.I., Apr., 1932; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, Dec., 1933; asst. commr., Kohat, Dec., 1936; asst. commr. and city magte., Peshawar, Apr., 1937; under secty. to resdt., Hyderabad, Nov., 1937; v. consul, Khoramshar, Dec., 1938.

NAPIER, ALEXANDER HARPER, M.D., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., retd., late Civil Medl. Dept., Bihar and Orissa (b. 28th Sept., 1880).—First commn. dated 2nd Feb., 1907; in mil. employ up to 19th May, 1922; civil surg., May, 1922; retd., Mar., 1932.

NAPIER-MUNN, Rev. WILLIAM ERNEST, Indian Eccl. Estabt. (b. 25th Apr., 1886).—Senior chaplain, United Provs., apptd. junr. chaplain, 21st Apr., 1929; senior chaplain, April, 1939.

NAQVI, ABU TALIB, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provinces) (b. 1st March, 1907).—Educ. at Allahabad University and Oriel College, Oxford; joined the service, 14th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and collr.; on spec. duty at govt. h.q., Nov., 1937.

NAQVI, GHAZANFAR ALI (see Ghazanfar, A.N.).

NARA SIMHAM, RAMASWAMY LAKSHMI, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 27th Sept., 1906).—Educ. at Madras University and New College, Oxford; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1935.

NARAHARI RAO, VYAKARANA, C.I.E., M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 6th July, 1893).—Joined the service, 5 Mar., 1917; dep. acct. genl. posts and tels., May, 1923, under-secty., fin. dep., Govt. of India, Aug., 1924; offg. asst. secty., ditto, Nov., 1927; offg. under secty. govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., Apr., 1929; addl. dep. secty., ditto, Mar., 1933; temp. jt. secty.,

ditto, in addn., Aug., 1936; addtl. dep. secty., and Crown fin. officr., pol. dept., Apl., 1937; C.I.E., May, 1937.

NARASIMHA AYYANGAR, RAJAGOPALA AYYANGAR, Diwan Bahadur, B.A., B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. Sept., 1881).—Joined the service, 10th Feb., 1904; asst. engr., Feb., 1908; exec. engr., Feb., 1915; offg. suptg. engr., Aug., 1928; confd., Apl., 1931; offg. ch. engr., Sept., 1933; confd., Jan., 1934; ret'd., Sept., 1936.

NARASIMHAM PANTULU, MANTHRIPRAGADA, Rao Bahadur, Madras C.S. (member, Madras public services commn.) (b. 1882).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1894; dep. collr., Mar., 1919; offg. collr., May, 1932; member, Madras public services commn., Feb., 1935.

NARASIMHAN, CHAKRAVARTHI VIJARAGHAVA, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub-collr. and jt. mag., Madras) (b. 21st May, 1915).—Educ. at National High School, Trichinopoly, Madras Univ., and St. Catherine's Society, Oxford; joined the service, 23rd Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Oct., 1937, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., March, 1939.

NARASIMHULU, NAIDU G., Rao Bahadur, B.A., B.L., Indian Posts and Telegraphs (dir. p. and t.) (b. 9th Oct., 1887).—Joined the service as proby. supt., 22nd Dec., 1910; confd., 3rd July, 1912; asst. dep. dir. genl., Sept., 1935; dep. P.M.G., July, 1937; dir. posts and tels., S. and B. circle, June, 1938.

NARAYAN, APPADWADULA LAKSHMI, M.A., D.Sc., Meteorological Dept. (director, Kodai-kanal) (b. 15th July, 1890).—Joined service as meteorologist on probn., 18th Dec., 1928; confd., 18th Dec., 1930; asst. dir., ditto, Jan., 1934; again, Jan., 1937; dir., March, 1937.

NARAYAN, BRIJ (see Brij Narayan).

NARAYAN, JAGAT (see Jagat N.).

NARAYAN, PANDIT HARI (see Pandit Hari Narayan).

NARAYAN, PRAG (see Prag, N.).

NARAYAN, RAJ (see Narayan).

NARAYAN, SHIV, M.A., B.Sc. (Punj.), B.E., M.Sc. (U.S.A.), Mem. A.I.E.E., A.M.I.E.E. (Lond.), A.M.I.E. (India), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 12th Nov., 1883).—Apptd. prof. of physics and elec. engr., coll. of engrg., Poona, March, 1921; offg. prinpl., ditto, June, 1932; ret'd., Nov., 1938.

NARAYAN, S. L. (see Lokur, Narayan Swamirao).

NARAYAN, SRI (see Sri Narayan).

NARAYANA AYYAR, RAJAPPAYA, Barr., late Indian C.S. (Madras) (b. 8th July, 1876).—Educ. at Madras University and King's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1890; arrived, 25th Dec., 1900, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr. and jt. mag., May, 1910; dist. and sessions judge, May, 1923; ret'd., Sept., 1930.

NARAYANA KUDVA, VENKATARAYA (see Kudva, V. N.).

NARAYANA RAI, AJILIDAY, Indian Police (asst. supt., Madras) (b. 28th Jan., 1908).—Apptd. proby. asst. supt., Madras, 7th Mar., 1932; confd., Mar., 1934.

NARAYANAN NAIR, KOYAMAN, India Posts and Telegraphs (depy. postmaster-genl.) (b. 16th Nov., 1888).—Joined the service as proby. supt., Nov., 1912; confd., April, 1916; depy. postmaster-genl., April, 1939.

NARAYANASWAMI AYYAR, OMBATHIVELI RAMASWAMI AYYAR, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 2nd Aug., 1904).—Apptd. asst. exec. engr., Madras, 16th Aug., 1929; exec. engr., Aug., 1938.

NARAYANASWAMI, BRAHMADESAM SUBRAMANYA, M.A., Mil. Accts. Dept. (b. 10th Dec., 1890).—Joined the service as officr., Cl. II, Oct., 1923.

NARENDRA NATH SEN, B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., United Provs.) (b. 1st Feb., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 5th Dec., 1924; dep. consvr., April, 1929.

NARGOLWALA, SAVAK DINSHAW, B. Com., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 5th June, 1915).—Educated at Zoroastrian High School, Deolali, Bombay University, London School of Economics and London School of Oriental Studies; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 8th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.
