ROSSITER, EDWARD MORGAN, Civil Aviation Directorate (technical offcr., temp.) (b. 23rd Oct., 1895).—Joined the service as tech. offcr., 23rd Apl., 1936.

ROTHWELL, WALTER, late Indian State Rlys. (G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 31st July, 1886).—Joined the service, 21st July, 1911; asst. carr. and wagon supt., April, 1919; dist. ditto, Feb., 1923; works manager, May, 1925; offg. dep. ch. mech. engr., Nov., 1928; ret'd., May, 1932.

ROUGHTON, NOEL JAMES, C.S.I., C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (estabt. offr. to govt. of India) (b. 25th Dec., 1885).—Educ. at Winchester, and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived 22nd Nov., 1909, and served in the Central Provs. as asst., commr.; regr., judl. commr.'s court, July, 1913; under-sec. to chief commr., Jan., 1918 to March, 1919; dep. commr. (provl.), Dec., 1920; confid., Nov., 1921; dir. of industries and regr. of co-op. societies, Central Provs., July, 1923; dep. sec. to govt. of India, commerce dept., June, 1925; finl. secty. to govt., C.P., April, 1928; C.I.E., Jan., 1933; offg. commr., Feb., 1933; confid., July, 1934; offg. ch. secty. to govt., U.P., May, 1933; member, govr.'s exec. council, Central Provs. (temp.), Nov., 1934, and again, May, 1936; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., Nov., 1936; member-secy., tariff bd., May, 1938; C.S.I., June, 1938; estabt. offr. to govt. of India, Jan., 1939.

ROUPPELL, KATHLEEN ZELIA, India Audit Office (higher clerical officer) (b. 11th Mar., 1890).—Apptd. clerical officer, 6th Jan., 1922; higher clerical officer, July, 1935.

ROUSE, SIR ALEXANDER MACDONALD, Kt., C.I.E., F.C.H., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 14th Sept., 1878).—Trained at the R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1900; personal asst. to chief engr., and under sec. to govt., United Provs., Nov., 1907; exec. engr., and ditto, Oct., 1908; temp. transfed. to Delhi, Jan., 1912; supt. of works, Delhi, Aug., 1912; C.I.E., Jan., 1913; temp. supt. engr., Delhi, Aug., 1916; supt. engr., June, 1921; offg. chief engr. and sec. to govt., March to Nov., 1924, and from April, 1925; confid., Oct., 1926; Kt., Jan., 1930; ch. engr., central public wks. dept., Apl., 1930; ret'd., Aug., 1933.

ROUSE, WILLIAM PERCY MEADOWS, Indian Police (b. 24th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., N.W.F.P., 17th Nov., 1926.

ROUT, REGINALD ALAN B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th Sept., 1884).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1906; exec. engr., Oct., 1915; offg. supt. engr., March, 1928; confid., Aug., 1932; ret'd. Sept., 1939.

ROUTLEDGE, BRYAN HOWARD, Indian Police (supt., Assam) (b. 14th Apl., 1903).—Joined the service, 25th Nov., 1922; deputed to Sardah Police training coll. in Bengal to 16th May, 1924; proby. asst. supt., May, 1924; confid., Nov., 1924; offg. supt., Oct., 1932; confid., Feb., 1933.

ROW, KODIKAL SANJIVA (see Sanjiva, Row K.).

ROW, RAGHVENDRA, O.B.E., M.D., D.Sc. (Lond.), late Medical dept., Bombay (b. 16th Nov., 1871).—Apptd. prof., G.M. Coll., Bombay, 2nd July, 1926; K-i-H. medal, 1st class, Dec., 1911; O.B.E., Dec., 1919; ret'd., Dec., 1931.

ROWBOTHAM, CLAUDE JOHN, late Indian Forest Service (b. 7th July, 1884).—Joined the service, 9th Nov., 1907, as asst. consr.; on mil. service from Sept., 1916, to May, 1920; dep. consvr., Oct., 1922; offg. consvr., Aug., 1928; ret'd., July 1932.

ROWE, ALBERT JOHN, Office of High Commr. for India (higher executive officer, accts. dept.) (b. 23rd Oct., 1892).—Apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 12th Nov., 1913, and att'd. to acctnt.-gen.'s dept.; services lent to high commr. for India, from Oct., 1920; exec. officer, April, 1922; actg. higher exec. officer, April, 1925; confd., April, 1926.

ROWE, BERTRAM ALFRED, Indian Police (b. 14th Jan., 1918).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., Nov., 1938.

ROWLAND, FRANCIS GEORGE, B.A., Indian C.S. (judge, high ct., Patna) (b. 14th Aug., 1883).—Educ. at Harrow and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of, 1905; arrived, 29th Nov., 1906, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1913; attaché, legisl. dept., govt. of India, April, 1917; dist. and sess. judge, and ditto, July, 1917; offg. dep. sec., legisl. dept., govt. of India, Oct., 1917; addl. legal rembr., Bihar and Orissa, Jan., 1918; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1919; judicial commr., Nov., 1923; offg. judge, high ct., Patna, variously from June, 1929; addl. judge, ditto, variously from March, 1931; judge, high ct., Patna, Aug., 1936.

ROWLAND, JAMES WALTER, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 20th Apl., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 3rd Dec., 1909; on milty. duty from April, 1915, to Feb., 1919; supt. of police, Dec., 1922; offg. commr., Bombay, Feb., 1936; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1938.

ROWLAND, JOHN EDWARD MAURICE, Indian State Rlys. (chief rly. commr., Burma) (b. 30th Apl., 1882).—Joined the service as asst. engr. (temp.), 24th May, 1904; ditto (perm.), July, 1909; dist. engr., Mar., 1919; offg. variously as ch. and dep. ch. engr., from June, 1927; confd. as dep. ch. engr., June, 1929; offg. ch. engr., May, 1933; and again, Dec., 1934; confd., Mar., 1935; offg. agent, Burma Rlys., Feb., 1935; confd., Oct., 1935; chief rly. commr., Apl., 1937.

ROWLAND, THEODORE, India Office (higher executive officer, military dept.) (b. 20th July, 1892).—Apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 6th May, 1912, and att'd. to registry and record dept.; transfed. to mil. dept., Jan., 1917; on mil. service from Dec., 1915, to March, 1919; exec. officer, April, 1922; dep. reading clerk to council, Feb., 1926, to Feb., 1932; actg. hr. exec. officer, Jan.-July, 1932; confd., Mar., 1933.

ROWLANDSON, EDMUND JAMES, C.I.E., late Indian Police (b. 27th Oct., 1882).—Joined the service, 12th Nov., 1903, as probr.; asst.

supt., July, 1906; supt., April, 1914; offg. asst. inspr.-gen., April, 1924; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., Mar., 1927; offg. commr. of police, Madras, July, 1929; confd., May, 1930; C.I.E., June, 1932; offg. inspr.-gen., Apl., 1933; ret'd., Dec., 1935.

ROWNTREE, HAROLD KIRKBY, M.C., M.B., Lt.-Col. (ret'd.), late I.M.S. (b. 27th Oct., 1887).—First commn. dated 27th July, 1912; in mil. employ up to 15th Oct., 1922; civil surg. (Punjab), Oct., 1922; ditto, Simla (East), May, 1925; ret'd., Sept., 1938.

ROWNTREE, JOHN BATEMAN, Indian Forest Service (asst. consvr., Assam) (b. 5th Apl., 1906).—Joined the service as proby. asst. consvr., 11th Oct., 1929; confd., Oct., 1930.

ROXBURGH, JAMES, late India Office (b. 8th Apl., 1875).—Clerk, 2nd class, 30th Dec., 1895; minor staff clerk, Dec., 1911; services lent to mil. dept., March, 1915, to July, 1921; staff clerk, Feb., 1920; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; seconded for duty in finl. dept., Jan., 1934; ret'd., Feb., 1936.

ROXBURGH, THOMAS JAMES YOUNG, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 2nd March, 1892).—Educ. at Merchant Taylors' Schl. and Magdalene Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1914; arrived in India, Dec., 1915, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; I.A.R.O., Aug., 1916, to Feb., 1919; jt. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1920; offg. chief presy. mag., Calcutta, June, 1923; confd., May, 1927; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; offg. secty. to govt., judl. dept., Bengal, Feb., 1935; judl. secty., Bengal, Apl., 1937.

ROY (see also Ray).

ROY, AMULYA NATH, B.A., late India Posts and Tels. (Bihar and Orissa) (b. July, 1875).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 6th April, 1898; proby. supt., Sept., 1903; supt., Feb., 1906; dep. postmaster-genl., July, 1927; ret'd., July, 1930.

ROY, BEJOY KUMAR, M.A., Indian Forest Service, M.A., B.Sc. (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 4th Mar., 1896).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 11th Dec., 1920; dep. consvr., Dec., 1924.

ROY, CHANDRA BALI, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 9th Aug., 1894).—Joined the service, 16th Oct., 1916; asst. engr., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1920; offg. exec. engr., Nov., 1924; confd., Oct., 1926.

ROY, SIR GANENDRA PRASAD, Kt., M.I.E.E., late Posts and Telegraph Dept.—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the telegraph service, 1st Oct., 1894, as asst. supt.; supt., Feb., 1909; ditto, and dep. postmr.-gen., April, 1914; supt., telegraph engrg., Oct., 1914; dir., ditto, Oct., 1916; offg. chief engr., telegraphs, March, 1921; knighted, July, 1926; ret'd., April, 1927.

ROY, HEMENDRA MOHAN, Rai Bahadur, B.A., late Indian Audit Dept. (b. 23rd June, 1881).—Joined the service, 22nd June, 1904; dep. acct. genl., Burma, July, 1929; dep. acct. genl., Burma, Apl., 1936; ret'd., June, 1936; re-employed from Sept., 1936.

ROY, JAMES LEISHMAN, A.M.I.C.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 29th Apl., 1893).—Joined the service, as asst. engr., Oct., 1915; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; under secty. to govt., irrigation bch., Aug., 1932; under secty. (construction) Punjab irrig. sectt., Jan., 1933; ditto (north), May, 1933.

ROY, KEITH COTTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 26th July, 1912).—Educated at Wyggeston Grammar School, Leicester, University College, London, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, Dec., 1935; arrived in India, Jan., 1936, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

ROY, PARESH LAL, M.A., Indian State Rlys. (dist. traffic supt., E.B. Rly.) (b. 20th Dec., 1893).—Asst. traffic supt., Nov., 1919; dist. ditto, Jan., 1937.

ROY, SATYENDRA NATH, C.S.I., C.I.E., Indian C.S. (secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of Communications) (b. 23rd Sept., 1888). Educ. at Govt. Sch., Bankura, Bengal, Calcutta Univ., and Christ's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 25th Nov., 1913, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; sec. to prov. committee to consider proposals of pub. serv. commn., Nov., 1917, to Jan., 1918; offg. under sec. to govt. of Bengal, gen. dept., Jan., 1918; ditto, finl. dept., Feb., 1918; employed under Indian def. force, Feb. to June, 1918; on spl. duty, genl. dept. of govt. of Bengal, June, 1918; under sec. to govt. of Bengal, general dept., July, 1918; dep. chairman, Howrah municipality, Oct., 1919, to Nov., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., April, 1921; offg. dep. sec., govt. of Bengal, pol. and appt. dept., Nov., 1925; magte. and coll., Sept., 1927; dep. secty., Indian central commee., Oct., 1928; dep. secty. to govt. of India, home dept., Apl., 1929; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; joint secty., Indian round table conf., London, 3rd session, Nov.-Dec., 1932; offg. addl. secty. to govt., Bengal, pol. dept., Apl., 1933; jt. secty. to the govt. of India, dept. of indus. and lab., July, 1936; offg. secty., ditto, Oct., 1936; secty., dept. of communications, Nov., 1937; C.S.I., June, 1938.

ROY, SATYENDRA NATH (No. II) see RAY.

ROY, SURES CHANDRA, M.Sc., D.Sc., Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 1st Mar., 1899).—Joined the service as meteorologist on probn., 7th Mar., 1927; confd., Mar., 1929; services placed at the disposal of the govt. of Burma with effect from Feb., 1937.

ROY, SUHRID KUMAR, B.Sc., Ph.D., F.G.S., Indian School of Mines (b. 1st Jan., 1895).—Joined the service as prof. of geology, 3rd Jan., 1928.

ROYDS, THOMAS, D.Sc., late Meteorological Dept. (b. 11th Apl., 1884).—Joined the service as asst. dir., 28th Feb., 1911; dir., ditto, Feb., 1923; ret'd. April, 1939.

RUDELL, Rev. J. W. F., B.A., Ind. Eccles. Estabt. (junr. chaplain) (b. 8th Aug., 1896).—Apptd. chaplain, Bombay, on probn., 1st Oct., 1934; junior chaplain, Oct., 1936.

RUMBOLD, HORACE ALGERNON FRASER, B.A., India Office (princl., pol. dept.) (b. 27th Feb., 1906).—Educ. at Wellington and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. asst. principl., Jan., 1929; pte. secty. to parly. under-secty. of state, Apl., 1930; ditto to perm. under-secty. of state, Dec., 1933; actg. principl., Sept. 1934; confd., Apl., 1937.

RUNDLETT, LESLIE ST. CLARE, A.C.G.I., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th Mar., 1891).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1915; on milty. service from 27th Sept., 1918, to 11th May, 1920; asst. exec. engr., May, 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. supt. engr., May, 1933; retired Sept., 1938.

RUPCHAND BILARAM, B.A., LL.B., late Judl. Dept., Bombay (b. 15th May, 1878).—Apptd. addl. judl. commr. (tempy.), June, 1923; confd., Nov., 1925; offg. judl. commr., Sind, Feb., 1933; addl. ditto, July, 1933; ret'd., May, 1938.

RUSBY, LIONEL STUART, late Indian Police (b. 6th Nov., 1896).—Joined the service, 6th Mar., 1923; offg. supt., Bombay, Mar., 1927; supt., Oct., 1932; ret'd., Oct., 1938.

RUSE, VICTOR HAROLD, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 12th Oct., 1915).—Educ. at Wanstead County High Sch., London and Queen's Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 7th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in the U.P., as asst. mag. and collr.

RUSHBROOK WILLIAMS, LAURENCE FREDERIC, C.B.E., M.A., B.Litt., F.R.Hist.S., M.R.A.S.—Educ. at Univ. Coll., Oxford; prof'r. of modern Indian history, Allahabad Univ., 1914 to 1919; dir., central bureau of infn., govt. of India, 1st June, 1919; official historian of Indian tour of H.R.H. the Prince of Wales, 1921-22; pte. sec. to Indian representative at Imperial Conference, 1923; C.B.E., June, 1923; ret'd., Dec., 1925; adviser to Chamber of Princes, India round table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; 3rd session, Nov., 1932.

RUSHTON, HUGH DARRELL, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 6th Nov., 1903).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1923; in milty. employ until 20th May, 1929; pers. asst. to resdt. at Hyderabad, 25th May, 1929; ditto to ch. commr., N.W.F.P., May, 1931; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, May, 1932; asst. commr., Nowshera, Oct., 1933; dist. and sess. judge, Dera Ismail Khan, Oct., 1935; addtl. ditto, Peshawar, July, 1936; asst. commr. Nowshera, Sept., 1938; sec. to pol. resdt. in the Persian Gulf, Mar., 1939; under sec. to resdt. at Hyderabad, Dec., 1939.

RUSHTON, KENNETH CHARLES, late Indian Police Service (Bombay) (b. 13th Oct., 1875).—Joined the service, 20th Jan., 1897; dist. supt., April, 1906; dep. inspr.-gen., May, 1921; awarded King's Police Medal, Jan., 1926; ret'd., Sept., 1930.

RUSSELL, ALEXANDER ALFRED, M.C., Major I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 5th Oct., 1898).—First commn. dated 30th Jan., 1917; in milty. employ prior to 20th April, 1924; supy. asst. commr., Peshawar, March, 1925; secty., Kabul legation, April, 1925; supy. asst. commr., Mardan, Dec., 1926; under secty. to ch. commr., N.W.F.P., Feb., 1927; asst. commr.,

Kohat, April, 1928; under secty. to resdt., Persian Gulf, May, 1928; offg. secty. to ditto, May, 1929; British trade agent, Gyanthe, &c., Nov., 1931; secty. to A.G.G. for Deccan states, Apl., 1934; ditto, states of W.I., Mar., 1935; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Nov., 1936; ditto, Hazara, Dec., 1937; sec. to the resdt. for Rajputana, April, 1939.

RUSSELL, Sir (CHARLES) LENNOX (SOMERVILLE), Kt., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at Rugby and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1891; arrived, 1st Dec., 1893, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; under sec., jud., &c., depts., July, 1898, to Jan., 1902; joint mag. and dep. collr., Feb., 1901; asst. to resdt. in Mysore, and sec. to chief commr., Coorg, Jan., 1902; under sec. to govt. of India, foreign dept., March, 1903; dep. sec., ditto, Oct., 1904; pol. agent, Quetta-Pishin, July to Nov., 1906; divl. and sess. judge, Derajat, Nov., 1907; resdt., Indore, July, 1909; ditto, Mewar, March, 1916; ditto, Baroda, March, 1918; ditto, Hyderabad, July, 1920; Kt., Jan., 1924; ret'd., Aug., 1926.

RUSSELL, EDWARD WILSON, A.M.I.C.E., V.D., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 24th Oct., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 20th Jan., 1911; resdt. engr., April, 1914; on milty. service from 8th June, 1918, to 25th Feb., 1920; offg. divl. transpn. supt., May, 1930; confd., Mar., 1933; offg. dep. contr. of stores, Mar., 1933; offg. dep. agent (works), G.I.P. rly., Mar., 1934; confd., Apl., 1934; ret'd. Feb., 1939.

RUSSELL, HAROLD GEORGE, O.B.E., Indian Police (asst. inspr. genl., Punjab) (b. 24th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 25th Nov., 1922; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1928; offg. supt., Nov., 1932; confd., May, 1937; O.B.E., June, 1936; asst. inspr.-genl., May, 1937.

RUSSELL, JAMES MCCONNELL, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 28th July, 1909).—Educ. at Stranraer High School, Glasgow Univ., and Wadhham College, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Dec., 1932, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., fin. dept., Burma, Feb., 1935; asst. settlement offr., Oct., 1937.

RUSSELL, JAMES WILLIAM, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 2nd May, 1899).—Joined the service, 25th Oct., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1927; confd., Oct., 1931.

RUSSELL, JOSHUA FORBES, O.B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bengal) (b. 4th Feb., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 6th April, 1920; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1925; exec. engr., Oct., 1926.

RUSSELL, LAWRENCE WALTER, Indian Police (asst. supt., Bihar) (b. 6th Jan., 1912).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 10th Nov., 1931; confd., Apl., 1933.

RUSSELL, ROBERT EDWIN, C.I.E., B.A., Indian C.S. (chief sec. to govt. of Bihar) (b. 21st Apl., 1890).—Educ. at Campbell Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 13th Dec., 1913, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; on mil. service from Oct., 1915, to Apl., 1919; addl.

under-sec. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, edn. and munpl. depts., Apl., 1919; offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1922; offg. sec. to govt. rev. dept., Mar., 1927; confd., July, 1928; magte. and collr., Nov., 1928; C.I.E., Jan., 1934; offg. ch. secty. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, Aug., 1934, to Sept., 1936; ch. secty. to govt. Bihar, Mar., 1938.

RUSSELL, ROBERT TOR, C.I.E., D.S.O., F.R.I.B.A. (b. 2nd July, 1888).—Consulting architect, central pub. wks. dept., Oct., 1933.

RUSSELL, STEVEN NOEL, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Orissa) (b. 24th Dec., 1908).—Educ. at King's School, Ely, and King's College, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-secty. to Govt., pol. and appts. depts., Jan., 1936.

RUSSELL, THOMAS BRIAN, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 15th Feb., 1888).—Educ. at Cork Gr. Sch., Univ. Coll., London, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 7th Dec., 1912, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; asst. censor, Madras, Oct., 1914, to Oct., 1915; asst. to agent to govr.-gen., Rajputana, and mag. of Abu, Nov., 1915; 1st asst. to resdt., Baroda, Aug., 1918; sub. collr. and jt. mag., July, 1919; offg. collr. and dist. mag., April, 1924; collr., C. & M. station, Bangalore, Oct., 1924; offg. collr. and dist. magte., June, 1930; confd., Nov., 1930; secty. to govt., local self govt. dept., Madras, Sept., 1934 to Aug., 1937; ret'd. Dec., 1939.

RUSSELL, Sir THOMAS GUTHRIE, K.C.I.E., B.Sc., A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Rlys. (ch. commr. of rlys., rly. bd.) (b. 19th Jan., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 21st Nov., 1913; resdt. engr., Sept., 1919; contr. of stores, Nov., 1923; dep. agent, June, 1925; offg. agent, May, 1927; ch. commr. of rlys., rly. bd., Oct., 1929; Kt., June, 1932; K.C.I.E., May, 1937.

RUSSELL-STRACEY, THOMAS PATRICK, late Indian Finance Dept.—Apptd. asst. sec. to the govt. of Punjab, fin. dept., 28th May, 1902; joined fin. dept., govt. of India, and apptd. asst. acctnt.-gen., Pnnjab, April, 1911; dep. acctnt.-gen., ditto, Aug., 1912; asst. acctnt.-gen., ditto, Oct., 1912; asst. acctnt.-gen., Bombay, July, 1913; ditto, Madras, May, 1914; dep. acctnt., gen., posts and telegraphs, Madras, Nov., 1916; ret'd., 1932.

RUSTAMJEE, K. F., B.Sc. (Hon.), Nagpur, Indian Police (b. 22nd May, 1916).—Apptd. asst. dist. supt., Cent. Provs. and Berar, on probn., 7th Mar., 1938.

RUTHERFORD, ROBERT EWART, V.D., Indian State Rlys. (divl. supt., E.I. Rly.) (b. 22nd Nov., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 3rd Nov., 1906; dist. supt., Sept., 1919; divl. supt., Feb., 1925.

RUTHERFORD, THOMAS GEORGE, C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A., Indian C.S. (secty. to govr., Madras) (b. 25th Sept., 1886).—Educ. at George Watson's College (Edinburgh), Edinburgh and University Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 1st Dec., 1910, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub. collr. and jt. mag., Sept., 1916; on mil. duty, from Nov., 1917, to Dec., 1919; special commr., agency operations,

April, 1924; C.I.E., Jan., 1925; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Jan., 1925; collr. and dist. magte. (provl.), Aug., 1929; confid., Feb., 1930; offg. secty., p.w. and I. dept., Madras, Apl., 1934; offg. commr. of labour, Madras, Mar., 1935; offg. secty., home dept., Madras, June, 1936; offg. second secty., to govt., Madras, June, 1936; offg. inspr.-genl. of prisons, Madras, Nov., 1936; commr. of lab., Nov., 1937; secty. to govt., Apl., 1938; C.S.I., June, 1939.

RUTHNASWAMY, MARIA DOSS, C.I.E., Barr.-at-Law, Principal, Law College, Madras, June, 1928; Member, Madras Public Service Commission, Jan., 1930.

RUTLEDGE, Rev. JAMES WILLIAM RENWICK, M.A., Indian Eccl. Estabt. (b. 26th Aug., 1866) (junr. chaplain).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, Ch. of Scotland, Bombay, 10th Feb., 1928; junr. chaplain, Feb., 1930.

RUTNAM, DONALD ROSS, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 19th Sept., 1901).—Educ. at Ceylon Univ. Coll., Colombo, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1925; arrived, 31st Dec., 1925, and served in Bengal as asst. collr.; asst. commr., Central Provs., Aug., 1926; offg. dep. commr., Jan., 1929; on foreign serv. as admin., Bastar State, Mar., 1931; dep. commr. (provl.), Nov., 1937; confid. Feb., 1939.

RUTLEDGE, HUGH, late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 24th Oct., 1884).—Educ. at Cheltenham Coll., and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 29th Nov., 1909, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; city mag. (temp.), Lucknow, Oct., 1917; jt. mag. and ditto, April, 1918; again city mag., Lucknow, from July, 1918, to Sept., 1920; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1921; mag. and collr., Oct., 1925; dep. commr., Oct., 1925; ret'd., Jan., 1932.

RYALL, Rev. CHARLES RICHARD, LL.D., M.A., B.D., late Indian Eccl. Estabt. (Bombay) (b. 25th Feb., 1877).—Joined 29th April, 1910; junr. chaplain, April, 1913; senr. chaplain, Apl., 1926; ret'd., Oct., 1931.

RYALL, JAMES EDWARD, O.B.E., late Indian Police (b. 21st Oct., 1893).—Joined the service, 21st Oct., 1913; asst. supt., May, 1915; asst. dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Dec., 1919; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1921; dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Aug., 1922; personal asst. to inspr.-gen., Nov., 1922; supt., Oct., 1926; M.B.E., June, 1927; asst. inspr.-genl., govt. rly. police, Punjab, Nov., 1930; O.B.E., Jan., 1934; ret'd., Mar., 1936.

RYAN, CECIL CRAWFORD LINDSAY, Maj. I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 13th Dec., 1897).—First commn., dated 30th Jan., 1917; joined the pol. dept., 21st May, 1923; vice-consul, Ahwaz, May, 1924; ditto, Duzdap, Oct., 1929; under-secty. to agent to govt.-genl., Punjab States, Dec., 1930; asst. to resdt., Kashmir, Nov., 1931; counsellor, British legation, Kabul, Apl., 1934; secty. to pol. resdt. in the Persian Gulf, Nov., 1935; H.M. consul-genl., French estates in India, May, 1937.

RYAN, G. C., Indian Police (b. 21st July, 1914).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, on probn., 22nd Nov., 1934.

RYAN, PATRICK, late Posts and Tels. Dept. (b. 16th Jan., 1888).—Joined the service as

divl. engr., wireless engrg., 22nd Dec., 1920; offg. dir. of wireless, April, 1925; ret'd., Jan., 1933.

SAADAT ALI KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR, AGHA, B.A., late Indian Police (b. 28th Nov., 1883).—Held non-gaz. appts. from 28th Nov., 1905; dep. supt., Jan., 1911; offg. supt., Feb., 1918; confid., Oct., 1931; Khan Bahadur, June, 1933; ret'd. Nov., 1938.

SAADAT-UL-LAH KHAN, Indian Agricl. Service (dep. dir. of agricl.) (b. 14th Apl., 1898).—Joined the service as dep. dir. of agric., Madras, on probn., 24th Jan., 1922; confid., Nov., 1922; agricl. officer, Quetta, Aug., 1932; dep. dir. agric., Madras, Dec., 1934.

SAADULLA, Sir MUHAMMAD, MAULVI SAIVID, KT., M.A., B.L.—Member govt.'s exec. council, Assam, 1st Apl., 1929, to Mar., 1934; chairman of cttee. on public accts., 1933-34; chief minister, Assam, Apl., 1937 to Sept., 1938.

SABHARWAL, LAKHPAT RAI, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (asst. consvr., Bihar) (b. 18th Aug., 1895).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 5th March, 1919; pers. asst. to presdt., forest research inst., Mar., 1936.

SABIHUDDIN, KHAN BAHADUR B.A., Barr.-at Law, Indian Posts and Tels. (dep. p.m.g.) (b. 16th May, 1886).—Joined the service as proby. supdt., 17th June, 1907; confid., Sept., 1909; dep. p.m.g., Aug., 1937; Khan Bahadur, Jan., 1938.

SABINE, HAROLD EDWARD, Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 12th July, 1894).—Joined the service, 6th Dec., 1920, as proby. asst. supt.; confid., May, 1923; addl. supt., Jan., 1926; supt., Aug., 1926.

SABNIS, BHASKAR DATTATRAYA, B.A., LL.B., late Judicial dept., Bombay (b. 30th May, 1876).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 17th Mar., 1903, to 11th Jan., 1909; sub-judge, Jan., 1909; judge, ct. of small causes, Poona, Mar. 1930; ret'd., May, 1931.

SABNIS, TRIMBAK SITARAM, M.Sc., Indian Agricl. Service (economic botanist to govt., United Provs.) (b. 8th June, 1890).—Joined the service, 19th May, 1923; economic botanist, June, 1923.

SACHCHIDANAND, AKHAURI, M.Sc., Indian Police (see AKHAURI, S.).

SACHDEV, MULK RAJ, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 12th Oct., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of the Punjab and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 5th Oct., 1928; arrived, Dec., 1928, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1933.

SACHSE, Sir FREDERIC ALEXANDER, C.S.I., C.I.E., late Indian C.S. (b. 27th Feb., 1878).—Educ. at Liverpool Coll., and Caius Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 15th Dec., 1902, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to E. Bengal and Assam, Oct., 1905; settld. offr. and supt. of survey, Nov., 1908; joint mag. and dept. collr., March, 1909; re-transf. to Bengal, April, 1912; mag. and collr., Dec., 1914; dir. of land records, Bengal, Nov., 1918, to Feb., 1923; offg. commr., Nov., 1923, and Aug., 1925; offg. sec. to govt., rev. dept., Oct., 1926; confid., Feb., 1927; offg. commr., Feb., 1928; member, bd. of rev. in addn., Dec., 1928; C.I.E., Jan.,

1930; member, bd. of rev., May, 1930; C.S.I., June, 1935; retd., Dec., 1937; knighted, Jan., 1938.

SADASHIVA RAU, KALLE RAMA RAU, B.A., late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 16th July, 1884.)—Joined the service, 3rd March, 1908; asst. acctnt.-gen., Madras, Nov., 1909; ditto, United Provs., Nov., 1915; dep. acctnt.-gen., Bengal, Jan., 1919; ditto, Madras, March, 1919; ditto, Bombay, Sept., 1924; ditto, Central Provs., April, 1925; offg. dep. dir., army audit, Jan., 1927; offg. acct.-genl., Central Provs., Mar., 1930; ch. auditor, E.B. Rly., etc., Mar., 1931; offg. dir., rly. clearing accts. office, Apl., 1933; acct.-genl., Madras, May, 1934; dir. of army audit, Dec., 1934; acct.-genl., p. and t., Nov., 1937; retd. July, 1939.

SADASIVAM, PILLAI, DORAI SWAMI, Rao Bahadur, B.A. (Madras), B.Sc. (Tech.), Manch., A.M.C.I. (Manch.), (dep. dir. purchase) (b. 15th June, 1886).—Joined the service, 10th June, 1920, as asst. dir. of industries, Madras (tempy.); apptd. asst. dir. of purchase, Indian Stores Dept., Dec., 1922; dep. ditto, July, 1935.

SADDLER, JAMES, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 13th Sept., 1913).—Educ. at Forfar Academy and St. Andrews Univ.; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 9th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Dec., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

SADASIVAM, TUMULURU RAMAKRISHNIAH, B.A., Finance dept., govt. of India (b. 27th Nov., 1892).—Joined the service as probnr., 9th Feb., 1915; asst. contr., paper currency, Nov., 1916; asst. acct. genl., posts and tels., Madras, 24th June, 1921; asst. acct.-genl., C.P., Oct., 1921; asst. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Calcutta, Mar., 1922; dep. ditto, Oct., 1924; asst. dir. of army audit, W.C., Mar., 1926; ditto, S.C., May, 1927; audit officer, N.W.F.P., Feb., 1930; asst. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Delhi, Jan., 1931; dep. ditto, Jan., 1931, dep. acct.-genl., Bombay, Apl., 1931; attd. officer, office of dir., rly. audit, May, 1932; offg. dep. dir., rly. audit, Jan., 1933; offg. audit officer, L.B. and C.C., Apl., 1934; comptr., Sind, Apl., 1936; dep. dir.-genl., finance, posts and tels., Jan., 1937; acct. gen., Punjab, April, 1939; acct. gen., Bihar, Sept., 1939.

SADHU RAM, CHAUDHRI, B.A., Indian Police (supt.) (b. 24th July, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 6th Oct., 1922; offg. supt., Feb., 1928; confd., Mar., 1934.

SADIK, HAMID GHULAM (see Hamid G. S.).

SADIQ ALI KHAN, AQA, Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 21st Jan., 1886).—Joined the service, 1st Nov., 1910; apptd. to I.P. as supt., Apl., 1934.

SADULLAH, ABUL MUZAFFAR, M.A., Indian Police (b. 28th Feb., 1915).—Apptd. asst. supt., Bengal, on probn., 11th May, 1938.

SADULLAH KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR, late Indian Political Dept. (b. 29th Dec., 1880).—Joined the dept. as asst. commr., Peshawar, on 1st Jan., 1922; city magte., Peshawar, Apl., 1929; dist. judge, Hazara, May, 1930; asst. pol. agent in Southern States of C.I. and in

Malwa, June, 1931; asst. commr., Tonk, Mar., 1932; dep. commr., Bannu, June, 1934; retd., Dec., 1935.

SAGREIYA, KAMPTA PRASAD, B.A. (Oxon), B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Central Provs.) (b. 10th Feb., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Central Provs., 27th Oct., 1927; dep. consvr., Dec., 1931.

SAH, DEBI LAL (see Debi Lal Sah).

SAHAI, RAM CHANDRA (see Ram Chandra Sahai).

SAHAI, RAMESHWAR (see Rameshwar Sahai).

SAHASRABUDHE, DATTATRAYA LAKSHMAN, M.Ag., M.Sc., Rai Bahadur, Indian Agric. Service (agric. chemist to govt. of Bombay) (b. 1st Sept., 1881).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 3rd Jan., 1906, to 31st May, 1913; asst. prof. of chemistry, June, 1913; agric. chemist, March, 1926.

SAHAY, BHAGWAN, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provinces) (b. 15th Feb., 1905).—Educ. at University of Allahabad and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, 10th Nov., 1929, and served in the United Provinces as asst. mag. and coll.; jt. mag., Mar., 1931; dep. secty. to govt., U.P., indus. bch. (tempy.) May, 1936, and again, May, 1937.

SAHAY, JAYADEVA, M.A., Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 2nd Jan., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bihar and Orissa, 30th April, 1923; offg. addl. supt., Feb., 1932; supt., May, 1936.

SAHAY, KULWANT, late Judl. Dept., Bihar and Orissa (b. 23rd Jan., 1873).—Apptd. addl. judge, high ct., Patna, Nov., 1923; judge, ditto, Dec., 1927; retd., Jan., 1934.

SAHAY, VISHNU, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (dir. of agriculture, United Provs.) (b. 22nd Nov., 1901).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ., and Lincoln Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 23rd Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag.; offg. dep. commr., Apl., 1928; offg. mag. and collr., Jan., 1934; offg. regr., co-op. soc., U.P., Aug., 1934; dir. of agriculture, June, 1939.

SAHGAL, AMRIT LAL, B.A., LL.B., A.C.A., R.A. (b. 20th Jan., 1904).—Joined the service 21st Sept., 1935, as secty., Indian accty. bd. and ex officio asst. secty. to govt. of India.

SAHGAL, HARA NARAYAN, Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.B. rly.) (b. 21st Nov., 1886).—Asst. engr., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr. (provl.), Nov., 1935.

SAHIB, ABDUR RAHIM (see Abdur Rahim Sahib).

SAHIB, ELATT VILIAGATH AMU (see Amu Sahib, E. V.).

SAHIB KHAN NOON, MALIK, M.B.E., Punjab Civil Service (dep. commr.) (b. Nov., 1896).—Extra asst. commr., May, 1911; confd. Apl., 1913; M.B.E., Jan., 1919; dep. commr., June, 1935.

SAHIB, MUHAMMAD SIRAJUDDIN (see Muhammad S.S.).

SAHIB, SAIYID ABDUL QADIR (see Saiyid Abdul Qadir S.).

SAHIB, SHARIF MUHAMMAD ALI (see Sharif, M. A. S.).

SAHIBZADA, AHMED KHAN, M.B., Major, I.M.S. (agency surg.) (b. 15th Oct., 1891).—First commn. dated 1st March, 1922; in milty. employ to April, 1925; civil medl. officer, Bannu, April, 1925; ditto, Tochi Agency, April, 1928; ditto, N. Waziristan, Nov., 1929; civil surgeon, Hazara, Feb., 1933.

SAHNEY, NAUBAT RAI, LALA, B.A., LL.B., Indian Police (b. 29th June, 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Punjab, 7th July, 1924; offg. supt., Sept. 1929, and again Apl., 1933; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1938.

SAHNI, NARSING DASS M., B.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 12th Oct., 1900).—Joined the service, 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., Nov., 1927.

SAID, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Said).

SAID ULLAH KHAN, B.A. (Oxon), Barr., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th July, 1896).—Educ. at Chief's Coll., Lahore, and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 2nd Oct., 1922, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., July, 1927; dep. commr. (provl), Apl., 1929; confd., Nov., 1932.

SAID-UZ-ZAFAR KHAN, SAHIBZADA, M.B., late United Provs. medl. service (b. 14th Oct., 1876).—Joined the service, 19th April, 1905, as asst. surg.; prof., King George's medl. coll., July, 1914; civil surg., April, 1920; dean and prinpl., King George's medl. coll., May, 1926; on deptn. to Bhopal State from Oct., 1927; ret'd., Oct., 1931.

SAIGAL, DEVI DAYAL (see Devi Dayal S.).

SAIN, KANWAR LALA (see Kanwar Sain, L.).

SAING, U BA, Barr., late Burma Commission (b. 9th Nov., 1881).—Apptd. addl. and sess. judge, Mar., 1921; dist. and sess. judge, Dec., 1922; ret'd., Nov., 1936.

ST. JOHN, SIR HENRY BEAUCHAMP, K.C.I.E., C.B.E., Lt.-Col., I.A. (ret'd.) (b. 26th Aug., 1874).—First commn. dated 30th August, 1893; in mil. employ to May, 1899, when he was apptd. asst. commr. N.W.F. Prov.; asst. to a. g.-g. in Rajputana Nov., 1900; asst. to resdt. in Mewar, June, 1901, to Aug., 1901; asst. to a.g.-g. and chief commr., N.W.F. Prov., Nov., 1901, to April, 1905; asst. to a. g.-g. in Rajputana, Aug., 1905, to Jan., 1909; asst. to a. g.-g. in Baluchistan, May, 1910; special duty under govt. of India in for. dept., Sept., 1911; asst. sec. to govt. of India, for. dept., Oct., 1912; C.I.E., June, 1913; asst. pol. agent and asst. commr., Quetta-Pishin, April, 1915; pol. agent, and dep. commr. ditto, April, 1916; C.B.E., Jan., 1920; offg. resdt. W. Rajputana States, April, 1921; pol. agent, E. States of Rajputana, March, 1922; offg. agent to the govr.-genl., Punjab States, Feb., 1925; confd., Dec., 1925; agent to govr.-genl. and ch. commr. in Baluchistan, Nov., 1927; ret'd., Nov., 1930; K.C.I.E., Jan., 1930.

ST. JOHN, OLIVER CHARLES BEAUCHAMP, Capt. I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 22nd Oct., 1907).—First commn., 2nd Feb., 1928; in milty. employ prior to 1st June, 1931; under-secty. to A.G.G. in Baluchistan, June, 1931; offcr. on spl. duty, govt. of India, in home

dept. (temp.), May, 1933; asst. pte. secty. to H.E. the Viceroy, May, 1933; under training in the U.P., Nov., 1934; under-secty. to the A.G.G. in Baluchistan, June, 1935; asst. to the dep. A.G.G. in Baluchistan, July, 1935; asst. commr., Ajmer, Apl., 1936; on for. service in Alwar State, from 1st Sept., 1936, to 18th Nov., 1936; asst. commr., Ajmer, Nov., 1936; under-secty. to A.G.G., W.I. States Agency, Jan., 1937; pol. agent, Sabar Kantha Agency, Sept., 1937; under-secty. to the resdt. for the States of W.I., Nov., 1937; pol. agent, W. Kathiawar, Mar., 1938; under sec. to the resdt. for the States of W.I., June, 1938; asst. for Mekran to the pol. agent in Kalat and ex officio comdt., Mekran levy corps, Oct., 1938; non-localised asst. pol. agent in Baluchistan, Dec., 1939.

SAIYID, ABDUS SALAM (see Abdus Salam Saiyid).

SAIYID ABDUL QADIR SAHIB, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Madras) (b. 15th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service, Dec., 1907; dep. consvr., Nov., 1925.

SAIYID, ABDULLAH ABU (see Abdullah, A. S.).

SAIYID ALI AMIR, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Bihar) (b. 1st Aug., 1895).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1929.

SAIYID AMINUDDIN, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (dir., land records, Bombay) (b. 21st April, 1895).—Educ. at Aligarh Collegiate Sch., and Downing Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 14th Dec., 1921; arrived, 6th Jan., 1922, and served in Bombay as asst. collr., offg. collr. and dist. mag., March, 1926; confd., July, 1936; dir., land records, etc., May, 1938.

SAIYID, MUHAMMAD AHSAN QULI, Khan Bahadur, Indian Police (superintendent Bihar) (b. 1st July, 1884).—Held non-gazetted appointment up to 30th June, 1921. Promoted to Deputy Superintendent, 1st July, 1921; to selection grade of Deputy Superintendent, 10th Feb., 1935; offg. superintendent, 4th Feb., 1938, confirmed 8th Nov., 1938.

SAIYID MUHAMMAD MASIH, Bengal Judl. Service (b. 23rd Oct., 1885).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1929; services placed at disposal of govt. of Assam, Feb., 1932.

SAIYID MUHAMMAD SHU'AIB RIZAWI, Khan Bahadur, Indian Police, ret'd. (b. 11th Nov., 1885).—Joined the service as dep. supt., on probn., 2nd Jan., 1908; confd., Mar., 1909; supt., Sept., 1930; ret'd. Nov., 1938.

SAIYID MUJIBUR RAB, M.B.E., M.A., Indian Police (supt., Bihar) (b. 1st Sept., 1899).—Joined the service, 1st Nov., 1922; offg. supt., Feb., 1930; confd., Nov., 1932; M.B.E., Jan., 1931.

SAIYID MUNIRUDDIN SIRAJUDDIN MAULVI, M.A., Bombay Civil Service (collr. and dist. mag.) (b. 25th Mar., 1889).—Dep. collr. Jan., 1924; collr. and dist. mag., May, 1937.

SAJBA SHANKAR RANGNEKAR (see Rangnekar, S. S.).

SAKER, RICHARD KENNETH MAITLAND, Capt. I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 30th Dec., 1908).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1932; in milty. employ prior to 15th Nov., 1933; under training under the A.G.G. Gujarat

States and resdt., Baroda, Nov., 1933; asst. magte. and collr., Meerut, June, 1934; under-secty. to A.G.G., Rajputana, Jan., 1936; confd., Apl., 1937; under-secty. to the resdt. for Baroda and the Gujerat States, Nov., 1937; secty., March, 1939, to April, 1939; transfid. to Quetta, June, 1939; under sec. to A.G.G., resdt. and chief commr. in Baluchistan, July, 1939.

SAKSENA, BHAGWATI PRASAD (see Bhagwat P.S.).

SAKSENA, PREM CHANDRA, Indian Police (b. 26th Dec., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. dist. s upi., Central Provs., 3rd Sept., 1925; offg. dist. supt., March, 1928.

SAKSENA, RAM CHAND (see Ram Chand S.).

SALAHUDDIN AHMAD YUSUF, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bengal) (b. 28th Jan., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 4th Dec., 1925; dep. consvr., Nov., 1929.

SALAMAT ULLAH, HAJI MOHAMMAD, M.C., M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Jail Dept., United Provs. (inspr.-genl. of prisons) (b. 16th Dec., 1892).—Apptd. supt., central prison, Lucknow, 14th Feb., 1926; inspr.-genl. of prisons, United Provs., Feb., 1935.

SALAM-UL-HAQOQ, B.A., Khan Bahadur, late India Posts and Tels. (b. 2nd Feb., 1875).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st Oct., 1896; supt., June, 1904; offg. dep. P.M.G., R.M.S., Western Circle, June, 1924; confd. Feb., 1925; dep. P.M.G., Nagpur, Nov., 1927; ret'd., Feb., 1930.

SALE, JOHN FORD, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 20th Feb., 1884).—Educ. at Rugby and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived, 30th Nov., 1907, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., Apl., 1916; pte. sec. to lieut.-govr., United Provs., Nov., 1916, to July, 1917; mag. and collr., Mar., 1924; offg. commr., Apl., 1935; ret'd., Dec., 1937.

SALE, JOHN LEWIS, C.I.E., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 24th Aug., 1885).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Jan., 1907; exec engr., Jan., 1915; on mil. duty from 15th April, 1915, to 30th Sept., 1919; offg. supt. engr., Sept., 1922; C.I.E., Jan., 1930; supt. engr., Central P.W.D., Oct., 1930; ret'd., Jan., 1934.

SALE, STEPHEN LEONARD, B.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Punjab) (b. 30th Sept., 1889).—Educ. at Marlborough and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 30th Nov., 1914, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; on mil. duty from May to Aug., 1918; offg. dist. and sessions judge, Dec., 1922; provl. ditto, Sept., 1924; legal remembr. and secty., legisl. dept., Sept., 1928; addl. judge, high ct., Lahore, June, 1934.

SALIG RAM, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 11th Dec., 1883).—Joined the service 25th Sept., 1907; asst. engr., Sept., 1908; exec. engr., Sept., 1916; on deputation to T. E. Coll., Roorkee, from 1st June, 1927, to 12th Oct., 1928; ret'd., Oct., 1932.

SALIG RAM PATHAK, CHAUBE, M.A., late United Provs. C.S. (b. 21st May, 1878).—Joined the service as proby. dep. collr. 28th Aug., 1902; confd., Mar., 1904; magte. and collr., July, 1929; ret'd., May, 1933.

SALISBURY, ALAN JACK, B.A., (Oxon) Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bihar) (b. 9th April, 1905).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital, St. John's Coll., Oxford, and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, 8th Nov., 1929, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1935; dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1936.

SALISBURY, ARTHUR GEORGE, India Office (supg. executive officer, acctt.-genl. dept.) (b. 29th Oct., 1885).—Educ. at Elizabeth Coll., Guernsey; apptd. 2nd class clerk, 16th July, 1906; minor staff clerk, Oct., 1915; staff clerk (acting), April, 1920; confd., April, 1921; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; supt. exec. officer, March, 1927; apptd. assessor of inc. tax, March, 1927.

SALISBURY, FRANCIS HUGH, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (ret'd.), late Jail Dept., Bengal.—First commn. dated 1st Sept., 1906; in milty. employ. to 22nd March, 1910; offg. supt. jail dept., April, 1910; with home dept., govt. of India, from 21st Oct., 1914, to 11th Aug., 1920; offg. supt., Dacca Central Jail, Aug., 1920; ditto, Alipore Central Jail, March, 1922; reverted to milty. employ. Oct., 1927; ret'd., May, 1930.

SALISBURY, Rev. MARK, LL.D., Indian Eccles. Estabt. (senr. chaplain, Punjab) (b. 16th Oct., 1883).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 12th Nov., 1921; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1923; senr. chaplain, Dec., 1933.

SALMOND, HUBERT GEORGE, Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. engr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 3rd Jan., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1911; in milty. employ. from July, 1915, to June, 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; dep. dir., civil engrg., rly. bd.; offg. dep. ch. engr., Oct., 1932; dep. agent, works, E.B. rly., Mar., 1933; dep. chief engr. (provl. perm.), Apl., 1938.

SALOWAY, REGINALD HARRY, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 26th Oct., 1905).—Educ. at Exeter School, and St. John's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Oct., 1928; arrived, Nov., 1928, and served in the United Provs. as asst. collr. and mag.; asst. commr., Mar., 1930; offg. magte. and collr., May, 1933; offg. dep. commr., Sept., 1935; offg. secty., bd. of rev., U.P., Apl., 1936.

SALTER, MALCOLM GURNEY, B.A., Indian Educl. Service (princl., Daly coll., Indore) (b. 10th May, 1887).—Joined the service as asst. master, Daly coll., 26th Jan., 1913; on milty. duty from 5th Dec., 1916, to 29th Oct., 1919; princpl., Daly coll., July, 1930.

SALUSBURY, CHARLES VANNE, Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Punjab) (b. 15th Feb., 1887).—Educ. at Magdalen Coll. Sch., and Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 27th Nov., 1911, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; city mag., Delhi, Sept., 1915; asst. coln. officer, Lower Bari Doab Canal colony, April, 1916; on spl. duty for Upper Chenab Canal colony work, Lahore, June, 1917; on spl. duty, Punjab civil sectt., Dec., 1917; on spl. duty on staff of lieut.-govr., March, 1918; dep. commr. (provl.), Feb., 1925; deputed to Bikaner State, Oct., 1929, to Mar., 1931; offg. secty. to govt., transfid. depts., Punjab, May, 1932; offg. commr., May, 1934;

and again, Aprl., 1936; offg. secty. to govt., Punjab, elec. and indus. dept., Jan., 1936; rev. and div. commr., N.W.F.P., Nov., 1936.

SALUSBURY-TRELAWNY, JOHN MAITLAND, M.C., late Indian State Ry. (b. 26th Jan. 1892).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1914; in milty. employ from Aprl., 1915, to 25th March, 1919; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; retd., Oct., 1934.

SAMLER, WILLIAM HADLEY GOODLIKE, M.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Punjab) (b. 18th Aprl., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 15th Dec., 1922; on depn. to Kashmir State from 31st Jan., 1924; dep. consvr., Oct., 1927.

SAMPSON, EPHRAIM OSWIN, M.B.E., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 14th Aug., 1886).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 1st Aprl., 1907, to 23rd Dec., 1912; proby. extra asst. consvr., Dec., 1912; extra asst. consvr., Aug., 1915; asst. consvr., Feb., 1925; dep. consvr., Feb., 1926; M.B.E., June, 1935.

SAMS, SIR HUBERT ARTHUR, Kt., C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 3rd May, 1875).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch. and Peterhouse, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1898; arrived, 29th Dec., 1899, and served in the Punjab and N.W. Frontier Prov. as asst. commr.; postmaster-gen., E. Bengal and Assam, May, 1907; ditto, Bengal, Aprl., 1908; ditto, Burma, May, 1911; ditto, Bombay, Oct., 1913; ditto, central circle, Oct., 1914; on depn. as dir., postal services, Indian Expedy. Force, Mesopotamia, from Aug., 1917, to May, 1919; C.I.E., March, 1919; postmr.-gen., Bombay, Aprl., 1920; dep. dir.-gen. of post office, India, Aprl., 1922; dir.-genl., posts and tels., Aprl., 1927; Kt., June, 1931; retd., Mar., 1934.

SAMS, KENNETH ASHETON HULTON, late Indian C.S. (United Provs.) (b. 26th Oct., 1884).—Educ. at Charterhouse Sch. and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 29th Nov., 1909, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; on mil. service from Aprl., 1918; reverted to civil duty, June, 1919; jt. mag., June, 1919; actg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1920; sess. and sub. judge, March, 1924; retd., Mar., 1930.

SAMUEL, DEL. JOHN, Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 9th December, 1914).—Educated at Grove Park, Wrexham, and Jesus College, Oxford; appointed on probation, 24th September, 1938; confirmed 13th September, 1939; arrived in India, October, 1939, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

SAMUEL, GEORGE, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 26th Aug., 1908).—Educ. at Hamilton Academy, Glasgow Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1932; arrived in India, Dec., 1933, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty., defence dept., Aprl., 1937.

SAMUEL, JOHN AUGUSTUS, B.A., LL.B. (Cantab.), Barr. (dep. secty., legisl. dept., Bihar (b. 3rd Feb., 1887)).—Joined the service as asst. to supt. and membr. of legal affairs, 24th July, 1917; asst. secty., legisl. council, Jan., 1921; dep. secty., legisl. dept., Aprl., 1924.

SAN, MAUNG BA, B.A., Burma C.S., (Cl. I) (asst. commr.) (b. 31st Mar., 1914).—Educ. at Rangoon Univ.; apptd. on probn., 1st Oct., 1937; confd., 5th Sept., 1938; arrived in Burma, Oct., 1938, and served as asst. commr.

SANER, ROBERT MORTON, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 30th Dec., 1911).—Educated at Westminster and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1934; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in the U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

SANDEMAN, ALFRED PATRICK, O.B.E., Lt.-Col., I.A., late Burma Commission (b. 17th Mar., 1878).—Arrived in India, Oct., 1898, and rendered service in mil. dept.; asst. commr., July, 1905; on mil. duty from Aug., 1915, to May, 1919; dep. commr., Dec., 1917; offg. commr., May, 1928; retd., July, 1932.

SANDEMAN, RONALD FREDERICK, B.A., Dip., Forestry, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Bombay) (b. 3rd Nov., 1897).—Joined the service, 10th Dec., 1923, as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Nov., 1925.

SANDERS, REV. HOROLD MARTIN, M.A. (Oxon.), B.A. (Lond.), Eccles. Dept., Central Provs. (junior chaplain) (b. 7th Jan., 1900).—Apptd. chaplain on probation, 3rd Feb., 1929; junr. chaplain, Jan., 1931.

SANDERSON, The Right Hon. Sir LANCELOT, P.C.—Educ. at Harrow and Trinity Coll., Cambridge (B.A., LL.B., 1885; M.A., 1895); Kt., Nov., 1915; chief justice, high ct., Calcutta, Nov., 1915; resigned, Nov., 1926; P.C., 1926; member of judl. cttee. of Privy Cl. since Nov. 1926.

SANDERSON, RICHARD WILSON, late Indian Police Service (b. 21st May, 1892).—Joined the service, 15th Nov., 1912; asst. supt., Nov., 1913; supt., March, 1924; dist. offr., frontier constabulary, Feb., 1927; retd., March, 1932.

SANDERSON, ROBERT, C.I.E., M.A. (Oxon.), late Indian Educl. Service (b. 6th Jan., 1881).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1909; inspr. of schools, March, 1915; on mil. service, Nov., 1917, to Aprl., 1919; offg. inspr. of training institutions, Oct., 1926; confd., Feb., 1930; offg. dir. public instrn., Mar., 1930; confd. July, 1931; C.I.E., June, 1935; retd., Jan., 1935.

SANDES, EDWARD WARREN CAULFIELD, D.S.O., M.C., Lt.-Col. R.E. (retd.) (b. 13th Feb., 1880).—First commn. dated 22nd Nov., 1899; in mil. employ to 4th Oct., 1910; prof., Roorkee, Oct., 1910; in mil. employ from 6th Aprl., 1915, to 31st Jan., 1920; prof., Roorkee, Feb., 1920; prinpl., Thomason Coll., Oct., 1921; retd., Aug., 1931.

SANDES, JOHN DRUMMOND, M.D., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., retd. (b. 5th Mar., 1883).—Joined the service, 2nd Feb., 1907; in mil. employ to Aprl. 1910; offd. as resdt. physician and surgn., med. coll. hospital, Calcutta, Aprl., 1911, to Aprl., 1913; offg. civil surgn., June to Aug., 1914; surgn. to the govr. of Bengal, Aprl., 1917; prof. materia medica, and 2nd physician, med. coll. hosp., Calcutta, March, 1920; jail supt., Rajahahi, Nov., 1923; prof., medical coll., Calcutta, Aprl., 1925; retd., Dec., 1935.

SANDYS, ULRIC CAPEL, V.D., Indian State Railways (dep. ch. comml. manager, E.I. Rly.), (b. 1st Dec., 1881).—Joined the service, 17th Aug., 1901; asst. traffic supt., April, 1905; dist. traffic supt., April, 1910; temp'y. dep. chief comml. manager, E.I. Rly., July, 1925; supt., ditto, Jan., 1928; offg. dep. ch. comml. manager, July, 1935; confd., Apl., 1936.

SANGAL, HARA NARAYAN, B.A., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.B. Rly.) (b. 21st Nov., 1886).—Asst. eng., Oct., 1917; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr. (prov.), Nov., 1935.

SANGHAM, LAL, M.B.B.S. (Punj.), F.R.C.S. (Eng.), L.R.C.P. (Lond.), D.O.M.S. (Lond.), Capt., I.M.A. (D.M.O., Madras).—(b. 25th Sept., 1901).—First commn., 13th May, 1931; in milty. employ until 13th Nov., 1934; dist. medl. officer, Nov., 1934.

SANJANA, BEHRAM NAVROJI, B.A., LL.B., late Bombay C.S., Judl. Branch (b. 27th Oct., 1874).—Joined the service as sub-judge, 26th Oct., 1904; asst. judge and asst. sess. judge, July, 1923; jt. judge and addl. sess. judge, Sept., 1926; judge and sess. judge, Nov., 1927; ret'd., Oct., 1931.

SANJANA, BOMAN S., Dept. of Industries, Bihar (b. 18th Sept., 1887).—Apptd. prof., Bihar coll. of engrg., 7th July, 1925.

SANJANA, KAIKOBAD EDALJI JAMSHEDJI, B.A., Barr., Khan Bahadur, late Central Provs. C.S. (b. 11th May, 1883).—Joined the service as extra asst. commr., 3rd Jan., 1908; offg. dep. commr., Mar., 1927; confd., Sept., 1928; ret'd., May, 1938.

SANJIVA RAO, BENEGAL, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 12th Dec., 1883).—Joined the service as princpl., Queen's inter. coll., Benares, 1st July, 1922; ret'd., Dec., 1938.

SANJIVA ROW, KODIKAL, C.I.E., M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (jt. secty., fin. dept., govt. of India) (b. 18th Mar., 1890).—Joined the service, 3rd Sept., 1914; pers. asst. to contr. of currency, Jan., 1925; supt. fin. dept., Dec., 1925; asst. secty. to the govt. of India, fin. dept., Dec., 1932; offg. budget officer, fin. dept., variously from Apl., 1931; confd., Mar., 1933; C.I.E., June, 1935; apptd. representative of the Govt. of India, applicn. ctee. for the Indo-Burma finl. award, Jan., 1936; dep. secty., fin. dept., govt. of India, Apl., 1936; addl. jt. secty., ditto, Apl., 1937; jt. secty. fin. dept., govt. of India, April 1939.

SANJIVI PILLAI, TIRUPATTUR GANGADHARAM PILLAI, B.A. (Hons.), Rao Bahadur, Indian Police (dist. supt.) (b. 28th Dec., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Madras, 1st Sept., 1922; offg. dist. supt., Mar., 1929; confd., Sept., 1932.

SANKARA AYYAR, TIRUNELVELI SELLAMIER, C.I.E., B.A., B.E. (b. 1st Dec., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. examr., 17th Aug., 1900; asst. acct.-genl., U.P., Mar., 1914; asst. auditor, N.W. rly., June, 1918; dep. auditor, E.B. Rly., Oct., 1921; govt. examr. of accts., M. & S.M., & S.I. Rlys., Nov., 1922; ditto B. and N.W. & R. & K. Rlys., July, 1924; divl. audit officer, N.W. Rly., Nov., 1924; dep. acct.-genl., posts and tels., March, 1925; offg. dep. auditor, N.W. Rly., Nov., 1926; asst. auditor, ditto,

Dec., 1926; dep. ch. accts. officer, E.I. Rly., March, 1928; offg. dir. of finance, rly., bd., Nov., 1930; confd., May, 1931; dir., rly., bd., Apl., 1932; offg. finl. commr. of rlys., Oct., 1935; C.I.E., June, 1938.

SANKARA MENON, KIZHAKEPAT, B.A., Barr., late Madras Civil Service (Judicial Bch.) (b. 21st May, 1881).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, 27th June, 1921; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, variously from Apl., 1935; ret'd., May, 1936; offg. judge, high ct., Madras, July, 1936.

SANKEY, GEOFFREY CHARLES, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Bengal) (b. 28th April, 1884).—Educ. at Rugby, and Queen's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1908, and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst. mag. and collr., and asst. settl. offr.; asst. commr., Assam, April, 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal, July, 1917; offg. judge, Assam, Aug. to Oct., 1917, and from Jan., 1919, to May, 1920; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Bengal, Nov., 1921; confd., Sept., 1922; ret'd., Aug., 1931.

SANSBURY, WILLIAM HENRY, India Office (higher clerical officer, public and judl. dept.) (b. 16th June, 1882).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 20th Nov., 1902; minor staff clerk, Jan., 1919; higher clerical officer, April, 1922.

SANSON, ADAM JOHN WALKER, M.C., Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 28th May, 1897).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bombay, 11th Nov., 1923; offg. supt., Apl., 1929; confd., Mar., 1936; dep. commr., Bombay (divs.), Apl., 1937 to Aug., 1938.

SANT PRAKASH SINGH, SARDAR, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 1st May, 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 14th April, 1920; offg. supt., Nov., 1926; confd., May, 1929.

SANT RAM, LALA, Rai Bahadur, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 5th May, 1880).—Joined the service, 7th Nov., 1904; asst. engr., Nov., 1904; exec. engr., Dec., 1912; offg. supt. engr., March, 1928; confd., Feb., 1931; offg. ch. engr., and secty. to govt., p.w.d., Punjab, June, 1933; ret'd., May, 1938.

SANT SINGH, SARDAR BHADUR, Indian Police (dist. supt., Central Provs.) (b. 15th July, 1886).—Held non-gaz. appnt. from 1st Jan., 1908; dept. supt. (temp'y.), Mar., 1923; Sardar Sahib, Jan., 1924; confd., Dec., 1925; Sardar Bahadur, Jan., 1935; on depts. to I.P. contingent at H.M.'s Coronation, Mar., 1937; dist. supt. of police, Cent. Provs., and Berar, May, 1938.

SANTOS, JOHN, B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 19th Jan., 1890).—Joined the service, 2nd Nov., 1914; asst. acctnt.-gen., Sept., 1925; examr., outside audit, Bombay, June, 1926; offg. asst. secty., fin. dept., Apl., 1929; offg. under secty., ditto, Nov., 1932; dep. acct. genl., Bombay, Apl., 1933; services lent to the govt. of Bombay, March, 1936.

SANYAL, SUSIL KUMAR, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Police (b. 29th Nov., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Central Provs., 26th May, 1927.

SAPRE, KESHAV ANANT, LL.B., late Bombay Civil Service (Judicial Branch) (b. 8th Oct., 1877).—Held non-gazetted appnts. from 1st Apl., 1902, to 19th Apl., 1912; sub-judge, Apl., 1912; offg. asst. judge, Oct., 1927; offg. judge and sess. judge, June, 1929; asst. judge, Dec., 1930; ret'd., Oct., 1933.

SAPRU, ANAND NARAYAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 31st March, 1901).—Educ. at Allahabad Univ. and Balliol Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 23rd Dec., 1924, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr., jt. mag., July, 1927; offg. dep. commr., April, 1928; services at disposal of A.G.G., Punjab States, for employment in Patiala State. Apl., 1931; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1932; offg. excise commr., U.P., Mar., 1935, and inspr.-genl. of regn. in addn., Apl., 1935.

SAPRU, Sir Tej., Bahadur, P.C., K.C.S.I., LL.D.—Educ. Agra Coll.; member United Provs. legl. council, 1916-20; law member of govr.-genl.'s exec. council, 1920-23; represented govt. of India at Imperial Conference, 1923; K.C.S.I., Jan., 1923; British-India delegate to Round Table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; 3rd Session, Nov., 1932; P.C., Jan., 1934.

SARAN, REDHA KANTA (see Redha Kanta Saran).

SARDA SHANKAR BAJPAI (see Bajpai, S. S.).

SARDAR SINGH, M.A., Indian Police (b. 1st Feb., 1904).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 27th May, 1927; offg. supt., Apl., 1933.

SARDARI LAL, MALHOTRA, Lala, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 2nd Dec., 1901).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 24th Oct., 1924; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1925; exec. engr., Oct., 1934.

SARDHANA, MADAN GOPAL (see Madan, G. S.).

SARDESAI, VIDYADHAR NARHAR, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. coll., Bombay) (b. 28th July, 1905).—Educ. at University of Bombay and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1929; arrived, Dec., 1929, and served as asst. coll., Bombay.

SARGENT, JOHN PHILIP, M.A. (educ. commr. with the govt. of India) (b. 27th Dec., 1888).—Educ. St. Paul's Sch. (Foundation Scholar) 1903-08; Oriel Coll., Oxford (Open Scholar), 1908-12.—Organising inspr. of schls., E. Riding of Yorks. educn. comtee., 1913-20; assist. educn. officer, City of Birmingham, 1920-27; dir. of educn., Southend-on-Sea cty. borough, 1927-31; dir. of educn., county of Essex, 1931-38; apptd. officer on specl. duty under the E.H. and L. dept., govt. of India, Nov., 1938, to Jan., 1939; educn. commr. with the govt. of India, Jan., 1939.

SARIN, HARISH CHANDRA, Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr. Bihar) (b. 27th May, 1914).—Educated at Govt. Intermediate College, Allahabad and Emmanuel College, Cambridge; appointed on probation 3rd October, 1938; confirmed 9th September, 1939; arrived in India, October, 1939 and served in Bihar as asst. mag. & collr.

SARKAR, BASANTA BIHARI, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 5th Aug., 1901).—Educ. at Univ. of Calcutta, Univ. College, London, and Jesus College, Cambridge; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1926; arrived, Nov., 1926, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte. and dep. collr., Dec., 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1932; offg. mag. and collr., Sept., 1933.

SARKAR, BHABADEV, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., late Bihar C.S. (b. 16th May, 1883).—Joined the service, 18th April, 1903; dep. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1905; offg. mag. and collr.,

Mar., 1931; confd., July, 1934; secty., bd. of rev., June, 1934; ret'd., May, 1938.

SARKAR, BINOD BIHARI, Rai Bahadur, Bengal Civil Service (mag. and collr.) (b. 22nd July, 1888).—Joined the service, Dec., 1908; dep. mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1912; mag. and collr., Mar., 1938.

SARKAR, HIRENDRA NATH, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 18th Jan., 1905).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., 1st May, 1928; confd., Sept., 1930; offg. addl. supt., Feb., 1934.

SARKAR, Sir JADU NATH, Kt., C.I.E., M.A., late Indian Educ. Service.—Joined the service, 30th June, 1898; prof. of history, Ravenshaw Coll., Cuttack, July, 1919; ditto, Patna coll., Oct., 1923; C.I.E., Jan., 1926; vice-chancellor, Calcutta Univ., 1926; Kt., June, 1929.

SARKAR, PRAFULLA KUMAR, M.A., Indian Rly. Accts. Service (accts. officer) (b. 14th Sept., 1900).—Joined the service, May, 1926; accts. officer, April, 1929.

SARKAR, SUBODH CHANDRA, Judicial Dept., Bengal (judge, Calcutta small cause ct.) (b. 1st Sept., 1886).—Joined the service, 24th May, 1915; dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1928; judge, Calcutta small cause ct., Jan., 1934.

SARMA, ANANTANARAYANA, A.N. (see Anantanarayana, S. A. N.).

SARMA, DURGESHWAR, R.B., B.L., Assam C.S. dep. commr. (b. 18th Feb., 1885).—Joined the service, 5th May, 1911; extra asst. commr., May, 1911 to 1924; sub-div. officer, 1924 to Mar., 1935; dep. commr., Mar., 1935; dir. of land records and commr. of income-tax, Assam, Apl., 1936, commr. of excise and regr. jt. stock coys, etc., Mar., 1939.

SARMA, G. K., SESHADRI (see Seshadri Sarma, G. K.).

SARMA, TIRNOSTIYUR RAMASWAMI AIYAR VRIIDHAGIRI, B.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 16th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. examr., 12th Aug., 1907; asst. audit officer, July, 1920; dept. acct.-genl. (posts and tels.), Sept., 1920; audit officer, Bombay Development Scheme, May, 1923; dep. auditor, O. & R. Rly., April, 1924; asst. auditor, E.I. Rly., Dec., 1925; govt. examr. of accts., June, 1926; offg. dep. auditor genl., N.W. Rly., March, 1928; dep. ch. accts. officer, N.W. Rly., Apl., 1929; offg. dep. auditor-genl., Apl., 1931; govt. exr. of accts., S. & S.M. & R.I. rlys., Dec., 1935; ch. auditor, rly. clearing accts., July, 1935; ditto, N.W. Rly., Apl., 1938; ch. auditor, G.I.P. Rly. and Govt. examiner of accts., B.B. & C.I. Rly., Jan., 1939; ch. accts. offr. E.I. Rly. Sept., 1939.

SARRE, LIONEL W., Indian Police (asst. supt.) (b. 17th April, 1909).—Joined the service as probty. asst. supt., Bombay, 18th Jan., 1930; confd., Aug., 1931; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1938.

SARUP SINGH, BHAI, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Punjab) (b. 27th Apl., 1897).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 27th Nov., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1928.

SASTRI, K. S. R. (see Ramaswami Sastri, K. S.).

SASTRI, MANDAKULATHUR PATANJALI, (judge, high ct. Madras) appointed, March, 1939.

SASTRI, S. KUPPUSWAMI (see Kuppuswami Sastri S.).

SATARAWALA, DADABHAI RATANJI, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (Bombay) (b.

6th Aug., 1876).—Joined the service, 15th April, 1901; exec. engr., April, 1910; offg. supt. engr., July, 1923; confd., May, 1926; offg. ch. engr., May, 1928; ret'd., Aug., 1931.

SATHE, DATTARAYA LAXMUN, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (consvr., Madras) (b. 27th May, 1889).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 14th March, 1914; dep. consvr., March, 1919; offg. consvr., Aug., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935.

SATHE, JAGANNATH LAKSHMAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 20th April, 1886).—Educ. at Bombay Univ., and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 8th Oct., 1910, and served in the United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., April, 1917; mag. and collr., Dec., 1924; employed as secy., bd. of rev., from Nov., 1923; offg. excise commr., April, 1927; confd., May, 1928; dir., bureau of statistics and economic research, Apl., 1932; secty., finance dept., United Provs., Apl., 1933.

SATHE, SHANKAR GOPAL, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (Bombay) (b. 12th Oct., 1875).—Joined the service, 14th May, 1919; prof. of logic and moral philosophy, Deccan Coll., May, 1919; ditto, Elph. Coll., Bombay, Oct., 1924; ret'd., Oct., 1930.

SATHIANATHAN, WILLIAM RATNAM SAMUEL, Indian C.S. (collr. and d.m., Madras) (b. 15th March, 1900).—Educ. at Madras Univ., Peterhouse Coll., Cambridge, and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 24th Oct., 1924; arrived, 15th Nov., 1924, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-coll. March, 1928; dir. of land records, Madra, Dec., 1931; collr. and dist. magte., June, 1934; estate collr., Vizianagram, Oct., 1935.

SATTANATHAN, ARMUGA NAYAKAR, B.A. (Hons.), Imperial Customs Service (asst. collr.) (b. 15th May, 1905).—Joined the service, May, 1928; asst. collr. of customs, 1929.

SATYANARAYAN CHOWDARY, CHELSANI, Rao Sahib, B.A., B.L., Judl. dept., Madras (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 28th Nov., 1898).—Joined the service, Feb., 1937; apptd. dist. and sess. judge on probn., Feb., 1937; confd., Feb., 1938.

SATYAWADI, SHEO CHARAN, M.A., Indian Customs Service (asst. collr. of customs) (b. 5th Nov., 1894).—Joined the service, 6th Oct., 1911; asst. collr., Oct., 1913; offg. coll. for customs, Chittagong; Mar., 1924; ditto, Rangoon, Nov., 1931; ditto, Calcutta, June, 1933.

SATYAMURTI, R., M.A., M.L. (master, high ct., Madras) (b. 1st Sept., 1889).—Joined the service, Jan., 1919; dist. munsiif, Oct., 1922; asst. regr., July, 1930; dep. regr., July, 1934; master, Mar., 1938.

SAUDAGAR SINGH, RAI BAHADUR, M.A., B.L., Bihar C.S. (dist. and sess. judge) (b. 3rd Jan., 1885).—Joined the service, 14th Jan., 1913; sub-judge, Nov., 1929; offg. dep. regr., high ct., Patna, June, 1930; offg. regr., ditto, Jan., 1932; dist. and sess. judge, Aug., 1935.

SAUDAT-UL-LAH KHAN, Indian Agricultural Service (b. 14th Apl., 1898).—Joined the service as dep. dir. of agric., Madras, 24th Jan., 1922; with govt. of Baluchistan as agricil. officer, Quetta, Apl., 1930.

SAUMAREZ SMITH, WILLIAM HANBURY, Indian C.S. (under-secty., home dept., Bengal).—

Educ. at Winchester and Trin. Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 11th Oct., 1934; arrived in India, 3rd Dec., 1934, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. magte. and dep. collr., May, 1936; under-secty., home dept., Bengal, Jan., 1938.

SAUNDERS, CHARLES HUMPHREY AUGUSTUS, Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., G.I.P. Rly.) (b. 8th Mar., 1886).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 26th Sept., 1914; asst. engr., 27th Jan., 1917; on milty. service from 2nd Oct., 1917, to 2nd Oct., 1919; resdt. engr., Oct., 1919; exec. engr., Sept., 1930.

SAUNDERS, Rt. Rev. CHARLES JOHN GODFREY, M.A., Bengal Eccles. Dept. (sewr. chaplain) (b. 15th Feb., 1888).—Joined the 1919; Bishop of Lucknow, July, 1928, to Oct., 1938.

SAUNDERS, CYRIL SIVEWRIGHT, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 23rd Jan., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1909; exec. engr., Oct., 1917; offg. suptg. engr., May, 1925, and again, March, 1926; ret'd., Aug., 1932.

SAUNDERS, HENRY HUME, O.B.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 23rd June, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. loco. supt., 21st Oct., 1913; in milty. employ from 7th Aug., 1915, to 31st March, 1920; offg. dist. loco. supt., April, 1920; offg. asst. agent, Feb., 1924; offg. works manager, loco., Oct., 1926; divl. rolling stock officer and offg. supt. mechanical workshops, March, 1928; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., Jan., 1930; offg. divl. supt. (mechl.), E.I. rly., Mar., 1935; O.B.E., June, 1935; dep. ch. mechl. engr., July, 1935; ret'd., Dec., 1936.

SAUNDERS, HOWARD FAUNTLEROY, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (dep. dir. of public instrn., Madras) (b. 15th Apl., 1885).—Joined the service, 21st March, 1919; inspr. of schools, Feb., 1922; dist. educl. officer, Jan., 1923; addl. dep. dir. of public instrn., Nov., 1927; dep. dir., Feb., 1932; offg. inspr. of European schools, Feb., 1932; offg. dir. of public instrn., June, 1935; inspector of European schools, Nov., 1936.

SAUNDERS, JOHN ALFRED, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 28th May, 1887).—Educ. at Mount St. Mary's Coll., Chesterfield, and Merton Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1909; arrived in India, 19th Nov., 1910, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912, as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. settlt. offr., Oct., 1913; jt. mag. and dep. collr. and ditto, April, 1917; settlt. offr., N. Bihar, April, 1918; sec., Bihar and Orissa Legve. Council, April, 1922; offg. dist. and sess. judge, March, 1925; confd., Dec., 1927; offg. supt. and membr. of legal affairs and secty. to govt., judl. dept., Mar., 1931; addl. judge, high ct., Patna, variously from July, 1933; offg. judge, ditto, July, 1934; and again, July, 1935; ret'd., Mar., 1938.

SAUNDERS, JOHN FREDERICK, B.A., Indian C.S. (sub. collr. and jt. magte., Madras) (b. 21st Apl., 1910).—Educ. at Dunstable Grammar Sch., and Selwyn College, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1933; arrived in India, Nov., 1934; and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr., sub. collr. and jt. magte., Apl., 1937.

SAUNDERS, LAWRENCE EDWARD, late Indian Police (b. 27th Aug., 1889).—Joined the service, Nov., 1909; asst. supt., Sept., 1919; supt., April, 1925; ret'd., Aug., 1935.

SAUNDERS, PERCY TUNSTALL, O.B.E.,

M.R.C.V.S., late Indian Vety. Service (b. 8th Sept., 1884).—Apptd. prof. of surg., vety. coll., Madras, July, 1923; prinpl., Madras Vety. Coll., July, 1925; offg. dir. of vety. services, Madras, Oct., 1929; confd., Dec., 1930; retd., Sept., 1939.

SAUNDERS-JACOBS, RUSKIN ATKINSON, B.Sc., Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 20th May, 1897).—Joined the service, 19th Aug., 1921; asst. engr., Jan., 1924; exec. engr. (prov.), Apl., 1936; confd., Feb., 1939.

SAVAGE, GERALD ROBERT, Indian Police (b. 1st Aug., 1917).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., Dec., 1937.

SAVARA, A. N. (see Amar Nath S.).

SAVARINATHAN, RAJARATNA, B.A., B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 31st Oct., 1879).—Joined the service as temp. engr., 3rd June, 1908; asst. engr., Feb., 1920; asst. exec. engr., July, 1926; offg. exec. engr., July, 1926; confd., Oct., 1930; retd., Oct., 1934.

SAVIDGE, CECIL ARTHUR GRANT, M.A., Indian C.S., Indian Political Service (b. 20th May, 1905).—Educ. at Aberdeen Grammar School, University of Aberdeen and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1929, and served in the Central Provinces as asst. commr.; asst. commr., Bannu, Apl., 1934; dep. commr., Bannu, Aug., 1935; asst. commr., Nowshera, Nov., 1935; ditto, Bannu, July, 1936; confd., Apl., 1937; under-secty. to govt. of India, ext. affairs dept., Oct., 1937; again, from Sept., 1938; dep. ditto, Aug.-Sept., 1938.

SAVOOR, SNANKAR RAO ULLAH, B.A., D.Sc., Indian Educ. Service (prinpl. govt. collr., Kumbakonam) (b. 14th Jan., 1893).—Joined the service as prof., presdy. coll., Madras, 18th Feb., 1921; prinpl., govt. coll., Kumbakonam, June, 1929; confd., Jan., 1936; offg. dep. dir. of public instrn., Apl., 1931.

SAVUR, SRINIVASA RAO, M.A., Ph.D., Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 26th Mar., 1894).—Joined the service, 11th July, 1917; apptd. meteorologist on probn., 5th Apl., 1928; confd., Apl., 1930.

SAWHNEY, DHAN RAJ, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 13th Dec., 1882).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1906; exec. engr., Oct., 1914; suptg. engr. (sub. temp.), Oct., 1923; in foreign service, Khaipur State, Dec., 1926, to June, 1931; ditto, Alwar State, Aug., 1931; suptg. engr., Nov., 1934; retd., Dec., 1937.

SAWYER, WILLIAM HENRY, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th June, 1877).—Joined the service 9th Feb., 1905; asst. engr., June, 1917; asst. exec. engr., March, 1919; exec. engr., Jan., 1925; retd., June, 1932.

SAYER, MICHAEL WYNNE, B.A., Indian Agric. Service (impl. agriculturist) (b. 10th Sept., 1885).—Joined the service as supy., sugar agriculturist, 20th Mar., 1914; secty., sugar bureau (temp.), Mar., 1921 offg. impl. agriculturist, and jt. dir., May, 1934; confd., Jan. 1936.

SAYERS, FREDERICK, C.I.E., Indian Police (inspr.-genl. of police, Madras) (b. 22nd July, 1885).—Joined the service, 3rd Dec., 1906; asst. supt., 1908; supt., Nov., 1916; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1927; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., June, 1929; and again, Mar., 1933; confd., Aug., 1933; offg. inspr.-genl., Oct., 1936; C.I.E., May, 1937; commr. of police, Apl., 1937; inspr.-genl. (confd.), Jan., 1938.

SAYERS, RICHARD JOHN, Indian Forest

Service (dep. consvr., Burma) (b. 12th Feb., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 13th Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., May, 1928.

SAYIED, ABDULLAH ABU (see Abdullah Abu, S.).

SCAMP, EDWARD, late Office of High Commr. for India (b. 27th Nov., 1881).—Apptd. clerk, 2nd class, 1st May, 1900; on mil. service from Sept., 1918; transfed. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; retd. Nov., 1936.

SCHOFIELD, SIDNEY CHARLES APPS, I.S.O. India Office (higher exec. officer, acctnt.-genl.'s dept.) (b. 7th Feb., 1883).—Educ. at Allyn's Sch., Dulwich; apptd. clerk, 2nd class, acctnt.-gen.'s dept., 8th Nov., 1901; on mil. service from June, 1915, to July, 1919; services lent to office of chief commr., Baghdad, from July, 1919 resumed duty in acctnt.-gen.'s dept., Aug., 1920; staff clerk (actg.), Aug., 1920; confd., April, 1921; higher exec. officer, April, 1922; also assessor of income tax; I.S.O., June, 1938.

SCHUSTER, Sir GEORGE ERNEST, K.C.S.I., K.C.M.G., C.B.E., M.C. (b. 1881).—Educ. at Charterhouse (scholar), and New Coll., Oxford; barr.-at-law, 1905; served European War, 1914-18; ch. asst. to organiser of internatl. credits under League of Nations, 1921; member of advisory comm. to Treasury under Trade Facilities Act, 1921-2; chairman of advisory comm. to colonial secty. on E. African loans, 1926-28; K.C.M.G., 1926; financial secty., Sudan Govt., 1922-27; member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, Nov., 1928; K.C.S.I., June, 1931; member of Ind. del. at Impl. Econ. conf., July, 1932; ditto, monetary and econ. conf., London, June, 1933; member, Ind. res. bank ctee., July, 1933; vice-presdt. govr.-genl.'s exec. council, Aug., 1933 to May, 1934.

SCHUTTE, WILLIAM MATTHEW, M.B.E., A.M.I.Mech.E., M.R.A.S.E., late Indian Agric. Service (b. 14th Nov., 1878).—Joined the service as agric. engr., Bombay, 3rd Jan., 1913; M.B.E., Jan., 1933; retd., Nov., 1933.

SCOTLAND, PATRICK JAMES, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 16th March, 1898).—Educ. at Glasgow Academy, and Queen's Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 28th Oct., 1921; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1921, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; settlement officer, Nov., 1929; supt. of census, April, 1930; retd., June, 1935.

SCOTT, ANDREW BENNET, B.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 25th Jan., 1913).—Educ. at Perse Sch., Cambridge, and St. Catharine's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 16th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1939.

SCOTT, ARCHIBALD GIFFORD, Indian Police (pled. inspr.-genl., Centra Provs.) (b. 21st Apl., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. dist. supt., Dec., 1909; dist. supt., Sept., 1921; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1931; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Feb., 1934; confd., Dec., 1935.

SCOTT, CHARLES ARTHUR, D.S.O., Capt. R.I.M., retd. late Marine Dept., Bengal (b. 22nd Sept., 1879).—Apptd. port officer, Calcutta, 14th Nov., 1927; retd., May, 1932.

SCOTT, CHARLES WINTER, O.B.E., D.F.C., B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (timber advisory officer, rly. bd.) (b. 7th Jan., 1892).—Joined the army in the summer of 1915, and reported his

arrival at Rangoon on 13th Dec., 1919; asst. consvr., Feb., 1916; dep. consvr., Feb., 1921; O.B.E., June, 1932, forest economist, major products, Burma, July, 1933; jt. timber adviser, rly. and army depts., Oct., 1934; timber advisory officer, rly. bd., Sept., 1936.

SCOTT, DONALD CHARLES, O.B.E., Major, R.A.M.C. (b. 9th Dec., 1888).—First commn. dated 1st April, 1919; surg. to govr. of Bombay, 9th Dec., 1928, to Dec., 1933.

SCOTT, DONALD LANGHAM, O.B.E., late Indian Posts and Tels. (b. 19th May, 1887).—Joined the service, 1st Mar., 1909; supt., 1st Dec., 1915; on depn. to Field Service, May, 1919, to 5th Aug., 1919; asst. p.m., Oct., 1920; postmaster, Oct., 1921; presdy. ditto, June, 1935; O.B.E., Jan., 1939; ret'd., Mar., 1939.

SCOTT, ERNEST LYNCH, V.D., late Indian State Railways (N.W. Rly.) (b. 17th Apr., 1878).—Joined the service 2nd Oct., 1903, as asst. loco. supt., state rlys.; dist. loco. supt., April, 1911; dep. loco. supt., Oct., 1924; offg. dep. ch. mechanical engr., Oct., 1926; ret'd., Mar., 1932.

SCOTT, FRANCIS BURGESS, Col., I.A., Survey of India (director) (b. 3rd Mar., 1885).—First commn. dated 21st Dec., 1904; apptd. to I.A., 16th Feb., 1909; proby. asst. supt., April, 1910; confd. Oct., 1912; offg. dep. supt., April, 1919; confd., Aug., 1924; supt., Oct., 1926; offg. dir., Apr., 1936; confd., Nov., 1937.

SCOTT, FRANCIS WILLIAM, B.A., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Burma) (b. 9th Nov., 1886).—Educ. at Newcastle-under-Lyme High Sch., Jesus Coll., Cambridge, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1910; arrived in India, 12th Dec., 1911, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1921; dep. commr. (prov. sub.), Aug., 1927; confd., May, 1928.

SCOTT, GEORGE EDWARD, O.B.E., B.E., B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (supg. engr., Burma) (b. 10th Oct., 1884).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1908; exec. engr., Oct., 1916; O.B.E., June, 1919; offg. supt. engr., June, 1926; confd., Apr., 1930; ch. public wks. officer, F.S.S., Apr., 1930; and again Mar., 1936.

SCOTT, HENRY DONALD MORTIMER, Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 17th Feb., 1900).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th Jan., 1920; offg. supt., March, 1926; confd., July, 1932; King's police medal, Feb., 1937; awarded bar to medal, Jan., 1938.

SCOTT HERBERT BODLEY, O.B.E., F.R.C.S.E., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd., late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 14th Dec., 1882).—First commn. dated 1st Sept., 1906; in milty. employ to 25th Mar., 1910; spl. plague medl. officer, May, 1910; offg. police surg. and pathologist, Rangoon, July, 1912; on mil. service from 27th Oct., 1914, to 28th April, 1919; asst. medl. supt., Rangoon, Aug., 1920; O.B.E., Aug., 1920; civil surg., July, 1921; offg. medl. supt., Rangoon, Jan., 1922; surg., gen. hosp., Rangoon, Feb., 1926; reverted to milty. employ, Oct., 1934; ret'd., Apr., 1937.

SCOTT, IAN DIXON, B.A., Indian C.S. (b. 6th Mar., 1909).—Educ. at Queen's Royal Coll., Trinidad, Balliol Coll., Oxford, and School of Economics, London; apptd. after exam. of 1931; arrived in India, Nov., 1932, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; asst. commr., Bannu, Oct., 1935; asst. pol. agent, Chitral, Apr., 1936; asst. commr.,

Mansehra, Nov., 1937.

SCOTT, JAMES ALEXANDER, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 2nd Dec., 1895).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1915; on mil. duty from 26th July, 1916, to 4th Feb., 1919; asst. supt., Dec., 1920; supt., Dec., 1924; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1926; princpl. police trainingsch., Dec., 1929; O.B.E., Jan., 1931; senr. supt., Delhi, Oct., 1936.

SCOTT, JAMES EDWARD, O.B.E., M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 13th Feb., 1882).—Educ. at Inverness Coll., Glasgow University, and Christ Church Coll., Glasgow; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived, 26th Nov., 1906, and served in E. Bengal and Assam as asst. mag. and collr.; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Sept., 1913; on censor duty, Bombay, from April, 1915, to Jan., 1916; acting supt., Mayurbhanj State, Feb., 1916, to April, 1917; served under govt. of India, Army dept., from June, 1917, to April, 1919; O.B.E., June, 1919; mag. and collr., Nov., 1919; pol. agent and commr., Orissa Feudatory States, Nov., 1927; commr., Dec., 1931; ret'd., Sept., 1937.

SCOTT, MURIEL ELENA, M.A., M.B.E., Indian Educ. Service (lecturer, teachers' training coll., Rangoon) (b. 18th June, 1888).—Joined the service as asst. lecturer on education, Univ. Coll., Rangoon, 2nd April, 1923; lecturer on education, ditto, Nov., 1926; lecturer, teachers' training coll., Rangoon, Apr., 1931.

SCOTT, SAMUEL GORDON AMAND, Indian Police (b. 25th Oct., 1914).—Apptd. asst. supt., Burma, on probn., 5th Dec., 1934.

SCOTT, SIR WALTER LAWRENCE, C.I.E., M.A., B.Sc., late Indian C.S.
