(b. 7th Aug., 1880).—Educ. at Canterbury Coll., New Zealand; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived, 12th Dec., 1904; and served in Bengal as asst. and collr.; transf. to E. Bengal and Assam, Oct., 1905; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1911; under-sec. to chief commr., Assam, April, 1912; asst. commr., Assam, Oct., 1912; ditto, and settl. offr., Aug., 1913; dep. commr., Nov., 1919; dir. of land records, inspr.-genl. of registrn., etc., Assam, April, 1923; C.I.E., March, 1929; member, legisl. council, Sept., 1932; offg. ch. secty. to govt., Assam, Sept., 1932; offg. commr., Jan., 1934; offg. member, govr.'s exec. Council, Assam, June, 1935; confd., Sept., 1935; member, rev. tribunal, Apr., 1937, to April, 1939; Knighted, Jan., 1939; ret'd., Dec., 1939.

SCOTT, WILLIAM HAY, late Indian Finance Dept. (b. 18th July, 1876).—Joined the service, 17th Jan., 1898, as asst. examr. of accts., p.w. dept.; dep. examr., April, 1901; examr., June, 1907; dep. auditor, N.W. Rly., June, 1918; ch. auditor, E.B. Rly., April, 1925; services placed at the disposal of the Railway Board from 26th Nov., 1925; acct.-genl., June, 1926; dir. of clearing house accts., Lahore, Dec., 1926; contr. rly. accts., Mar., 1929; ret'd., July, 1931.

SCOTT, WILLIAM HERBERT, V.D., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 11th Oct., 1877).—Joined the service, 10th Dec., 1896; asst. traffic supt., Jan., 1902; dist. ditto, Jan., 1906; dep. traffic manager, June, 1917; dep. transportation supt., Nov., 1922; offg. ch. ditto, June, 1928; ret'd., Sept., 1933.

SCOTT O'CONNOR, THOMAS ARTHUR LESLIE, C.I.E., late Indian Police Service (b. 16th Jan., 1878).—Joined the service 27th April, 1901, and posted to United Provs.; asst.

supt., April, 1906; supt., Dec., 1912; awarded King's police medal, Feb., 1917; offg. dep. inspr.-gen., May, 1920; confd. as dep. inspr.-gen., March, 1925; C.I.E., June, 1929; rettd., Apl., 1932.

SCOTTER, HENRY HAROLD GORDON DILL, Indian State Rlys. (dist. loco. supt. E.B. rly.) (b. 25th Mar., 1888).—Joined the service, 15th Oct., 1913; dist. loco. supt., E.B. rly., 'Oct., 1927; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., Oct., 1934.

SCOTT-SCOTT, DOUGLAS V.D., Indian State Rlys. (works manager) (b. 16th June, 1890).—Joined the service 11th Mar., 1921; asst. works manager, Dec., 1928; works manager, G.I.P. rly., provl., April, 1935; confd. senior scale, Feb., 1938.

SCRIMSHAW, SYDNEY HENRY, Office of High Commr. for India (higher clerical officer, accts. dept.) (b. 9th Apl., 1891).—Apptd., 1st July, 1925; transfed. from the G.I.P. Rly Co.

SCRIVEN, GEORGE WILLIAM, Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., E.I. Rly.) (b. 24th Sept., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st June, 1915; exec. engr., Oct., 1922.

SCROGGIE, HAROLD FORBES, Indian Police (supt., N.W.F.P.) (b. 14th Nov., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 15th March, 1921; offg. dist. officer, frontier constabulary, Jan., 1926; offg. supt., Nov., 1926; confd., Oct., 1931; dist. officer. frontier constab., Oct., 1934.

SCROGGIE, JOHN ADAM, O.B.E., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 27th Mar., 1895).—Joined the service 20th Nov., 1915; on milty duty from 26th July, 1916, to 19th Jan., 1919; asst. supt., July, 1921; supt., Apl., 1925; O.B.E., Feb., 1937.

SCROGGIE, WILLIAM REITH JOHN, C.I.E., Col., I.M.S. (rettd.) (b. 23rd Jan., 1876).—Joined the service, 29th Jan., 1902; C.I.E., Aug., 1918; D.M.O., medl. officer, central jail, Salem, Oct., 1923; offg. D.M.O., Nilgiris, April, 1924; reverted to milty. employ from 14th June, 1930; rettd., Jan., 1933.

SCROOPE, ARTHUR EDGAR, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 24th Jan., 1881).—Educ. at Clongowes Wood Sch., and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1903; arrived, 12th Dec., 1904, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; transfed. to E. Bengal and Assam, Oct., 1905; re-transf. to Bengal, March, 1907; jt. mag. and dep. collr., April, 1911; transf. to Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1918; supt. and membr., legal affairs, and sec. to govt. of Bihar and Orissa, judicial dept., April, 1924; actg. judge, high ct., Patna, Jan., 1927; and again, March, 1931; addl. ditto, Nov., 1929; judge, high ct., Patna, Oct., 1932; rettd., July, 1933.

SCRUBY, JOSEPH, Indian State Rlys. (dep. ch. engr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 26th Mar., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1910; I.A.R.O., 25th March, 1915; exec. engr., Oct., 1918; offg. dep. ch. engr., N.W. rly., Oct., 1932; and again, Oct., 1935; ditto, (probl. perm.), Oct., 1935; confd., Apl., 1936.

SEAL, AMARENDRA NATH, B.Sc. (Engineering London) (engr.-in-chief, lighthouse dep., and chief inspr. of lighthouses in British India) (b. 15th Jan., 1895).—Educ. at Presidency Coll., Calcutta, and Univ. Coll., London. —Joined service on 2nd Mar., 1931, as inspr. of lighthouses in British India; engineer-in-chief, lighthouse dept., and chief inspr. of lighthouses in British India, 25th Mar., 1938; confd., 7th Oct., 1938.

SEAL, BENOYENDRA NATH, B.A. (Cantab.)

Barr., Indian Educl. Service (prof., Elph. Coll., Bombay) (b. 14th Apl., 1892).—Joined the service, 25th March, 1922; prof. of English and logic, Gujarat coll., March, 1922; doing duty as prof. of English, Karnatak Coll., Dharwar, Oct., 1925; confd., Feb., 1926; prof., Elph. Coll., Bombay, June, 1930.

SEALE, HERBERT JOHN, A.M.I.E.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 9th Apl., 1881).—Joined the service as asst. electrical supt., 16th Dec., 1912; asst. electrical engr., Nov., 1922; offg. electrical engr., G.I.P. rly., June, 1926; confd., Dec., 1927; rettd., Apl., 1938.

SEALY, WILFRED ARTHUR PRINCE, Indian Police (dep. inspr.-gen., Bihar) (b. 27th May, 1886).—Joined the service 2nd Dec., 1905, as asst. supt. of police; asst. to dep. inspr.-gen., Bengal, Sept., 1911; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, April, 1912; supt., Sept., 1914; persl. asst. to inspr.-gen. of police, Bihar and Orissa, Oct., 1918; recd. King's police medal; offg., dep. inspr.-gen., June, 1926; confd., Feb., 1931.

SEAMAN, Rev. ALFRED JONATHAN, M.A., (name changed to Nix-Seaman), Indian Eccles. Estab. (b. 14th Jan., 1886).—Apptd. chaplain on probn., 1st Dec., 1920; junr. chaplain, Dec., 1922; senr. chaplain, May, 1932; offg. archdeacon, Apl., 1935.

SEAMAN, CHARLES KENNINGALE, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 2nd Nov., 1888).—Educ. at Bradfield and Hertford Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1913, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr., serving under govt. of India, army dept., from Sept. to Nov., 1918; under-sec. to chief commr., Dec., 1918, to Feb., 1920; dep. commr. (provl.), April, 1925; confd., Aug., 1925; excise commr., Oct., 1931; retired, Nov., 1937.

SEARLE, CARLETON STUART, M.C., Major I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 29th Nov., 1895).—First commn. dated 8th Aug., 1914; joined the pol. dept., 13th June, 1923; asst. pol. agent, Chilas, July, 1924; asst. commr., Kohat, Oct., 1926; ditto, D.I. Khan, Sept., 1928; ditto, Tank, Novr., 1929; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Sept., 1930; senr. sub-judge, Peshawar, Apl., 1931; jt. dep. commr., Peshawar, July, 1931; pol. agent, Khyber, Jan., 1934; dep. commr., Dera Ismail Khan, Nov., 1938; pol. agent, Orissa States, Jan., 1939; pol. agent, Chagai, Nov., 1939.

SEARLE, HUMPHREY FREDERIC, B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 1st March, 1888).—Educ. at Bradfield, New Coll., Oxford, and Univ. Coll., London; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 2nd Dec., 1912, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; warden of Yenangyaung, Minbu and Singu oilfields, June, 1916; on mil. duty from Jan., 1918, to Sept., 1919; offg. settltg. officer, May, 1920, to Jan., 1921, and from May, 1922; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1926; confd., Feb., 1929; commr. of settlements and land records, Apl., 1932; rettd., July, 1938.

SEATON, EDWARD ALBERT, B.A., late Indian Forest Service (b. 3rd April, 1886).—Arrived 18th Dec., 1909, and served as asst. consvr., Dec., 1914; on mil. service, July, 1918, to March, 1919; name changed from 'Siltzler' by Deed Poll, May, 1927; rettd., Aug., 1935.

SEGRAVE, SIR THOMAS GEORGE, Kt., C.B.E., Commander, R.N.R., late Office of High Commr. for India.—Educ. at St. Charles Coll., Bayswater, and on H.M.S. "Conway"

younger Brother of Trinity House, Dec., 1901; surveyor of shipping, India Office, 1st April; 1907; styled shipping surveyor and adviser from Jan., 1914; served in the U.S. Navy during the Hispano-American War, was twice mentioned in despatches, received the Special Service Medal, the Naval and Military Order of the Spanish-American War, the Hispano-American Medal with two clasps, and the thanks of Congress; attached to the transport service during the Boer War; received the U.S. Gold Medal for saving life, the Dutch Humane Societies' Medal with Orange Nassau Ribbon, and the thanks of the Queen of Holland and of the U.S. Congress for saving life at sea; elected to the Institute of Naval Architects, April, 1902; granted hon. rank of commander, R.N.R., Sept., 1914; O.B.E., Jan., 1918; temp. hon. capt., Royal Indian Marine, June, 1918; C.B.E., Jan., 1920; styled "Director of India Office Shipping" while engaged in management of India Office prize ships, May, 1920; Kt., June, 1923; ret'd., Nov., 1925.

SEIN, U CHU, B.A., late Burma Judicial Service (b. 20th Aug., 1879).—Apptd. asst. judge, 17th Sept., 1920; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1929; ret'd., Aug., 1934.

SEIN, MAUNG BA, T.P.S., Indian State Rlys. (statistical officer) (b. 30th Aug., 1881).—Joined the service, 1st Aug., 1907; asst. engr., Burma Rlys., Apl., 1921; offg. statistical officer, Apl., 1925; confd., Mar., 1931.

SELL, REV. CHARLES EDWARD, M.A., late Indian Eccl. Estabt. (b. 8th Aug., 1877).—Joined the service, 13th Oct., 1905; junr. chaplain, Oct., 1908; senr. chaplain, Oct., 1918; chaplain, Waziristan Force, 1st Feb. to 4th Dec., 1921; ret'd., June, 1931.

SELVAM, AROGYASWAMI THAMARSELVAN PANNIR, RAO BAHADUR, BART.—Apptd. member of govr.'s exec.-council, Madras, 16th Aug., 1934.

SELWYN, JOHN SIDNEY AUGUSTUS, M.B.E., Indian Police (asst. supt., Punjab) (b. 17th Oct., 1908).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., Punjab, 20th Nov., 1928; transfld. to N.W.F.P., Jan., 1930; confd., Nov., 1930; offg. dist. officer, Frontier constab., July, 1932; confd., Nov., 1935; M.B.E., Jan., 1939.

SEN, AMARENDRA NATH, Bengal Judl. Service (b. 13th May, 1891).—Apptd. dist. and sess. judge, April, 1928; judge, high ct., Calcutta, Nov., 1938.

SEN, BHIM (see Bhim Sen).

SEN, BHUPATI MOHAN, M.A. (Cantab.), M.Sc., Indian Educl. Service (princpl., Presdy. Coll., Calcutta) (b. 1st Apl., 1888).—Joined the service as prof., Dacca Coll., 9th July, 1915; prof., presdy. coll., Calcutta, Aug., 1923; princpl., ditto, Aug., 1931.

SEN, BINAY RANJAN, B.A. (Calcutta), Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 1st Jan., 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta and Oxford (non-Coll.); joined the service, 31st Oct., 1922; arrived, 4th Dec., 1922, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. magte., Feb., 1928; offg. magte. and collr., Nov., 1929; addl. sec., pol., and appt. depts., Bengal, Nov., 1931; dep. secty., ditto, Nov., 1932; mag. and collr., Feb., 1936.

SEN, GIRISH CHANDRA, Rai Bahadur, M.A.,

Bengal Civil Service (mag. and collr.) (b. Sept., 1886).—Joined the service, Jan., 1910; dep. mag. and collr., Jan., 1912; mag. and collr., Oct., 1937.

SEN, JATINDRA NATH, M.A., F.C.S., Ph.D. (Cal.), late Indian Agricultural Service (b. 9th Dec., 1880).—Held ministerial appts. from 9th June, 1905; 1st asst. to impl. agric. chemist, Dec., 1909; supy. agric. chemist, Feb., 1914; plant biological chemist, Apl., 1928; ret'd., Apl., 1932.

SEN, JYOTI LAL, M.C., M.B., Lt.-Col. (ret'd.), late I.M.S. (b. 22nd Oct., 1883).—First commnd. dated 28th Jan., 1911; in mil. employ to 12th July, 1922; civil surg., Assam, Nov., 1925; ret'd., Oct., 1938.

SEN, KARUNAKANTAN, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 19th Nov., 1911).—Educ. at Narainganj High English School, Bengal, Calcutta University, King's College, London, and the School of Oriental Studies, London. Joined the service, 9th Oct., 1924; arrived in India, Nov., 1934, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1936.

SEN, KSHIROD CHANDRA, Rai Bahadur, B.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th Dec., 1879).—Joined the service, 22nd Jan., 1907; asst. engr., Jan., 1908; exec. engr., Jan., 1909; offg. supt. engr., April, 1928; confd., Jan., 1933; ret'd., Dec., 1935.

SEN, KSHITIS CHANDRA, B.A., Indian C.S. (addtl. judge high ct., Bombay) (b. 5th Oct., 1888).—Educ. at Calcutta, and Trinity Hall, Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1912; arrived, 15th Nov., 1913, and served in Bombay as asst. magte. and collr.; asst. judge and addl. sess. judge, Nov., 1921; asst. remembr. and sec. to legisl. council, Dec., 1923; offg. judge and sess. judge, May, 1926; and again, Jan., 1928; confd., Jan., 1929; jt. judge and addl. sess. judge, Nov., 1926; regtr., high ct., Bombay, April, 1928; offg. judge, high ct., Bombay, July, 1934, June, 1935, June, 1936, Mar., 1937, and Nov., 1938; offg. secty. to govt., legal dept., Bombay, Feb., 1935; confd., Dec., 1935; addtl. judge high ct., Bombay, Nov., 1937.

SEN, KUMUD KANTA, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 26th Nov., 1896).—Joined the service, 20th Feb., 1922; examr., outside audit dept., Bengal, Apl., 1936; dep. dir. rly. audit, Apl., 1937; dep. acct.-genl., posts and tels., Delhi, July, 1938.

SEN, MANMATHA NATH, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., late Bihar and Orissa Civil Service (b. 15th July, 1880).—Joined the service as proby. dep. collr., 4th Aug., 1902; dep. magte. and dep. collr., May, 1903; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1930; offg. secty. to govt., local self-govt. dept., Apl., 1931; mag. and collr., Jan., 1934; ret'd., July, 1935.

SEN, NAKUL, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 14th Aug., 1910).—Educated at Govt. High Schools, Delhi and Simla, University of Delhi and Magdalene College, Cambridge; joined the service, 6th Sept., 1935; arrived in India, Oct., 1935, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

SEN, NALIN SANKER, M.A., Indian State Rlys. (asst. traffic supt.) (b. 3rd Sept., 1893).—Joined the service 1st May, 1917; asst. transpn. supt., G.I.P. rly., junr., Nov., 1922; ditto, senr., Jan., 1930.

SEN, NALINI KANTA, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 27th Oct., 1895).—Joined the service.

26th Feb., 1920; asst. auditor, E.B. rly., May, 1921; divl. audit officer, N.W. rly., May, 1925; dep. acct.-genl., United Provs., Sept., 1932; asst. contr. of rly. accts., Dec., 1935; dep.acct. genl., Burma, July, 1936; offg. acct.-genl., Burma, Oct., 1936; re-transfd. to India, Mar. 1939.

SEN, NARENDRA KUMAR, late Bengal Civil Service. (b. 5th Jan., 1881).—Joined the service as proby. dep. magte. and dep. collr., 12th Oct., 1903; confd., April, 1905; offg. magte. and collr., Feb., 1930; confd., June, 1931; ret'd. Jan. 1936.

SEN, NARENDRA NATH (see Narendra Nath, S.).

SEN, PHANINDRA LAL, RAI BAHADUR, M.A., B.L., late Bihar and Orissa Civil Service (b. 16th Jan., 1879).—Joined the service, 28th June, 1905; offg. munisif, Oct., 1906; confd., July, 1907; sub-judge, Aug., 1919; dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1931; ret'd., Jan., 1934.

SEN, PRANAB KUMAR, Indian Police (b. 11th Nov., 1912) (asst. supt., Bengal).—Apptd. on probn., 12th Feb., 1937; confd., Feb., 1939.

SEN, RAJENDRA NATH, M.A., M.Sc. (Leeds).—late Indian Educl. Service (b. Aug., 1879).—Apptd. prof., presdy. coll., 10th April, 1920; offg. princpl., Krishnigar Coll., July, 1931; ret'd., July, 1934.

SEN, SACHINDRA NATH, M.Sc. (Cal. and London), Ph.D. (London), Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 5th Dec., 1891).—Joined the service as meteorologist, 14th Sept., 1925.

SEN, SAMARENDRANATH, B.A., B.Sc. Econ., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr. Bengal) (b. 10th Aug., 1914).—Educ. at Govt. Sch., Comilla, Calcutta Univ., Univ. Coll., London, and Univ. Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 7th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

SEN, SISIR KUMAR, Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bengal) (b. 3rd Feb., 1903).—Educ. at Univ. of the Punjab, and King's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1927; arrived, Nov., 1927, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Apl., 1933; ditto, Assam, Jan., 1935.

SEN, SUKUMAR, B.A. (Calcutta), Ind. C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 2nd January, 1898).—Educ. at Calcutta and London University; joined the service, 30th Oct., 1922; arrived, 13th Dec., 1922, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Feb., 1928; dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1931; offg. ch. presy. mag., Calcutta, Apl., 1934.

SEN, SURENDRA NATH (see Surendra Nath Sen).

SEN, SUSIL C., C.B.E.—Apptd. Solicitor to the Central Govt. at Calcutta, April, 1937.

SENAPATI, NILAMANI, B.A., B.Sc., F.R.G.S., Indian C.S. (dep. secty., pol. and appt. depts., Bihar) (b. 19th Feb., 1897).—Educ. at Raven-shaw Coll., Cuttack, Patna Coll., and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 15th Jan., 1922, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; asst. settlement officer, Nov., 1925; jt. mag., Jan., 1929; offg. mag. and collr., July, 1929; ditto (provl. subs.), Apl., 1936; dep. secty., pol. and appt. depts., Bihar, April, 1939.

SEN GUPTA, ATUL CHANDRA, M.A., Indian Educl. Service (princpl., Morris Coll., Nagpur) (b. 14th Feb., 1887).—Held temp. appts. from 21st Aug., 1917, to 10th April, 1919; prof.,

Morris Coll., Nagpur (on probn.), Sept., 1920; confd., Sept., 1922; offg. princpl., ditto, July, 1932; confd. June, 1933.

SEN GUPTA, BIRENDRA NATH, M.Sc., Indian Audit Dept. (b. Jan., 1896).—Joined the service, 21st Sept., 1920; asst. dir. of audit, Defence Services, E.C., Apl., 1936; dep. acct.-genl., central rev., May, 1938.

SEN GUPTA, DEBENDRA NATH, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (suptg. engr., Bengal) (b. 31st Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, 26th Jan., 1914; asst. engr., Jan., 1915; exec. engr., Jan., 1924; suptg. ditto, Aug., 1937.

SEN GUPTA, MANINDRA LAL, B.A., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Orissa) (b. 1st Sept., 1899).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 9th Nov., 1923; dep. consvr., July, 1930.

SEN GUPTA, MOHIT KUMAR, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 4th Apl., 1894).—Joined the service, 27th Feb., 1919; asst. acct. genl., Central Provs., July, 1925; dep. contr., Assam May, 1929; dep. acct. genl., central revs., Sept., 1932; audit officer, Indian stores dept., Feb., 1933; and again, Oct., 1935; offg. dep. dir. genl. (finance), posts and tels., May, 1935; financial adviser and secty., local reconstruction comtee., Quetta, Feb., 1936; finance offr., communication, June, 1939, financial adviser to ch. commr., Delhi, Aug., 1939.

SENIOR, ARTHUR FAIRFAX, late Indian Police, Punjab (b. 7th Aug., 1897).—Joined the service, 15th Mar., 1921; offg. supt., Feb., 1926; confd., May, 1927; on depn. at Met. Police Coll., London, from Feb., 1934; ret'd., Sept., 1938.

SENNECK, FRANCIS HARRY, late Indian C.S. (b. 30th Dec., 1887).—Educ. at Christ's Hospital and New Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1911; arrived, 23rd Nov., 1912, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; sub-collr. and jt. mag., Oct., 1917; offg. commr. of income tax, Apl., 1924; asst. commr. of income tax, Nov., 1925; offg. commr., inc. tax, Aug., 1926; confd., June, 1928; collr., May, 1931; ret'd., Jan., 1939.

SEPHTON, RALPH, B.A., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian State Rlys. (b. 8th Nov., 1882).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 26th May, 1911; resdt. engr., Sept., 1912; in milty. employ from 24th Sept., 1914, to 27th April, 1920; dist. engr., June, 1922; engr.-in-ch., Bhore and Thall Ghats, Dec., 1926; offg. suptg. engr., Bombay Dist. works, Feb., 1927; dep. ch. engr., May, 1931; offg. ch. engr., G.I.P. rly., May, 1933; confd. (provl.), Feb., 1935; ret'd., Sept., 1939.

SERRAILLIER, ANTONY RODGER, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Madras) (b. 1st May, 1914).—Educ. at Brighton Coll., and Trinity Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 29th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.

SESHADRI, MEENAKSHISUNDARA, Indian C.S. (sub-collr., Madras) (b. 17th Jan., 1905).—Educ. at University of Madras and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 8th Oct., 1929; arrived, October, 1929, and served in Madras as asst. mag. and coll.; sub-collr., Sept., 1932.

SESHADRI SARMA, GAVARPAT KRISHNA-SWAMI, B.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 6th Dec., 1892).—Joined the service, 4th May, 1914; asst. secty., govt. of India fin. dept., May, 1933; services placed at disposal of govt. of India, for. and pol. dept., Oct., 1935; under secty.

(common) to crown and extl. affairs depts., April, 1937.

SESHAGIRI RAO, PAMIDI HANUMANTA, B.Sc., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 13th Jan., 1898).—Joined the service, 23rd Feb., 1922; on for service under the Reserve Bank of India, Mar., 1935; dep. acct.-genl., Madras, Jan., 1938; ditto, Bombay, June, 1938.

SESHU AYYAR, ERODE RAMASWAMY, M.A., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 26th Oct., 1892).—Joined the service, 2nd March, 1914; asst. acctnt.-gen., Burma, March, 1916; asst. acctnt.-gen., posts and tels., Calcutta, May, 1917; asst. acctnt.-gen., Central Provs., April, 1922; dep. acctnt.-gen., posts and tels., ditto, Sept., 1925; dep. govt. examr., accts., B.N. Rly., Mar., 1931; offg. dep. dir. rly. clearing accts. office, Nov., 1932; offg. dir., ditto, Mar., 1933; offg. dep. ch. accts. officer, E.I. rly., Feb., 1934; acct.-genl., Bengal, Oct., 1937.

SET, MAUNG (see Maung Set).

SETALVAD, SIR CHIMANLAL HARILAL, Kt., K.C.I.E., B.A., LL.B.—Apptd. addl. judge, Bombay high ct., June, 1920; member of govr.'s exec. council, Bombay, Jan., 1921, to June, 1923; K.C.I.E., June, 1924; apptd. member of Royal Commn. on Superior Civil Services in India, and resigned, Oct., 1923; delegate to Indian round table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931.

SETALVAD, MOTILAL C., B.A., LL.B.—Apptd. advocate genl. for the Province of Bombay, 12th Dec., 1937.

SETH, JAGAT BIHARI, B.A., B.Sc., Indian Educ. Service (prof., govt. coll., Lahore) (b. 23rd Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, 21st Oct., 1921; prof., govt. coll., Lahore, April, 1922.

SETH, KUNJ BEHARILAL, M.A., B.Sc., LL.B., Indian C.S. (dep. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 20th Nov., 1895).—Educ. at Morris and Hislop Colls., Victoria Coll. of Science, Nagpur, and Brasenose Coll., Oxford; apptd. by nomination in India; joined the service, 12th Dec., 1921; arrived, 11th Jan., 1922, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., March, 1927; and again, Apl., 1932; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1928; offg. senr. dep. regr., co-op. societies, Nov., 1934; dep. commr., Mar., 1937; revenue secty., Nov., 1938.

SETH, RAJ BEHARI, B.Sc., A.M.I.E. (Ind.), T.C.E. Coll., Roorkee, Indian State Rlys. (exec. engr., N.W. rly.) (b. 14th Mar., 1894).—Joined the service Sept., 1917; asst. engr., Sept., 1918; asst. exec. engr., May, 1921; exec. engr. (prov.), Mar., 1938.

SETHI, DAULAT RAM, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Agric. Service (dir. of agric., Bihar) (b. 25th Apl., 1891).—Joined the service, 30th Oct., 1914; dep. dir. of agric., Nov., 1914; offg. dir. of agric., Apl., 1932; confd., Aug., 1934.

SETHI, RAM LAL, M.Sc., M.R.A.S., Indian Agric. Service (asst. agricl. commr.) (b. 20th Apl. 1894).—Joined the service as economic botanist, to govt., United Provs., 19th Dec., 1921; asst. agricl. commr., Aug., 1937.

SETON, SIR MALCOLM COTTER CARISTON, K.C.B., M.A., late India Office (b. 13th Nov., 1872).—Educ. at Repton Sch., and Oriel Coll., Oxford (classical scholar); selected candidate, Indian Civil Service, Sept., 1895; junior clerk, judl. and publ. dept., India Office, May, 1898; resdt. clerk, Nov., 1898, to April, 1901; temporarily transfld. for duty in the mil. dept., July, to Oct., 1900; priv. sec. to parly. under-sec. of state, March, 1901; senior clerk, finl. dept.,

Nov., 1902; judl. and publ. dept., March, 1907; asst. sec., ditto, March, 1910; sec. ditto, Oct., 1911; C.B., June, 1915; on deputn. to India in connection with the visit of the sec. of state, Oct., 1917, to May, 1918; K.C.B., Jan., 1919; actg. asst. under-sec. of state, Dec., 1918; asst. under-sec. of state, and clerk of the Council, Dec., 1919; dep. under-sec. of state, Aug., 1924; ret'd., Dec., 1933; author of 'The India Office' (Whitehall Series).

SETHU RAO, KAIWAR (see Kaiwar, Sethu Rao).

SEWARD, HERBERT GREGORY, Indian Police (b. 12th Nov., 1908).—Joined the service as asst. supt., United Provs., 24th Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1930; addtl. asst. to I.G. police, Mar., 1938.

SEWELL, EDWARD MORTON, M.B., Ch.B. (Edin.), Major, I.M.S., Medical Dept., Madras (b. 27th Oct., 1898).—First commn. dated 7th Mar., 1927; in milty. employ until Oct., 1937; dist. medl. offr., Nov., 1937.

SEWELL, ROBERT BERESFORD SEYMOUR, C.I.E., M.A., F.A.S.B., F.L.S., F.Z.S., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., late Zoological Survey of India (b. 5th Mar., 1880).—First commn. dated 1st Feb., 1908; surg.-naturalist, marine survey of India, 1910-1913, 1919, and again, 1920-25; offg. prof. of biology, medical coll., Calcutta, 1911; in milty. employ, 1914-18; offg. supt., zoological survey of India, 1919; dir., ditto, July, 1925; C.I.E., Jan., 1933; ret'd., Mar., 1935; editor of the Fauna of India Series of publicns.

SEYMOUR, ALMERIC HIGH, M.A., Indian C.S. (secty., govt., Burma defence dept.) (b. 23rd July, 1894).—Educ. at St. Edward's School, Oxford, and Worcester Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 11th March, 1921; arrived, 20th April, 1921, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; asst. to commr., settl. and land records, July, 1923; supt. of colonization in addn. from July to Nov., 1924; jt. registrar, co-op. societies dept., Jan., 1926; offg. dep. commr., Dec., 1929; confd., Jan., 1934; dep. secty., finance dept., Burma, Mar., 1932; offg. secty. to govt. of India, reforms office, July, 1933; secty., finance dept., Burma, Mar., 1934, and again, Jan., 1936; addl. secty. to govt., reforms office, Burma, Feb., 1936; offg. secty., ditto, June, 1936; secty., defence dept., Apl., 1937.

SEYS, STANLEY AUGUSTUS, M.C., India Office (higher exec. officer, accts. dept.) (b. 23rd Mar., 1890).—Served as sec. div. clerk, Scotch Edn. Office, April to Oct., 1911, and in office of engr. in-chief, G.P.O., from Oct., 1911; apptd. second class clerk, India Office, 25th Nov., 1912, and attd. to stores dept.; on mil. service from Aug., 1914, to Feb., 1919; transfld. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; transfld. to I.E. Tel. Dept., India Office, Feb., 1922; exec. officer, April, 1922; transfld. to milty. dept., Jan., 1927; higher exec. officer and assessor of inc. tax, Jan., 1928.

SHADI LAL, Sir, Rai Bahadur, Kt., P.C., M.A. (b. 12th May, 1874).—Temp. addl. judge, chief court, Punjab, June to Aug., 1913, and again from March, 1914; actng. judge, May, 1916; judge, Feb., 1917; judge, high ct., Punjab, April, 1919; ch. justice, ditto, May, 1920; knighted, Jan., 1921; member, cap. rate trib. Nov., 1932; ret'd., May, 1934; P.C., Mar., 1934; member of judl. cttee. of Privy Cl., May, 1934 to Nov., 1938.

SHAH, ABUL HASANAT MUHAMMAD ISMAIL, B.A., Indian Police (asst. supt., Bengal) (b. 13th Feb., 1905).—Apptd. proby. asst. supt., 12th June, 1927; confd., Sept., 1929; offg. supt., Feb., 1934.

SHAH, AGHA SAIYID BAD, Capt., I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 23rd Jan., 1903).—First commn., 30th Aug., 1923; in milty. employ to 21st Jan., 1930; asst. commr., Peshawar, Apl., 1932; asst. pol. agent, N. Waziristan, Feb., 1933, and again, Nov., 1933; ditto, Mohmands, July, 1933; asst. commr., Thal, Apl., 1934; under-secty. to A.G.G., Punjab states, Mar., 1935; asst. pol. agent, Quetta-Pishin, Feb., 1936; pol. agent, ditto, June, 1937; offr. on special duty, Quetta, Mar., 1938; asst. pol. agent, Quetta-Pishin, April, 1938; asst. commr. Nowshera, Feb., 1939.

SHAH, AMBALAL NAROTHAMDAS, B.A., LL.B., Barr., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Central Provs.) (b. 29th Sept., 1896).—Educ. at Bombay Univ., and Queen's Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Nov., 1921; arrived in India, 17th Dec., 1921, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; offg. dep. commr., May, 1925; asst. commr. and sess. judge, Apl., 1932; confd., June, 1934; legal secty., Feb., 1939.

SHAH, ASGHAR ALI, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 3rd Apl., 1914).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; apptd., on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 19th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

SHAH, BAGER ZAINULABIEDIN, M.R.C.S. (Eng.), L.R.C.P. (Lond.), Lt.-Col., I.M.S. (civ. surg., Bombay) (b. 5th Apl., 1885).—First commn. dated 14th March, 1920, and served in the mil. dept. prior to 21st April, 1923; offg. civil surg., June, 1923; confd., Aug., 1927; supt. of Mahabeshwar, Oct., 1937; civil surg., Poona, Mar., 1938; transf. to Sind, Apl., 1938; transf. to Bombay, March, 1939.

SHAH, HAMID MUKHTAR, Khan Sahib, B.A., Indian Police (supt., Punjab) (b. 15th Mar., 1886).—Joined the service, 22nd May, 1909; apptd. to I.P. as supt., Apl., 1935.

SHAH, JAKUB (see Jakub, S.)

SHAH, JELAL MOOCHOO, M.B.E., M.R.C.S., L.R.C.P., Lt.-Col. I.M.S. (specialist in vener. disease, Bombay) (b. 17th Jan., 1886).—Served in milty. dept. prior to 16th Oct., 1922; M.B.E., Sept., 1921; offg. dy. asst. dir.-genl., I.M. Services, Oct., 1922; offg. pers. asst. to surg.-genl. with govt. of Bombay, June, 1924; confd., May, 1926; specialist in vener. disease, Apr., 1931.

SHAH, KUNWAR PRATAP BIKRAM (see Pratap Bikram Shah K.).

SHAH, MAQBUL (see Maqbul Shah).

SHAH, MAZHAR HUSSAIN, M.B., B.S., M.R.C.P., M.R.C.S., D.P.H., Major, I.M.S. (civil surg.) (b. 3rd June, 1902).—First commn. dated 30th April, 1931; in milty. employ prior to 16th Oct., 1937, when he was appointed civil surg.

SHAH MUHAMMAD SULAIMAN, Sir, LL.D., M.A. (judge, federal ct. of India) (b. 3rd Feb., 1886).—Apptd. offg. judge, high ct., Allahabad, from 15th April, 1920; judge, high ct., Allahabad, 30th May, 1923; offg. chief justice, ditto, April to Aug., 1928; Oct., 1929, and again, Mar., 1931; confd., Oct.,

1932; Kt., June, 1929; member, Peshawar Riot enquiry ctee., 1930; vice-chancellor, Muslim univ., Aligarh, 1929 and 1930; member, capitulation rate tribunal, Nov., 1932; judge, federal ct. of India, Oct., 1937.

SHAH, NATVERAL BALUBHAI, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Sind) (b. 22nd Sept., 1900).—Joined the service as apprentice engr., 8th Oct., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1924; offg. exec. engr., June, 1933; confd., Oct., 1933.

SHAH, POPATLAL GOBINDLAL, M.A., B.Sc., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 9th Dec., 1888).—Joined the service, 10th March, 1914; asst. acctnt.-gen., Nov., 1917; dep. acctnt.-gen., Madras, April, 1926; asst. ditto, Bengal, Dec., 1926; audit officer, Calcutta, May, 1927; dep. acct.-genl., Bengal, Aug., 1927; ditto, Bihar and Orissa, Jan., 1928; ditto, Bombay, Apl., 1929; offg. acct.-genl., Bombay, June, 1930; dep. ch. accts. officer, G.I.P. Rly., Mar., 1933; chief auditor, E.I. rly., May, 1938; ch. auditor, N.W. Rly. and govt. examiner of accts., B. and N.W. Rly. and R. and K. Rly., Dec., 1938; acct. genl., Cent. Revs., Nov., 1939.

SHAH, SAIYID MAHMUD, KHAN BAHADUR, M.B.E., B.A., LL.B., late Indian Police Service (b. 31st Mar., 1878).—Joined the service, 2nd March, 1904; supt. of police, Aug., 1918; recd. King's police medal, Mar., 1929; ret'd., Mar., 1933; M.B.E., Jan., 1934.

SHAH, YAKUB (see Yakub, Shah).

SHAHA, HIRA LAL, M.A., Indian Police (supt., Bengal) (b. 10th Feb., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, 13th July, 1925; offg. supt., July, 1931; confd., Aug., 1938.

SHAHAB-UD-DIN KHUDA BAKSH, late Indian Police (b. 1st Aug., 1879).—Joined the service, 2nd July, 1906; supt., Oct., 1925; ret'd., Aug., 1934.

SHAHAB-UD-DIN, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Shahab-ud-din).

SHAHANI JAVERMAL TAHILRAM, RAI BAHADUR, late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 28th Sept., 1879).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 23rd Jan., 1899, to 31st Dec., 1916; sub.-engr., Jan., 1917; asst. engr., Feb., 1920; I.S.E. as asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1929; offg. exec. engr., Dec., 1931; confd., Sept., 1934; ret'd., Sept., 1934.

SHAIK, ABDUL KADIR SARFRAZ, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (b. 16th July, 1879).—Joined the service, 5th Feb., 1921; profir. of Persian, Elph. Coll., Bombay, Feb., 1921; ditto, Deccan Coll., Poona, Oct., 1926; ret'd., July, 1934.

SHAIKH, ABDUL HAMID, Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Jail dept. United Provs. (supt.) (b. 5th Feb., 1890).—First commn., dated 22nd Feb., 1921; in milty. employ prior to 30th Sept., 1927; supt., Oct., 1927; dep. dir.-genl., I.M.S., Jan., 1937.

SHAIKH, MUHAMMAD ABDUL KARIM, M.A., LL.B., Bombay Civil Service, Judicial Branch, (judge and sess. judge, Sind) (b. 28th Apl., 1885).—Held non-gazetted appts. from Nov., 1908, to Oct., 1911; sub-judge, Oct., 1911; offg. asst. judge, April, 1928; confd., Jan., 1930; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1931; confd., Feb., 1934.

SHAIKH, MUHAMMAD NAZIR J., B.A., LL.B., Bombay Civil Service Judl. Branch (judge and sess. judge) (b. 20th Jan., 1886).—Held various judl. appts. from Dec., 1927; asst. judge, 26th May, 1929; offg. judge and sess. judge, Oct., 1929, June, 1930, and Dec., 1930; confd., Dec., 1933.

SHAIKH YAKUB VAZIR MUHAMMAD, Khan Bahadur, M.B.E., B.A., late Bombay Civil Service (b. 11th Apr., 1883).—Joined the service, 24th Nov., 1907; dist. dep. collr., Jan. 1910; in foreign service in Khairpur State from 1st Oct., 1925, to 10th July, 1926; offg. collr. and dist. mag., March, 1927; confd., Nov., 1929; pol. agent, Jawhar, Feb., 1933; ret'd., June, 1937.

SHAIKH, WAZIR ALI, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bengal) (b. 23rd Feb., 1914).—Educ. at Punjab Univ.; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 15th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Oct., 1938, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.

SHAIN, MAUNG HLA, B.Sc., B.L., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Burma) (b. 22nd Oct., 1905).—Educ. at Rangoon University and London School of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 20th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; dep. secty., dept. of agric. and forests, Oct., 1938.

SHALLOW, ARTHUR WILLIAM, late Indian Police (b. 25th Aug., 1887).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 2nd Dec., 1900; supt., Aug., 1915; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., June, 1929; ret'd., March, 1939.

SHALOM, RALPH E., B.A., India Posts and Tels. (deputy postmaster-genl.) (b. 3rd Aug., 1893).—Joined the service as probny. supt., Oct., 1914; confd., Mar., 1916; depy. postmaster-genl., Feb., 1939.

SHAM LAL, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 11th Jan., 1900).—Joined the service, 20th Oct., 1922; apprentice engr., Sept., 1923; asst. exec. engr., March, 1924; offg. exec. engr., Sept., 1928; confd. Oct. 1932.

SHAM LAL, RAI BAHADUR, P.M.S., Civil Surgeon, United Provs. (b. 26th Feb., 1886).—Civil surg., July, 1929.

SHAM SINGH, RAI BAHADUR, B.A., Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. June, 1891).—Joined the service as proby. dep. supt., 1st Aug., 1913; confd., Nov., 1915; promoted to I.P.S. as supt., 1st Oct., 1930; awarded King's police medal, Feb., 1937.

SHAMALDHARI LALL, B.A., (Oxon), Indian C.S. (dep. high commr. for India) (b. 4th Oct., 1894).—Educ. at Calcutta Univ., and Exeter Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1919; arrived, 13th Jan., 1920, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt. fin. dept., June, 1924; under-sec. to govt. of India dept. of industries and labour, Aug., 1925; offg. dep. sec., ditto, Nov., 1927; confd., April, 1928; jt. secy., comm. on labour, June, 1929; offg. magte. and collr., Mar., 1931; ditto (provl. subs.), Oct., 1933; dir. of industries and labour, Apr., 1933; secty. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, educn. and dev. dept., Apr., 1935; mag. and collr., Oct., 1935; dep. high commr. for India, May, 1938.

SHAMBHU NATH DUBE, DIWAN BAHADUR PANDIT, M.A., LL.B., late Judicial dept., United Provs. (b. Apr., 1876).—Joined the service as offg. munisf., 20th Jan., 1906; confd., May, 1908; sub-judge (s.p.t.), Nov., 1918; confd., June, 1919; temp. addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1927; confd., March, 1930; ret'd., Apr., 1931.

SHAMSHER SINGH, KANWAR, Indian Police (b. 23rd Oct., 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt., Punjab, on probn., 27th Jan., 1936.

SHAMSHER SINGH, KUNWAR, B.A., (Cantab.), Lt.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 21st June, 1879).—First commn., dated 1st Sept., 1906; in milty. employ to 7th Nov., 1909, and again from Aug., 1914, to Sept., 1921; civil surg., Sept., 1921; ret'd., June, 1934.

SHAMSODDOHA, A. H. M. (see Abu Hamid Muhammad Shamsoddoha).

SHAMSI, SYED ZAHIRUDDIN, Indian State Rlys. (divl. transpn. offcr., N.W. Rly.) (b. 16th Sept., 1891).—Asst. traffic supdt., Oct., 1913; divl. transpn. offcr., May, 1935.

SHAMSUDDIN AHMAD, Khan Bahadur, B.L., late Bengal C.S. (b. Apr., 1881).—Joined the service, 3rd Sept., 1906; dep., mag. and dep. collr., Jan., 1908; inspr.-genl. of regn., Bengal, June, 1931.

SHAMS-UL-HASAN, MUNSHI, B.A., LL.B. late United Provs. C.S. —Apptd. dist. and sess. Judge, Dec., 1934; ret'd., Apr., 1937.

SHANBHAG, VISHWANATH BABURAO, Indian Police (b. 8th Oct., 1913).—Apptd. asst. supt. of police, Bombay on probn., 14th Mar., 1938.

SHANKAR, VIDYA, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 27th Feb., 1909).—Educated at Dayanand Anglo-Vedic College, Cawnpore, Allahabad University and St. John's College, Oxford; joined the service, 7th October, 1933; arrived in India, November, 1933, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

SHANKS, GEORGE, M.D., Major, I.M.S. (ret'd.) (b. 14th Sept., 1884).—Joined the service, 22nd Sept., 1914; in mil. employ up to 4th May, 1921; prof. medl. coll., Calcutta (s.p.t.), May, 1921; ret'd., Aug., 1932.

SHANNON, GERALD CAIRNS, B.A., Barr.-at-Law, late Indian C.S. (b. 17th Oct., 1883).—Educ. at Bath Coll. and St. John's Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived, 22nd Nov., 1907, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag., asst. settl. offr. and asst. judge; on mil. duty, 1917-1919; jt. judge and addl. sess. judge, Dec., 1922; judge and sess. judge, March, 1926; ret'd., Feb., 1933.

SHANTI PRASAD, M.Sc., Indian Police (b. 16th July, 1909).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt., United Provs., 16th Jan., 1933; confd., Jan., 1935.

SHAPURJI, NASARVANJI JAMSHEDJI RATNAGAR (see Ratnagar, S. N. J.).

SHARAN, RADHA KANTA, B.A., B.L., Inc. tax Dept. (asst. commr.) (b. 29th June, 1886).—Joined the service 11th Jan., 1909; dep. mag. and dep. coll., Aug., 1918; inc. tax officer, Apr., 1925, asst. commr., Bihar, Aug., 1932.

SHARAN, SINGH LAL RAM, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 20th March, 1906).—Educ. at Allahabad University and Jesus College, Oxford; joined the service, 6th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930, and served in the Central Provs. as asst. commr.; on for. service as settlement officer, Chhattarpur State, Dec., 1937.

SHARANGPANI, PRABHAKAR SHRIDDHAR, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 29th Jan., 1895).—Joined the service, 14th Sept., 1918; asst. engr., Sept., 1919; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1922; offg. exec. engr., May, 1926; confd., Sept., 1928.

SHARBAT KHAN, MIR, Khan Bahadur, C.I.E., late Indian Political Dept. (b. 1880).—Joined the service, 5th May, 1902; apptd. to the pol. dept., 2nd Sept., 1921; pol. agent, Zhub, Dec., 1921, and again, Dec., 1923; C.I.E., Jan., 1922; pol. agent, Chagai, June, 1922; ditto, Loralai, Apl., 1929; on deptn. to Indian military college commee, Simla, May, 1931; pol. agent for Chagai, July, 1931; pol. agent, and dep. commr., Sibi, Mar., 1932; retd., June, 1935.

SHAREEF, AHMED ALI SAHIB, B.A., Madras Civil Service (dep. collr.) (b. 3rd Feb., 1890).—Joined the service, 7th Mar., 1914; dep. collr., May, 1931.

SHARIF MUHAMMAD ALI SAHIB, B.A., Khan Bahadur, Indian Police (dist. supt., Madras) (b. 28th June, 1887).—Joined the provl. service as proby. dep. supt., 23rd Feb., 1912; confd., Mar., 1915; apptd. to I.P. as supt., 26th Mar., 1931; dep. commr., Feb., 1932.

SHARIFF, MUHAMMAD (see Muhammad Shariff).

SHARLING, ALFRED FRANCIS LESLIE, late Bihar C.S. (b. 1st Nov., 1886).—Joined the service, 4th Jan., 1906; dep. mag. and dep. collr., Apl., 1907; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1932; offg. dep. commr., Feb., 1932; retd., Sept., 1938.

SHARMA, ASHA RAM, B.Sc., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr., Orissa) (b. 3rd Nov., 1901).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 29th June, 1925; dep. consvr., Jan., 1931; transf. to Orissa, Mar., 1939.

SHARMA, DVARIKA PRASHAD SINHA, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 26th Nov., 1896).—Educ. at Bihar National Coll., and London Univ.; joined the service, 13th Mar., 1922; arrived, 5th Apl., 1922, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. jt. magte. and dep. collr., Mar., 1929, and again, Apl., 1932; confd., Oct., 1929; magte. and collr. (confd.), 1938.

SHARMA, LAKSHMI CHAND, Rai Bahadur, M.R.A.C., Barr., late Indian Agric. Service (b. 10th Dec., 1878).—Joined the service as asst. dir. of agric., 15th Aug., 1911; dept. dir. of agric., May., 1921; retd., Dec., 1933.

SHARMA, SALIG RAM, B.A., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 18th Sept., 1887).—Joined the service, 29th Sept., 1910; asst. engr., Sept., 1911; asst. exec. engr., April, 1921; retd., Sept., 1932.

SHARP, ALEXANDER EASSON, B.Sc., M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th July, 1892).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1919;

asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1924; dep. secty., govt. of Sind p.w.d., April, 1936; retd., April, 1938.

SHARP, CHARLES ANDREW, M.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 10th Nov., 1906).—Educ. at Auckland Grammar School, New Zealand, Otago Univ., New Zealand, and St. John's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Dec., 1931, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; retd., Oct., 1934.

SHARP, FRANCIS EVERARD, Indian Police (supt., Bombay) (b. 5th Apl., 1890).—Joined the service, 22nd Nov., 1909, as asst. supt.; awarded King's police medal, Jan., 1921; supt. and dep. commr. of police, Nov., 1922; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., Nov., 1935; supt. of police, G.I.P. and M. and S.M. Rlys., Nov., 1938.

SHARP, SIR HENRY, Kt., C.S.I., C.I.E., M.A. (Oxon), late Indian Educ. Service.—Apptd. princpl., Govt. Coll., Jubbulpure, Central Provs., 15th Oct., 1894; inspr. of sch., Dec., 1898; K.-i-H. medal, May, 1900; dir. of public instrn., E. Bengal and Assam, Feb., 1906; joint sec. to govt. of India, dept. of educn., Dec., 1910; addl. member of govr.-genl.'s council, March, 1911; C.I.E., Dec., 1911; addl. member, govr.-gen.'s legisl. council, Jan., 1913; educ. commr. with the govt. of India, April, 1915, to April, 1920; C.S.I., Jan., 1916; offg. variously as sec. to govt. of India, dept. of educn. (in addn.), July, 1915, to Nov., 1919; confd. as sec., Nov., 1919; knighted, June, 1922; educ. commr. with govt. of India, July, 1922; retd.; sec. to the Statutory Commissions on Oxford and London; member of R.C. on Home Civil Service (1929); author of 'Rural Schools in the Central Provinces' and 'Progress of Education in India, 1907-12 and 1912-17,' 'Sixth and Seventh Quinquennial Reviews.'

SHARP, SAMUEL HENRY, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 7th May, 1882).—Joined the service, 1st June, 1899; asst. carr. and wagon supt., Jan., 1919; works manager, May, 1925; offg. dep. transportation supt., March, 1928; offg. dep. ch. mechl. engr., May, 1930; confd., Apl., 1935; retd., May, 1939.

SHARPE, REGINALD TAAFFE, retd., May, 1939 (judge, high ct., Rangoon).—Apptd., July, 1937.

SHARPE, THOMAS ARTHUR, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Assam) (b. 14th Nov., 1913).—Educ. at Chesterfield Grammar Sch. and Emmanuel Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 15th Sept., 1937; arrived in India, Nov., 1937, and served in Assam as asst. commr. asst. pol. officer, Sadiya fron. tract., June, 1938; presdt., Manipur State Darbar, Aug., 1939.

SHARPE, WILLIAM MCCORMICK, B.A., D.S.O., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 11th June, 1893).—Educ. at Cookstown Academy, Coleraine Academical Inst., and Trinity Coll., Dublin; on mil. service from Oct., 1914; joined the service, 17th Feb., 1920; arrived, 11th May, 1920, and posted to Bengal; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Oct., 1924 and again, Sept., 1926; offg. registrar, high ct. appellate side, April, 1926; confd., Nov., 1928; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1927; confd. Sept., 1929.

SHARPLES, CHARLES NORMAN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr. of customs, Karachi) (b. 29th Aug., 1906).—Educ. at Blackpool Secondary Sch. and Selwyn Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 9th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.; offg. asst. rev. offcr., L.B. and C. constrn., Jan., 1934; offg. dep. commr., Mar., 1936; asst. collr. (Impl. Customs Service), Bombay, Dec., 1936; ditto, Karachi, Nov., 1937; temp. under secty. to govt. of India, commerce dept., Nov., 1938.

SHARPLEY, FORBES WILMOT, B.Sc., Ph.D., F.R.S.E., M.I.E.E., Indian School of Mines (b. 7th Jan., 1897).—Apptd. prof. of mechl. and electrical engrg. on probn., 28th Dec., 1926; confd., June, 1929.

SHASTRI, PRABHU DATTA (see Prabhu Datta, S.).

SHASTRY, TADEPALLY SHANKARA, Major, I.M.S. (D.M.O., Madras) (b. 1st Sept., 1889).—First commn., dated 1st Aug., 1914; in milty. employ till 29th Nov., 1923; offg. variously in civil appts. from Dec., 1923, to May, 1929; D.M.O., June, 1929.

SHATTOCK, JOHN SWITHUN HARVEY, B.A., Indian C.S. (under secty. to the Govt. of India defence dept.) (b. 21st Nov., 1907).—Educ. at Westminster and Christ Church, Oxford, and School of Oriental Studies, London; apptd. after exam. of 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bengal as asst. magte. and collr.; jt. mag. and dep. coll., Apl., 1933; offg. under secty. to govt., Bengal, pol. and appts. dept., Apl., 1934; asst. pte. secty. to govr. of Bengal, Nov., 1934; under secty. to the Govt. of India, defence dept. and secty., Indian Soldiers' Bd., Nov., 1936.

SHAW, EDWARD BRIAN, B.A., late Indian C.S. (Assam) (b. 18th Nov., 1891).—Educ. at Westminster Sch. and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1914, arrived, 4th Dec., 1915, and served in Assam as asst. commr.; on mil. duty (I.A.R.O.), Aug., 1916, to Dec., 1918; offg. depy. commr., July, 1923; ret'd., Feb., 1931.

SHAW, GEORGE ELLIOTT, B.Sc., F.I.C., F.C.S. (b. 4th Mar., 1872).—Joined the service as asst. quiniologist, 16th Dec., 1905; govt. quiniologist, Oct., 1917.

SHAW, JAMES, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Orissa) (b. 13th Sept., 1902).—Joined the service as asst. exec. engr., Bihar and Orissa, 1st Oct., 1926; offg. exec. engr., Jan., 1933; confd., Aug., 1936.

SHAW, JOHN, Burma Frontier Service (supt.) (b. 4th Sep., 1890).—Apptd. extra asst. commr. May, 1913, asst. supt. (B.F.S.) Nov., 1922; supt. Oct. 1935.

SHAW, JOSEPH, M.A., Judicial Dept., Burma (judge, high court, Rangoon) (b. 4th Nov., 1886).—Apptd. asst. govt. advocate, Aug., 1918; addl. asst. sec., legisl. council, Feb., 1920; offg. judge, small cause courts, July, 1920; asst. govt. advocate, Dec., 1922; judge, small cause cts., March, 1924; chief judge, ditto, May, 1926; acting judge, high ct., Rangoon, variously from Nov., 1932; puisne judge, Jan., 1938.

SHAW, WILLIAM, Assam C.S. (dep. commr.) (b. 5th Apl., 1889).—Joined the service, 4th Mar., 1909; dep. mag. and dep. collr., May, 1911; extra asst. commr., Dec., 1919; dep. commr., July, 1933.

SHEARCROFT, REGINALD JAMES, M.B.E. (Commissary), Major, I.M.L. (estabt. officer, Govt. of India, def. dept.) (b. 14th Jan., 1893).—First commn., 15th Nov., 1935; offcr. supvr., Adjt.-Genl.'s Bch, A.H.Q., India, 15th Nov., 1935; apptd. estabt. officer to govt. of India, def. dept., Aug., 1937; M.B.E., June, 1938.

SHEARER, JAMES GREIG, M.A., Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bihar) (b. 9th Jan., 1893).—Educ. at Dundee High Sch., Edinburgh Univ., and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1916; arrived, 20th Dec., 1917, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.; under-sec. to govt., pol., &c., dept., Aug., 1920; offg. mag. and collr., April, 1924, and Feb., 1925; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1925, and again, May, 1927; offg. mag. and collr., Feb., 1926; addl. dist. and sess. judge, Jan., 1927; offg. dist. and sess. judge, June, 1929; confd., Apl., 1932; offg. regr., Patna high ct., Apl., 1934.

SHEARER, JOHN BURT, B.A. (Oxon.), M.A. (Glas.), Indian C.S. (dep. secty., fin. dept., Govt. of India) (b. 28th Dec., 1904).—Educ. at The Acad., Greenock, University of Glasgow and Trinity Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 21st Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt., Punjab, home and pol. depts., Jan., 1931; under-secty. to govt. of India, finance dept., Apl., 1933; first secty., central bd. of rev., May, 1935; dep. secty., finance dept., Govt. of India, Apl., 1937; on spec. duty, fin. dept., Apl., 1938.

SHEBBEARE, EDWARD OSWALD, late Indian Forest Service (b. 8th Mar., 1884).—Arrived, 5th Nov., 1906, and served as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Nov., 1919; offg. consvr., Oct., 1924; confd., Jan., 1929; ch. consvr., United Provs., Nov., 1935; ditto, Central Provs., Jan., 1937; ditto, Bengal, Mar., 1938; ret'd., Sept., 1938.

SHEEHY, JOHN FRANCIS, C.S.I., B.A., Indian C.S. (member central bd. of revenue) (b. 12th Oct., 1889).—Educ. at St. Tarlath's Coll., Tuam; Natl. Univ. of Ireland (St. Patrick's Coll., Maynooth, and Univ. Coll., Galway); apptd. after exam. of 1913; arrived, 20th Oct., 1914, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; on mil. duty from Oct., 1917, to Jan., 1920; sec., dev. commn., Rangoon, March, 1922; dep. sec. to govt. (in addn.), April, 1924; asst. commr., inc. tax, Dec., 1926; offg. commr., Oct., 1928; confd., June, 1930; member central bd. of rev., and ex-officio jt. secty. govt. of India, fin. dept. (cent. revs.), April, 1937; C.S.I., June, 1939.

SHEEHY MICHAEL JOSEPH, B.E., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Burma) (b. 20th Sept., 1893).—Joined the service, 1st Oct., 1920; asst. exec. engr., Feb., 1921; exec. engr., Nov., 1926.

SHEEPSHANKS, EDWARD, B.A., Indian C.S. (commr., Punjab) (b. 23rd Oct., 1884).—Educ. at Winchester, and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. after exam. of 1908; arrived, 3rd Dec., 1909, and served in the

Punjab as asst. commr.; offg. asst. collr. of customs, Calcutta, March, 1914; sec., municipal cttee., Amritsar, Oct., 1914; attached to dept. of commerce and industry, govt. of India, Feb., 1915; asst. wheat commr., Bombay, May to Sept., 1915; on mil. duty from Oct., 1917, to Dec., 1918; dep. commr. (provl.), May, 1924; ditto (perm.), April, 1926; offg. commr., Apl., 1932, and again, Mar., 1933; confd. Dec., 1936.

SHEIKH, ABDUL LATIF, B.A., B.Sc. (Edin.), A.M.I.C.E., Indian State Ry. (exec. engr. N.W. rly.) (b. 1st Oct., 1888).—Joined the service, 3rd July, 1916; asst. engr., Jan., 1921; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1926; exec. engr. (provl.), Mar., 1938.

SHEIKH, MOIZZUDDIN, B.A., Indian State Ry. (divl. comml. officer) (b. 25th Aug., 1890).—Joined the service, 15th June, 1912; asst. dist. traffic supt., May, 1922; divl. transpn. (traffic comml.) officer, Mar., 1931.

SHELDON, FELIX LUCIEN, M.A., LL.B., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., Bihar) (b. 27th Jan., 1915).—Educ. at St. Peter's Coll., Agra, Allahabad Univ., and St. Catherine's Society Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 8th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.

SHELDON, NORMAN LINDSAY, C.I.E., Ph.D., F.I.C., late Dept. of Explosives (b. 4th Nov., 1876).—Joined the service, 16th Aug., 1903, as chemist, cordite factory; mangr., govt. cordite factory, Dec., 1915; supt., govt. acetone factory, Jan., 1929; chief inspr. of explosives, March, 1920; C.I.E., Jan., 1932; ret'd., Sept., 1932.

SHELLY, JAMES, M.C., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., United Provs.) (b. 17th Nov., 1894).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 27th Nov., 1919; asst. exec. engr., April, 1922; offg. exec. engr., Oct., 1926; confd., Oct., 1927; pers. asst. to ch. engr., Nov., 1936.

SHELSWELL, OSCAR HENRY CLIVE, M.B.E., Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr.) (b. 22nd May, 1894).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 15th March, 1921; dep. consvr., March, 1922; persl. asst. to ch. consvr., Madras, May, 1926; Apl., 1929 and Apl., 1933; M.B.E., Jan., 1939.

SHENOY, JOSEPH PATRICK LASRADO, Indian C.S. (sub. collr. and jt. mag.) (b. 29th Oct., 1907).—Educ. at Madras Univ. and London Sch. of Oriental Studies; joined the service, 13th Oct., 1930; arrived in India, Nov., 1930; and served in Madras as asst. mag. and collr.; sub.-collr., Mar., 1933; commr., Madura Municipality, Nov., 1934.

SHEO ADHAR SINGH, P.M.S. Civil Surgeon, United Provs. (b. 12th Oct., 1884), Civil Surg., May, 1927

SHEO SINGH BEDI, SARDAR BAHADUR, BAWA, Indian Service of Engineers (exec. engr.) (b. June, 1886).—Joined the service as temp. engr. 21st Dec., 1908; asst. engr., Jan., 1923; asst. exec. engr., Jan., 1931; exec. engr., Sep., 1936.

SHEPHERD, GEORGE EDWARD, O.B.E., late India Office (b. 2nd May, 1875).—Clerk, 2nd class, registry and record dept., 4th Sept. 1893; transf. to judl. and public dept., Nov., 1905; junr. clerk, Apl., 1914; principal, Apl., 1921; O.B.E., June, 1934; ret'd., Oct., 1936.

SHEPHERD, JAMES FORREST, M.B., Ch.B. (Aberd.), M.Ch. (Liv.), Major, I.M.S. (D.M.O., Madras) (b. 3rd Dec., 1899).—First commn., 29th Feb., 1924; in milty. employ until 3rd Feb., 1934; dist. medl. offcr., Mar., 1934; confd. in civil dept. with effect from June, 1936; principal, medical college, etc., Vizagapatam, May, 1939.

SHEPHERD, W. I., O.B.E., late Income Tax Dept., Bihar and Orissa (b. 11th Aug., 1877).—Joined the service, 20th April, 1897; O.B.E., June, 1919; supt. of income tax, Jan., 1922; offg. asst. commr., ditto, June, 1925; confd., Oct., 1925; ret'd., Aug., 1932.

SHEPHERD, WILLIAM SKINNER, M.A., late Indian Forest Service (b. 11th Nov., 1890).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 15th Dec., 1913; on milty. service from 1st June, 1915, to 4th June, 1920; dep. consvr., Dec., 1918; ret'd., Oct., 1936.

SHEPPARD, ARTHUR LEWIN, M.B., F.R.C.S., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd., late Burma Medl. Dept. (b. 30th Apl., 1882).—First commn. dated 29th Jan., 1910; civil surg., Jan., 1923; surg., genl. hosp., Rangoon, Mar., 1932; medl. supt., ditto, Mar., 1934; ret'd., Apl., 1937.

SHEPPARD, FREDERICK AUGUSTUS BERRILL, M.B.B.S. (U. Melb.), F.R.C.S. (Edin.), Captain, I.M.S., Madras Medical Dept. (b. 21st April, 1904).—First commn. dated 2nd Feb., 1932; in milty. employ until Aug., 1936; dist. medl. offr., Sept., 1936.

SHERIDAN, A. M., Captain, I.M.S. (civil surg., U.P.).—Date of first commn., April 29th, 1929; civil surg., Sept., 1936.

SHERIDAN, SIR PHILIP CAHILL, Kt., C.M.G., late Indian State Railways—Held appt. of general traffic manager, East Indian rly.; apptd. member of the railway board, 31st Dec., 1923; ret'd., Kt., June, 1929.

SHERRY, WALTER CAMPBELL, Office of High Commr. for India (executive officer, store dept.) (b. 12th July, 1885).—Educ. at Dorchester Gr. Sch.; apptd. 2nd class clerk, 31st Aug., 1904; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; exec. officer, April, 1922.

S H E T E V, VENKATESH GOPAL, L.C.B., M.I.E. (Ind.), M.R.San.I., A.M.San.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 26th July, 1882).—Joined the provl. service as asst. engr., June, 1913; asst. exec. engr., Aug., 1919; exec. engr., June, 1922; offg. suptg. engr., Apl., 1931; ret'd., July, 1937.

SHIELD, HENRY SOPWITH, late Indian C.S. (b. 2nd Nov., 1884).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Christ Church, Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1907; arrived, 24th Nov. 1908, and served in Madras as asst. collr. and mag.; estate collr., Sivaganga estate, Oct., 1914; sub.-collr., and jt. mag., and ditto, July, 1915; commr. for income tax for Madras, June, 1922; offg. collr. and dist. mag., Nov., 1922; ditto, Feb., 1923; ditto, Nov., 1924; ditto, Feb., 1925; ditto, Dec., 1925; collr. and dist. magte. (provl. sub.), Oct., 1927; confd., May, 1928; ret'd., Dec., 1933.

SHIELDS, ALFRED EDWIN, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 7th May, 1916).—Educ. at Stockton Sec. Sch., and Pembroke Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 13th Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Dec., 1938, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

SHIELS, DR. T. DRUMMOND, M.C., M.P., Parly. Under-Secty. of State, June-Dec., 1929.

SHILLIDY, GEORGE ALEXANDER, C.I.E., Indian Police (inspr.-genl., Bombay) (b. 7th Mar., 1886).—Joined the service as asst. supt., 22nd Nov., 1906; supt. of police, Dec., 1916; recd. King's police medal, Jan., 1922; offg. dep. inspr.-genl., April, 1927; ditto, Mar., 1929; confd., Apl., 1932; C.I.E., Jan., 1931; offg. inspr.-genl., Oct., 1935; confd., May 1936.

SHILLIDY, JOHN ARMSTRONG, C.S.I., B.A., late Indian C.S. (b. 6th June, 1882).—Educ. at Campbell Coll., Belfast, and Trinity Coll., Dublin; apptd. after exam. of 1905; arrived 23rd Nov., 1906, and served in Bombay as asst. collr. and mag.; acting asst. commr. in Sind, March to Aug., 1914; municipal commr., Ahmedabad, Nov., 1915, to Sept., 1917; asst. commr. Sind, and Sindhi translator to govt., Sept., 1917; dep. sec. to govt., home dept., Nov., 1922; offg. collr. and pol agent, Dec., 1925; retrenchment offr., Poona, May, 1926; on special duty for framing rules under the C.S. Delegation Rules, 1926, April, 1927; offg. jt. sec. to govt. of India, home dept., July, 1927; secty. to govt. of India, dept. of indus. and labour, Oct., 1929; C.S.I., Jan., 1932; ret'd., Mar., 1936.

SHINDE, PANDURANO KRISHNARAO, B.A., A.M.I.C.E., late Indian Service of Engrs. (b. 2nd Dec., 1883).—Joined the service, 1st Feb., 1921, as asst. engr.; asst. exec. engr., Oct., 1921; exec. engr., June, 1924; ret'd., Dec., 1938.

SHIRLEY, GEOFFREY STANHOPE, Indian Forest Service (consvr., Burma) (b. 19th July, 1888).—Arrived, 28th Dec., 1910, and served as asst. consvr.; dep. consvr., Dec., 1915; on mil. service, Aug., 1918, to Feb., 1919; offg. consvr., Nov., 1929; confd., June, 1935.

SHIRRAS, GEORGE FINDLAY, M.A., F.S.S., Indian Educl. Service (principal, Gujarat Coll., Ahmedabad) (b. 16th July, 1885).—Educ. at Robert Gordon's Coll., Aberdeen, and Univ. of Aberdeen; apptd. to Indian educl. service as prof'r. of economics, Dacca Coll., 10th April, 1909; on special duty under govt. of India, finl. dep., May, 1910, to April, 1913; on special duty in office of dir. of public instrn., Bengal, Oct., 1913; ditto, March, 1914; dir. of statistics, govt. of India, from April, 1914; member of Bengal statistical commee., Feb., 1918; member of Board of Agriculture in India, 1918; dir., Bombay Labour Office, April, 1921; member, legisl. council, 1921, and again in 1924; supy. prof'r. of economics, Gujarat Coll., Ahmedabad, March, 1926; offg. prinpl., Gujarat Coll., June, 1926; confd., Feb., 1930; author of 'Some Aspects of Indian Commerce and Industry,' 'Indian Finance and Banking,' and articles on finance.

SHIRREFF, ALEXANDER GRIERSON, B.A., Indian C.S. (commr., United Provs.) (b. 29th April, 1883).—Educ. at Merchant Taylors' Sch., and St. John's Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1906; arrived, 9th Dec., 1907, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; regr., ct. of judl. commr., Oudh, Feb., 1913, to July, 1915; jt. mag., Jan., 1916; under-sec. to govt., United Provs., April, 1916;

on mil. duty (I.A.R.O.), July, 1918, to April, 1919; offg. dep. commr., April, 1919, to Nov., 1921; offg. mag. and collr., Nov., 1921; confd., Dec., 1923; offg. commr., Mar., 1935; provl. subst., Feb., 1938.

SHIVDASANI, HIRANAND RUPCHAND, B.A., Barr., Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 9th Aug., 1904).—Educ. at Univ. of Bombay and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 28th Sept., 1928; arrived, Oct., 1928, and served in the United Provs. as asst. collr. and mag.; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1933.

SHIVDASANI, RAMCHAND TEKCHAND, B.A., Indian C.S. (mag. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 14th Nov., 1898).—Educ. at Bombay Univ. and London Univ. (School of Economics); joined the service, 25th Oct., 1923; arrived, 11th Dec., 1923, and served in United Provs. as asst. mag. and collr.; jt. mag., May, 1927; offg. mag. and collr., May, 1932; offg. excise commr., Oct., 1933; offg. inspr.-genl. of regn. (in addn.), 1933; offg. dir. of indus., U.P., Feb., 1935; mag. and collr. (provl. subst.), Feb., 1938.

SHIVESHWARKAR, SADANAND WAMAM, Indian C.S. (asst. magte. and collr., United Provs.) (b. 1st Mar., 1912).—Educ. at Savantvadi High Sch., Bombay Univ. and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 14th Jan., 1937; arrived in India, Feb., 1937, and served in U.P. as asst. magte. and collr.

SHONE, SAMUEL, M.D.B.S. (Lond.), M.R.C.P. (Lond.), M.R.C.S. (Eng.), Captain, I.M.S., Madras Medical Department (b. 22nd Feb., 1906).—First commn. dated 1st May, 1937; in milty. employ until Jan., 1939; specialist in medicine, Jan., 1939.

SHOOBERT, WILFRED HAROLD, Indian C.S., (p.m.g., United Provs. circle) (b. 7th June, 1896).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Christ Church, Oxford; joined the service, 25th Oct., 1920; arrived, 4th Dec., 1920, and served in Central Provs. as asst. commr.; services placed at disposal of Assam Labour Board from April, 1923, to March, 1924; offg. dep. commr., Nov., 1925; confd., Nov., 1933; provl. supt., census operations, Apl., 1930; offg. commr. of settlements, etc., C.P., Mar., 1934; and again, Apr., 1936; services placed at disp. of govt. of India, indus. and lab., Mar., 1937; p.m.g., U.P. circle, May, 1938.

SHORT, Rev. GEORGE MURRAY DAVIDSON, M.A., Indian Eccl. Estabt. (senr. chaplain, ch. of Scotland, Madras) (b. 21st Dec., 1890).—Joined the service as junr. chaplain, 19th Dec., 1924; in milty. employ from Feb., 1925, to Mar., 1926; senr. chaplain, Dec., 1935.

SHORT, VIVIAN AUGUSTUS, C.I.E., late Indian Police (b. 30th Sept., 1883).—Joined the service, 19th Nov., 1904; supt. of police, Feb., 1913; dist. offr., frontier constabulary, Peshawar, April, 1919; personal asst. to inspr.-gen., N.W.F. Prov., April, 1920; comdt., frontier constabulary, Nov., 1926; C.I.E., Jan., 1933; ret'd., Jan., 1936.

SHORTT, NORMAN ROBERT, late Indian State Rlys. (b. 14th July, 1883).—Asst. loco. supt., junr. scale, 16th Oct., 1928; dist. loco. supt., senr. scale, E.B. rly., Feb., 1937; ret'd., July, 1938.

SHOVELLER, HAROLD LANGLEY, A.C.A., late income tax dept., Bombay (b. 16th Jan., 1884).—Apptd. to income tax dept. of the central board of revenue, 29th Oct., 1919; senior income tax officer, Bombay, 1st April, 1922; offg. asst. commr. of inc. tax, Bombay city, April, 1927; ret'd., Jan., 1939.

SHRI SHRIDHAR NEHRU (see Nehru, S. S.).

SHRINAGESH, JAYAVANT MALLANNAH, Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 1st Jan., 1905).—Educ. at West Buckland School, Barnstaple, and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; joined the service, 2nd Oct., 1928; arrived, Oct., 1928, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr., offg. dep. commr., Oct., 1932, and again, Mar. 1933; addl. ditto, July, 1933.

SHRIVASTAVA, NIRMAL CHANDRA, B.Sc., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Central Provs.) (b. 1st Sept., 1913).—Educ. at Patwardhan High School, Nagpur, Nagpur University and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Oct., 1936, and served in the Central Provinces as asst. commr.; under secty. to govt. of Cent. Provs., April, 1939.

SHROFF, SARVA DAMAN, B.Sc., Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr., Madras) (b. 6th Nov., 1887).—Joined the service, 21st May, 1913; asst. engr., Oct., 1916; asst. sany. engr., March, 1917; asst. exec. engr., May, 1922; exec. engr., Oct., 1925.

SHUJA-UD-DIN KHAN, B.A., late Indian Posts and Tels. (b. 20th May, 1879).—Held non-gazetted appts. from 24th Feb., 1900; supy. inspr., Oct., 1904; dep. inspr., Oct., 1906; supt., June, 1907; dep. P.M.G., United Prov., July, 1930; ditto, Bombay, May, 1932; ret'd., May, 1934.

SHUKLA, JANARDAN DATT, B.A., Indian C.S. (asst. mag. and collr., U.P.) (b. 1st July, 1915).—Educ. at Govt. High Sch., Lalitpur, Allahabad Univ., Queen Mary Coll., London, and Corpus Christi Coll., Oxford; apptd. on probn., 24th Sept., 1938; confd., 11th Sept., 1939; arrived in India, Oct., 1939, and served in U.P. as asst. mag. and collr.

SHUKUL, BADRI PRASAD, B.A., late Indian Police (b. 2nd May, 1885).—Joined the service as dep. supt., Central Provs., Feb., 1908; dist. supt., Oct., 1925; ret'd., May, 1938.

SHUKUL, PANDIT RAGHUBAR DAYAL (see Raghubar, D. S. P.).

SHULDHAM, WALTER FRANK QUANTOCK, Major, I.A., ret'd., late Indian Political Dept. (b. 17th June, 1892).—First commn. dated 29th Aug., 1914; in milty. employ. to 24th May, 1920; 2nd asst. to pol. resident in Persian Gulf, Jan., 1921; under-sect. to agent to govr.-genl. in C.I., June, 1923; asst. commr., Ajmer-Merwara, May, 1925; under-secty. to Resident, Hyderabad, Nov., 1927; secty. to agent to govr.-genl., C.I., May, 1928; on foreign service in Jaipur State, Feb., 1931; ret'd., Mar., 1935.

SHYAM SUNDER PRASAD, Indian Forest Service (asst. commr., Bihar) (b. 1st Mar., 1903).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Bihar and Orissa, 3rd Dec., 1926.

SI, U KA, B.A., Indian Civil Service (dep. commr., Burma) (b. 4th April, 1902).—Educ. at Calcutta and Rangoon Univs., and Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge; joined the service,

29th Oct., 1925; arrived, 7th Dec., 1925, and served in Burma as asst. commr.; under-secty. to govt., local govt. dept., Nov., 1929; offg. dep. commr., July, 1932; confd., Feb., 1937.

SIDESHWARI PRASAD VARMA, C.I.E., M.Sc., Indian Finance Dept. (b. 28th Mar., 1890).—Joined the service, 18th Mar., 1914; asst. acctnt.-genl., United Provs., Nov., 1916; asst. auditor, N.W. Rly., Sept., 1918; ditto, O. & R. Rly., Nov., 1921; dep. acctnt.-gen., rlys., Oct., 1922; asst. auditor-genl., Jan., 1923; dep. acctnt.-gen., Central Revenues, Oct., 1923; on spl. duty for revision of postal and tel. codes, May, 1924; offg. finl. advsr., posts and tel., May, 1928; services placed at disposal of Baroda durbar, Nov., 1929-May, 1930; ditto, rly. bd., May, 1930; dep. finl. adviser, posts and tels., Nov., 1930; offg. finl. adviser, posts and tels., Mar., 1931; member, standing finance ctee., Benares Hindu univ., Mar., 1933; finl. adviser, posts and tels., Apl., 1933; C.I.E., Jan., 1936; finance officer, posts and tels., July, 1936; attd. offer. in A.G.'s dept., U.P., Apl., 1937; acct.-genl., U.P., Apl., 1938.

SIEVWRIGHT, ANDREW GEORGE HUME, M.B.E., late Salt Dept., Bombay (b. 19th Feb., 1885).—Held non-gazetted appts., acting and perm., from 1st Jan., 1905, to 31st Oct., 1911; asst. collr., Nov., 1911; M.B.E., June, 1919; on milty. duty from 23rd Jan., 1918; ret'd., Apl., 1930.

SIFTON, Sir JAMES DAVID, K.C.S.I., K.C.I.E., B.A. (Oxon.), late Indian C.S. (b. 17th Apl., 1878).—Educ. at St. Paul's Sch., and Magdalen Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1901; arrived, 27th Nov., 1902, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr. and asst. settlmt. officr.; jt. mag. and dep. collr., Mar., 1911; transfdr. to Bihar and Orissa, Apl., 1912; mag. and collr., Nov., 1915; sec. to govt., finl. and munpl. depts., Aug., 1917; C.S.I., Mar., 1919; C.I.E., Jan., 1921; dep. commr., Dec., 1923; offg. chief sec. to govt., Bihar and Orissa, June, 1923, and from March, 1925; confd. as chief sec., Dec., 1925; member, exec. council, Bihar and Orissa, May, 1927; offg. govr., ditto, Jan., 1929; and again, June, 1930; K.C.I.E., June, 1931; K.C.S.I., March, 1932; govr., Bihar and Orissa, April, 1932; govr., Bihar, Apl., 1936, to Mar., 1937; ret'd., Nov., 1937.

SIKANDER HYAT KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR, Major, Sardar, Sir, K.B.E..—Apptd. temp. member of govr.'s exec. council, Punjab, 3rd Aug., 1929; confd., Apl., 1930; vice-presdt, ditto, Oct., 1932; actg. govr. of the Punjab, July-Oct., 1932; and again Feb., 1934; K.B.E., Jan., 1933; dep. govr., res. bank of India, Feb., 1935; temp. member, govr.'s exec. council, Punjab, Oct., 1936; Premier, legis. cl., Punjab, Apl., 1937.

SIL, JANINDRA MOHAN, B.A., B.Sc., Meteorological Dept. (meteorologist) (b. 1st Oct., 1897).—Joined the service as meteorologist on probn., 17th Oct., 1927; confd., Oct., 1929.

SILVER, Cecil Herbert, India Office (administrative officer, for political intelligence) (b. 28th Jan., 1886).—Educ. at Whitgift Sch.; apptd. clerk, 2nd class, 15th March, 1907, and employed in the registry and record dept.; transfdr. to judl. and public dept., May, 1914; resdt. clerk, Dec., 1916, to Aug., 1920; minor

staff clerk, Jan., 1919; joint editor, India Office List, Nov., 1920, to May, 1926; acting staff clerk, April, 1921; administrative officer, April, 1922; sec. to Indian delegation to 4th Interntl. Labour Conference, Geneva, Oct., 1922; sec. to Indian delegation to International Passport Conference, Geneva, May, 1926; admin. officer for pol. intell., June, 1937.

SILVESTER, COLIN NORMAN, Indian State Ry's. (works manager, E.B. rly.) (b. 25th Sept., 1895).—Joined the service, 10th Apl., 1920; asst. rolling stock officer, Dec., 1925; works manager, E.B. rly. (prov.), Aug., 1934.

SIMCOCK, ERIC, Office of High Commr. for India (higher exec. officer, general dept.) (b. 15th July, 1895).—Apptd. 2nd class clerk, 5th Aug., 1914; on mil. service from Oct., 1915; transf. to office of high commr. for India, Oct., 1920; higher exec. officer, June, 1927.

SIMMONS, CHARLES EDWARDS, Indian Forest Service (consvr., Bengal) (b. 29th Jan., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., Assam, 20th Dec., 1913; in mil. employ from 20th Oct., 1915, to 11th Jan., 1921; dep. consvr., Assam, Jan., 1921; on deputation to the forest college, Dehra Dun, as instructor from Dec., 1921; offg. consvr., Assam, Sept., 1936; consvr., Bengal, Jan., 1938.

SIMMONS, EDWARD CLARE, Indian Forest Service (b. 26th Jan., 1899) (dep. consvr., Burma). Joined the service as asst. consvr., 24th Dec., 1923; dep. consvr., May, 1928.

SIMMONS, JESSE JOHN (b. 12th Apl., 1886).—Joined the service, 17th July, 1912; supt., Bombay city police, 28th Oct., 1930; prom. to Indian police, 11th Apl., 1937; dep. commr. of police, Bombay, Apl., 1937.

SIMMS, JOHN GERALD, B.A., Indian C.S. (under secty., govt. of India, home dept.) (b. 6th Sept., 1904).—Educ. at Winchester and New Coll., Oxford; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1929; arrived, Nov., 1929, and served in Bombay as asst. coll.; under secty., Govt. of India, home dept., Nov., 1938.

SIMPSON, ALEXANDER ALLEN, M.A., late Indian Educl. Service (United Provs.) (b. 2nd Feb., 1881).—Joined the service, 10th March, 1915; head master, govt. high school, Cawnpore, Jan., 1916; prinpl., training coll., Allahabad, Oct., 1925; ret'd., Dec., 1932.

SIMPSON, EDWARD SKINNER, Indian C.S. (dist. and sess. judge, Bengal) (b. 31st Oct., 1897).—Joined the service, 3rd Sept., 1923; arrived in India, 2nd Nov., 1923, and served in Bengal as asst. mag. and collr.; offg. dist. and sess. judge, Nov., 1928; confd., Nov., 1932; regr., high ct., Calcutta, appellate side, Mar., 1935.

SIMPSON, JOHN ALEXANDER, M.A., India Office (jt. secty., mil. dept.) (b. 25th Nov., 1892).—Educ. at Robert Gordon's Coll., Aberdeen, and Aberdeen University; apptd. junr. clerk, 15th Sept., 1919, and att'd. to pol. dept.; resdt clerk, April, 1920, to March 1921; served with 14th Bn. Co. of London Regt. (London Scottish), Sept., 1915, to Feb., 1917, 4th Bn. Gordon Hlrs., March to Aug., 1917, and 124th Baluchistan Infy., Sept., 1917, to Aug., 1919; principal, April, 1921; dep. clerk of council, June, 1931; actg. joint sec., mil. dept., Jan.-July, 1932; and again, Sept., 1934; confd., Apl., 1937.

SIMPSON, SIR JOHN HOPE, K.B.E., C.I.E., B.A., late Indian C.S.—Educ. at foreign schs. and at Balliol Coll., Oxford; apptd. after exam. of 1887; arrived, 30th Oct., 1889; and served in the N.W. Prov. and Oudh as asst. mag. and collr.; joint mag., Nov., 1895; asst. commr., July, 1898; dep. commr., Dec., 1901; joint sec., board of revenue, Jan., 1903; regr., co-operative credit societies, Nov., 1904, to June, 1907; C.I.E., Jan., 1913; offg. supt., Port Blair, and chief commr. of the Andamans and Nicobar Islands, April to Oct., 1914, and from May, 1916; ret'd., Dec., 1916; M.P. for Taunton Divn., Nov., 1922, to Oct., 1924; chairman, Colonies Cttee., 1924; Kt., June, 1925; K.B.E., Feb., 1937.

SIMPSON, SIR MAURICE GEORGE, Kt., C.S.I., M.I.E.E., late India Office and India Tel. Dept. (b. 3rd Nov., 1866).—Trained at R.I.E. Coll.; apptd. asst. supt., 1st Oct., 1887; supt., Feb., 1901; electrical engr. in-chief, April, 1910; ret'd. from India Tel. Dept., Dec., 1914; apptd. asst. to dir. in-chief, Indo-European telegraphs, Jan., 1915; dir. in-chief, ditto, July, 1923, to Mar., 1931; C.S.I., June, 1928; Kt., Jan., 1931.

SIMPSON, PATRICK, late Survey of India (b. 12th Feb., 1881).—Joined the service, 20th Nov., 1901; extra asst. supt., Oct., 1916; supt., Sept., 1932; ret'd., Feb., 1936.

SIMPSON, REGINALD HUGH, Indian Police (asst. supt., Sind) (b. 14th Aug., 1912).—Joined the service as proby. asst. supt. of police, Bombay, Nov., 1933.

SIMPSON, ROBERT ROWELL, C.I.E., M.Sc. (Durham), late Dept. of Mines in India (b. 27th Aug., 1876).—Joined the service, 13th Nov., 1901; inspr. of mines, May, 1906; offg. chief inspr., May, 1920; confd., Jan., 1921; C.I.E., June, 1930; ret'd., Oct., 1932.

SIMPSON, SYDNEY, Indian State Ry's. (ch. elec. engr., N.W. rly.) (b. 3rd May, 1885).—Joined the service, 24th Mar., 1927; offg. senr. elec. engr., N.W. rly., Mar., 1931; dep. ch. mechl. engr. (elec.), E.B. rly., Nov., 1931; offg. ch. elec. engr., N.W. rly., May, 1935; confd., Nov., 1936.

SIMPSON, WILFRID JAMES, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., ret'd. (b. 4th Feb., 1885).—First commn., dated 1st Feb., 1908; agency surg., Gilgit, Oct., 1919; ditto, Hazara, March, 1923; ditto, Bhopal, March, 1925; again, Sept., 1929; resdy. surg. and C.M.O. in C.I., June, 1929; agency surg., Bhopal, Sept., 1929; resy. surg., Mewar; offg. resdt., Mewar, in addn., Aug., 1934; ret'd., May, 1935.

SIMS, ARTHUR MITFORD, B.Sc., Indian State Ry's. (dep. ch. engr., N.W. rly.) (b. 31st Mar., 1889).—Joined the service as asst. engr., 1st Oct., 1911; on mil. duty from 30th March, 1916, to 8th Nov., 1918; exec. engr., Oct., 1920; offg. dep. ch. engr. (bridges), July, 1934; offg. dep. agent, N.W. rly., Apl., 1936; confd., Nov., 1937; dep. chief engr. (prov.), 1938; Apl., 1938.

SIMS, EDWARD ALFRED, Indian State Ry's. (dist. traffic supt., E.B. rly.) (b. 3rd March, 1892).—Joined the service as asst. traffic supt., 3rd Nov., 1914; dist. traffic supt., Dec., 1922; member and secty., rly. rates advisory cttee., May, 1933; offg. traffic manager, Burma ry's., June, 1937.

SIMS, FREDERICK, Public Works Dept., Bihar (b. 4th Feb., 1894).—Joined the service as electrical engr., 17th Oct., 1927.

SINCLAIR, MALCOLM CECIL, O.B.E., Major, I.A., Indian Political Service (b. 25th Sept., 1899).—First commn., dated 1st Oct., 1918; in milty. employ to 7th Sept., 1920; asst. resident, Aden, Oct., 1924; 2nd asst. to resident in Kashmir, April, 1927; asst. resdt., Kolhapur, Mar., 1930; asst. commr., Manshera, Apr., 1931; dep. commr., Hazara, Apr., 1932; dep. commr., Bannu, Sept., 1932; civil secty. to ch. commr., Aden, Sept., 1935; civ. secty., dist. mag. and p'port. officr., Aden, Apr., 1937, again, Oct., 1937; O.B.E., June, 1938.

SINCLAIR, SAMUEL CHRISTINA, O.B.E., B.A., late India Posts and Tels. (b. 2nd Dec., 1882).—Joined the service as supt., 1st May, 1907; in milty. employ from 20th Oct., 1914, to 13th June, 1922; O.B.E., Jan., 1923; asst. dir. genl., post office, Mar., 1929; dep. P.M.G., Madras, Mar., 1932; ditto, Bengal and Assam, July, 1932; p.m.g., Aug., 1936; ret'd., Dec., 1937.

SINGH, AJIT (see Ajit Singh).

SINGH, BADAN (see Badan S.).

SINGH, BAKSHI (see Bakshi S.).

SINGH, BALWANT SHIHN (see Balwant Singh Shihn).

SINGH, BANAPHAR JANAKIRAM (see Janakiram Singh, B.).

SINGH, BAWA KARTAR (see Bawa Kartar Singh).

SINGH, BAWA RAMNICK (see Bawa Ramnick Singh).

SINGH, BHAI LEHNA (see Lehna Singh Bhai).

SINGH, BRAJ BHUSHAN (see Braj Brushan, S.).

SINGH, BUDH BAWA (see Budh S. B.).

SINGH, BUDHI (see Budhi, S.).

SINGH, DALIP (see Dalip Singh).

SINGH, DALJIT (see Daljit Singh).

SINGH, DARSHAN (see Darshan Singh).

SINGH, DEVI (see Devi Singh).

SINGH, GURBACHAN (see Gurbachan, Singh).

SINGH, GURBAKHSH (see Gurbakhsh, S.).

SINGH, GURDIAL SUNDER (see Gurdial, S. Singh).

SINGH, GURMUKH (see Gurimukh Singh).

SINGH, HARI (see Hari Singh).

SINGH, JAGDEO, GAREWAL S. (see Jagdeo, S. G. S.).

SINGH, JHUNNA (see Jhunna Singh).

SINGH, JIWAN AMRIK (see Jiwan, A. S.).

SINGH, KAPUR (see Kapur, S.).

SINGH, KARAN (see Karan Singh).

SINGH, KARTAR (see Kartar Singh).

SINGH, KHARAK (see Kharak Singh).

SINGH, KUNWAR BALBIR (see Balbir Singh, Kunwar).

SINGH, KUNWAR SHAMSHER (see Shamsher Singh, Kunwar).

SINGH, LAIQ (see Laiq Singh).

SINGH, LAL RAM SHARAN (see Sharan Singh, Lal Ram).

SINGH, LALLAN PRASAD, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 1st July, 1912).—Educ. at Queen's Intermediate Coll., Benares, Allahabad University and School of Oriental Studies, London; joined the service, 21st Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Nov., 1936, and served in Bihar as asst. mag. and collr.

SINGH, MAHARAJ KUNWAR (see Mahara Kunwar Singh).

SINGH, MALIK ANUP, M.B., Lt.-Col., I.M.S., Jail Dept., Bengal (insp. genl.) (b. 22nd Sept., 1891).—First commn., 1st Nov., 1920; supt., central jail, Midnapore, Oct., 1929; ditto, presdy. jail, Jan., 1931; offg. inspr. genl. of prisons, Bengal, Apr., 1934; and again, Nov., 1936; confd., May, 1937.

SINGH, MAN (see Man Singh).

SINGH, MOHAN (see Mohan Singh).

SINGH, NATHA (see Natha Singh).

SINGH, NAWAB (see Nawab Singh).

SINGH, NEHPAL (see Nehpal Singh).

SINGH, PARTAB (see Partab Singh).

SINGH, PRABH (see Prabh Singh).

SINGH, PRITAM, BRAR (see Pritam Singh, B.).

SINGH, RACHPAL (see Rachpal S.).

SINGH, RAGHBIR (see Raghbir Singh).

SINGH, RAJ NARAYAN (see Raj Narayan S.).

SINGH, RAM (see Ram Singh).

SINGH, REGINALD, India Posts and Tels. (presidency postmaster) (b. 5th July, 1889).—Joined the service, May, 1909; gazetted postmaster, Jan., 1924; presdy. postmaster, Madras, Sept., 1936; presdy. postmaster, Bombay, Jan., 1938.

SINGH, RIPDAMAN (see Ripdaman, S.).

SINGH, SANT PRAKASH (see Sant Prakash, S.).

SINGH, SANT (see Sant, Singh).

SINGH, SARDAR (see Sardar Singh).

SINGH, SARUP (see Sarup Singh).

SINGH, SEWA RAM (see Sewa Ram S.).

SINGH, SHAM (see Sham Singh).

SINGH, SHEO ADHAR (see Sheo Adhar Singh).

SINGH SITAL (see Sital Singh).

SINGH, SUCHA, Indian C.S. (jt. mag., United Provs.) (b. 3rd April, 1903).—Educ. at King's Coll., London; joined the service, 18th Oct., 1927; arrived, Nov., 1927, and served in the United Provs. as asst. commr.; jt. mag., Mar., 1930; exec. officer, improvement trust, Cawnpore, May, 1936.

SINGH, SUNDAR (see Sundar Singh).

SINGH, TARA (see Tara Singh).

SINGH, TARLOK (see Tarlok Singh).

SINGH, TEJA (see Teja, Singh).

SINGH, TRIBHUBAN PRASAD (see Tribhuban Prasad Singh).

SINGHA, JAI RAJ (see Jai Raj Singha).

SINGHAM, JOSEPH ROBERT THURAI, A.K.C., Madras P.W. Dept. (b. 5th Mar., 1877).—Joined the service, 13th Aug., 1907; dep. sanitary engr., 5th March, 1922; offg. sany. engr., Mar., 1929.

SINGLE, HERBERT STANLEY, M.A., late Indian Forest Service (b. 6th Mar., 1893).—Joined the service as asst. consvr., 22nd Dec., 1921; lecturer in forestry, Univ. Coll., Rangoon, May, 1924; dep. consvr., Oct., 1925; ret'd., May, 1933.

SINGLETON, PATRICK WILLIAM, Impl. Customs Service (collr.) (b. 1st Feb., 1884).—Joined the service, 5th April, 1905, as asst. opium agent (proby.); asst. opium agent, Nov., 1907; asst. collr. of customs, July, 1912; offg. collr., Rangoon, Jan., 1935; confd., July, 1937.
