ZAFAR, MUHAMMAD ABU, Indian Police.—Apptd. asst. supt., United Provs., on probn. 11th Feb., 1935; confd., Feb., 1937.

ZAFAR ALI, Sir, KHAN BAHADUR, MIRZA, Kt., B.A., late Punjab Judl. Dept. (b. 20th Feb., 1870).—Joined the service, 4th Feb., 1893; extra asst. commr., Nov., 1899; extra judl. asst. commr., Sept., 1907; dist. and sess. judge, March, 1918; offg. addl. judge, Punjab high ct., Oct., 1922, to March, 1923, and from Oct., 1923; judge, ditto, Oct., 1926; retd., 1930; Kt., Jan., 1931.

ZAFAR HASAN, KHAN BAHADUR, MAULVI, B.A., Archaeological Survey Dept. (supt. northern circle) (b. 17th July, 1886).—Joined the service, 17th June, 1913; supt., Feb., 1925; offg. dep. dir.-genl., Feb., 1931; confd., Apl., 1932; supt., northern circle, Oct., 1935.

ZAFAR HUSSAIN KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR, B.A., LL.B., A.M.I.T., Indian State Rlys. (divl. transportation officer, N.W. Rly.) (b. 2nd Jan., 1894).—Joined service Feb., 1917; asst. traffic supt., Feb., 1919; junior scale, Aug., 1919; divl. transportation (traffic-commercial) officer, senior scale, Dec., 1937.

ZAFAR OMAR, B.A., Indian Police (supt., United Provs.) (b. 27th Apl., 1883).—Joined the service as dep. supt., 7th Jan., 1908 supt., Sept., 1924; awarded Indian police medal, Jan., 1938.

ZAFRULLAH KHAN, CHAUDHRI, Sir MUHAMMAD, K.C.S.I. (member govr.-genl.'s exec. council).—Apptd. temp. member, govr.-genl.'s exec. council, Apl., 1935; confd., May, 1935; Knighted, June, 1935; chairman, central advisory council of rlys., July, 1935, to Nov., 1937; K.C.S.I., May, 1937; on spec. duty, Apl., to Aug., 1938; and again Oct. to Dec., 1939.

ZAHEER, SAIYID HASAN (see Hasan Zaheer Saiyid).

ZAHADUR, RAHIM ZAHID SUHRAWARDY (see Suhrawardy, Sir Z. R. Z.).

ZAHID HASAN KHAN, Indian Service of Engrs. (asst. exec. engr., Central Provs.) (b. 9th Dec., 1902).—Joined the service as appr. engr., Nov. 1926; asst. exec. engr., Nov., 1927.

ZAHID HUSAIN, M.A., Indian Audit Dept. (b. 6th Jan., 1895).—Joined the service, 14th Mar., 1918; asst. auditor, N.W. rly., Apl., 1921; ditto, E.B. rly., Nov., 1923, ditto, E.I. rly., Dec., 1925; dir. of army audit, westn. circle, Feb., 1929; dep. contr., N.W.F.P., Nov., 1931; asst. auditor-genl., Apl., 1932; offg. ch. auditor, rly. clearing accts. office, Mar., 1933; dep. dir.-genl., posts and tels. (finance), Jan., 1934; offg. compt., N.W.F.P., Feb., 1935; fin. advr. to C.C., Delhi, Feb., 1937; dir. of finance, rly. bd., April, 1939.

ZAHIRUDDIN, AHMAD FARUQI, MUHAMMAD, KHAN BAHADUR, Indian Service of Engrs. (exec. engr.) (b. 9th Nov., 1890).—Joined the service, 8th Sept., 1913; asst. engr., Sept., 1914; asst. exec. engr., Dec., 1920; exec. engr., Oct., 1923; transfed. to central p.w.d., Feb., 1933; offg. suptg. engr., May, 1934, and again, Apl., 1935.

ZAKIR HUSAIN, Indian Police (supt. Bengal) (b. 2nd Nov., 1898).—Joined the service as asst. supt., Bengal, 26th Sept., 1923; offg. supt., Sept., 1930; confd., Aug., 1936.

ZAMAN MEHDI KHAN, KHAN BAHADUR, Malik, B.A., late Punjab Civil Service (b. 1879).—Joined the service, 9th Feb., 1901; extra asst. commr., May, 1904; dep. commr., July, 1929; retd., June, 1934.

ZAW PE, U. (see Pe, U Zaw).

ZETLAND (MARQUESS OF), MOST HON. LAWRENCE JOHN LUMLEY DUNDAS, P.C., G.C.S.I., G.C.I.E. (sec. of state for India and for Burma).—

Educ. at Harrow and Trinity Coll., Cambridge; A.D.C., Viceroy's staff, 1900; late captain 1st Bn. N. Riding of Yorks. Vol. Art., and late major, 4th Bn. Prince of Wales' Yorks. Regt.; M.P. for Hornsey divn. of Middlesex, 1907-16; member of the Royal Commn. on the public services in India, 1912-15; G.C.I.E., Feb., 1917; govr. of Bengal from 26th March, 1917, to 20th March, 1922; P.C., 1922; delegate to Indian round table conf., London, Nov., 1930-Jan., 1931; 2nd Session, Sept.-Dec., 1931; sec. of state for India, June, 1935; sec. of state for Burma, Apl., 1937; author of 'Sport and Politics under an Eastern Sky,' 'On the Outskirts of Empire In Asia,' 'A Wandering Student in the Far East,' 'An Eastern Miscellany.'

ZIA-UD-DIN AHMAD (see Ahmad, Z.).

ZIA-UL HASAN, KHAN BAHADUR, MUNSHI, B.A., Judl. Dept., United Provs. (judge, ch. ct., Oudh) (b. Dec., 1880).—Joined the service, 26th June, 1907; sub. judge, Jan., 1922; dist. and sess. judge, Mar., 1932; judge, ch. ct., Oudh, July, 1934.

ZIAUL HAQ, MIAN MUHAMMAD, Indian Forest Service (dep. consvr.) (b. 10th Sept., 1892).—Joined the service, 20th July, 1915; extra asst. consvr., July, 1917; promoted to I.F.S., United Provs., Apl., 1931; dep. consvr., Oct., 1931.

ZIAULLAH KHAN, MUHAMMAD, M.A., Indian C.S. (jt. mag. and dep. collr., Bihar) (b. 4th Dec., 1906).—Educ. at Lucknow Univ. and Magdalene College, Cambridge; joined the Service, 12th Oct., 1931; arrvd. in India, Nov., 1931, and served in Bihar and Orissa as asst. mag. and collr.

ZINKIN, MAURICE, LL.B., Indian C.S. (asst. collr., Bombay) (b. 4th May, 1915).—Educ. at Haberdashers' Aske's Hampstead Sch., and Jesus Coll., Cambridge; apptd. on probn., 29th Sept., 1937; confd., 21st Sept., 1938; arrived in India, Dec., 1938, and served in Bombay as asst. collr.

ZUBERI, MASARRAT HUSAIN, M.A., Indian C.S. (asst. commr., Punjab) (b. 25th June, 1911).—Educated at St. Catherine's College, Cambridge; joined the service, 24th Sept., 1936; arrived in India, Oct., 1936, and served in the Punjab as asst. commr.

ZUTSHI, MANOHAR LAL (see Manohar Lal, Z.).
